title: Finite Meta-Dynamic Neurons in Spiking Neural Networks for Spatio-temporal Learning
title_zh: 用于时空学习的尖峰神经网络中的有限元动态神经元
abstract: Spiking Neural Networks (SNNs) have incorporated more biologically-plausible structures and learning principles, hence are playing critical roles in bridging the gap between artificial and natural neural networks. The spikes are the sparse signals describing the above-threshold event-based firing and under-threshold dynamic computation of membrane potentials, which give us an alternative uniformed and efficient way on both information representation and computation. Inspired from the biological network, where a finite number of meta neurons integrated together for various of cognitive functions, we proposed and constructed Meta-Dynamic Neurons (MDN) to improve SNNs for a better network generalization during spatio-temporal learning. The MDNs are designed with basic neuronal dynamics containing 1st-order and 2nd-order dynamics of membrane potentials, including the spatial and temporal meta types supported by some hyper-parameters. The MDNs generated from a spatial (MNIST) and a temporal (TIDigits) datasets first, and then extended to various other different spatio-temporal tasks (including Fashion-MNIST, NETtalk, Cifar-10, TIMIT and N-MNIST). The comparable accuracy was reached compared to other SOTA SNN algorithms, and a better generalization was also achieved by SNNs using MDNs than that without using MDNs.
summary: Spiking Neural Networks (SNNs) have incorporated more biologically-plausible structures and learning principles, hence are playing critical roles in bridging the gap between artificial and natural neural networks. The spikes are the sparse signals describing the above-threshold event-based firing and under-threshold dynamic computation of membrane potentials, which give us an alternative uniformed and efficient way on both information representation and computation. Inspired from the biological network, where a finite number of meta neurons integrated together for various of cognitive functions, we proposed and constructed Meta-Dynamic Neurons (MDN) to improve SNNs for a better network generalization during spatio-temporal learning. The MDNs are designed with basic neuronal dynamics containing 1st-order and 2nd-order dynamics of membrane potentials, including the spatial and temporal meta types supported by some hyper-parameters. The MDNs generated from a spatial (MNIST) and a temporal (TIDigits) datasets first, and then extended to various other different spatio-temporal tasks (including Fashion-MNIST, NETtalk, Cifar-10, TIMIT and N-MNIST). The comparable accuracy was reached compared to other SOTA SNN algorithms, and a better generalization was also achieved by SNNs using MDNs than that without using MDNs.
abstract_zh: 尖峰神经网络（SNN）融入了更多生物学上合理的结构和学习原理，因此在弥合人工神经网络和自然神经网络之间的差距方面发挥着关键作用。尖峰是描述基于阈值以上事件的放电和阈值下膜电位动态计算的稀疏信号，这为我们提供了一种信息表示和计算的替代统一且有效的方法。受生物网络的启发，有限数量的元神经元集成在一起以实现各种认知功能，我们提出并构建了元动态神经元（MDN）来改进 SNN，以便在时空学习期间实现更好的网络泛化。 MDN 的设计采用基本神经元动力学，包含膜电位的一阶和二阶动力学，包括一些超参数支持的空间和时间元类型。 MDN 首先从空间 (MNIST) 和时间 (TIDigits) 数据集生成，然后扩展到各种其他不同的时空任务（包括 Fashion-MNIST、NETtalk、Cifar-10、TIMIT 和 N-MNIST）。与其他 SOTA SNN 算法相比，达到了相当的精度，并且使用 MDN 的 SNN 也比不使用 MDN 的 SNN 实现了更好的泛化。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为Meta-Dynamic Neurons (MDN)的新型脉冲神经网络结构，旨在提升时空学习任务中的网络泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 传统脉冲神经网络在处理时空数据时存在泛化能力不足的问题，而生物神经网络中有限元神经元的集成机制为认知功能提供了启发。
AI.method: 设计包含一阶/二阶膜电位动力学的MDN结构，通过空间与时间元类型超参数支持，基于MNIST/TIDigits数据集构建并扩展至多类时空任务。
AI.result: 在Fashion-MNIST、NETtalk等6个基准数据集上达到与SOTA算法相当的准确率，且MDN结构显著提升了网络泛化性能。
AI.conclusion: MDN通过模拟生物神经元动态机制有效增强了SNN的时空学习能力，为复杂任务提供了更优的解决方案。

title: Improving Context Modeling in Neural Topic Segmentation
title_zh: 改进神经主题分割中的上下文建模
abstract: Topic segmentation is critical in key NLP tasks and recent works favor highly effective neural supervised approaches. However, current neural solutions are arguably limited in how they model context. In this paper, we enhance a segmenter based on a hierarchical attention BiLSTM network to better model context, by adding a coherence-related auxiliary task and restricted self-attention. Our optimized segmenter outperforms SOTA approaches when trained and tested on three datasets. We also the robustness of our proposed model in domain transfer setting by training a model on a large-scale dataset and testing it on four challenging real-world benchmarks. Furthermore, we apply our proposed strategy to two other languages (German and Chinese), and show its effectiveness in multilingual scenarios.
summary: Topic segmentation is critical in key NLP tasks and recent works favor highly effective neural supervised approaches. However, current neural solutions are arguably limited in how they model context. In this paper, we enhance a segmenter based on a hierarchical attention BiLSTM network to better model context, by adding a coherence-related auxiliary task and restricted self-attention. Our optimized segmenter outperforms SOTA approaches when trained and tested on three datasets. We also the robustness of our proposed model in domain transfer setting by training a model on a large-scale dataset and testing it on four challenging real-world benchmarks. Furthermore, we apply our proposed strategy to two other languages (German and Chinese), and show its effectiveness in multilingual scenarios.
abstract_zh: 主题分割在关键的 NLP 任务中至关重要，最近的工作有利于高效的神经监督方法。然而，当前的神经解决方案在建模上下文方面可能受到限制。在本文中，我们通过添加与连贯性相关的辅助任务和受限的自注意力，增强了基于分层注意力 BiLSTM 网络的分段器，以更好地建模上下文。在三个数据集上进行训练和测试时，我们优化的分段器优于 SOTA 方法。我们还通过在大规模数据集上训练模型并在四个具有挑战性的现实世界基准上对其进行测试，来验证我们提出的模型在域转移设置中的稳健性。此外，我们将我们提出的策略应用于其他两种语言（德语和中文），并展示了其在多语言场景中的有效性。

AI.tldr: 改进神经主题分割中的上下文建模以提升分段效果
AI.motivation: 现有神经方法在上下文建模存在局限，难以有效捕捉长距离依赖和主题连贯性，需改进以提升分割效果和跨领域适应性
AI.method: 基于分层注意力BiLSTM网络，引入连贯性辅助任务和受限自注意力机制，增强上下文建模能力
AI.result: 在三个数据集上优于现有方法，在领域迁移和多语言场景下均表现良好
AI.conclusion: 所提方法有效提升主题分割性能及跨领域和多语言适应性，为后续研究提供新方向

title: Improving the efficiency of spectral features extraction by structuring the audio files
title_zh: 通过构建音频文件来提高频谱特征提取的效率
abstract: The extraction of spectral features from a music clip is a computationally expensive task. As in order to extract accurate features, we need to process the clip for its whole length. This preprocessing task creates a large overhead and also makes the extraction process slower. We show how formatting a dataset in a certain way, can help make the process more efficient by eliminating the need for processing the clip for its whole duration, and still extract the features accurately. In addition, we discuss the possibility of defining set generic durations for analyzing a certain type of music clip while training. And in doing so we cut down the need of processing the clip duration to just 10% of the global average.
summary: The extraction of spectral features from a music clip is a computationally expensive task. As in order to extract accurate features, we need to process the clip for its whole length. This preprocessing task creates a large overhead and also makes the extraction process slower. We show how formatting a dataset in a certain way, can help make the process more efficient by eliminating the need for processing the clip for its whole duration, and still extract the features accurately. In addition, we discuss the possibility of defining set generic durations for analyzing a certain type of music clip while training. And in doing so we cut down the need of processing the clip duration to just 10% of the global average.
abstract_zh: 从音乐剪辑中提取频谱特征是一项计算成本高昂的任务。为了提取准确的特征，我们需要处理剪辑的整个长度。此预处理任务会产生很大的开销，并且还会使提取过程变慢。我们展示了如何以某种方式格式化数据集，通过消除在整个持续时间内处理剪辑的需要来帮助提高过程效率，并且仍然准确地提取特征。此外，我们还讨论了在训练时定义用于分析某种类型的音乐剪辑的通用持续时间的可能性。通过这样做，我们将处理剪辑持续时间的需求减少到仅为全球平均水平的 10%。

AI.tldr: 通过结构化音频文件提高频谱特征提取的效率
AI.motivation: 传统方法需处理完整音频导致计算量大且效率低，需寻找更高效特征提取方式
AI.method: 对数据集进行特定格式化处理，并定义通用分析时长以减少处理时间
AI.result: 将音频处理时间缩短至全球平均值的10%同时保持特征准确性
AI.conclusion: 提出了一种减少计算开销的高效特征提取方法，为后续研究提供基础

authors_text: Sameera Ramasinghe,Kanchana Ranasinghe,Salman Khan,Nick Barnes,Stephen Gould
title: Conditional Generative Modeling via Learning the Latent Space
title_zh: 通过学习潜在空间进行条件生成建模
abstract: Although deep learning has achieved appealing results on several machine learning tasks, most of the models are deterministic at inference, limiting their application to single-modal settings. We propose a novel general-purpose framework for conditional generation in multimodal spaces, that uses latent variables to model generalizable learning patterns while minimizing a family of regression cost functions. At inference, the latent variables are optimized to find optimal solutions corresponding to multiple output modes. Compared to existing generative solutions, in multimodal spaces, our approach demonstrates faster and stable convergence, and can learn better representations for downstream tasks. Importantly, it provides a simple generic model that can beat highly engineered pipelines tailored using domain expertise on a variety of tasks, while generating diverse outputs. Our codes will be released.
summary: Although deep learning has achieved appealing results on several machine learning tasks, most of the models are deterministic at inference, limiting their application to single-modal settings. We propose a novel general-purpose framework for conditional generation in multimodal spaces, that uses latent variables to model generalizable learning patterns while minimizing a family of regression cost functions. At inference, the latent variables are optimized to find optimal solutions corresponding to multiple output modes. Compared to existing generative solutions, in multimodal spaces, our approach demonstrates faster and stable convergence, and can learn better representations for downstream tasks. Importantly, it provides a simple generic model that can beat highly engineered pipelines tailored using domain expertise on a variety of tasks, while generating diverse outputs. Our codes will be released.
abstract_zh: 尽管深度学习在多项机器学习任务上取得了引人注目的结果，但大多数模型在推理时都是确定性的，限制了它们在单模态设置中的应用。我们提出了一种用于多模态空间条件生成的新型通用框架，该框架使用潜在变量来建模可泛化的学习模式，同时最小化一系列回归成本函数。在推理时，对潜变量进行优化以找到与多种输出模式相对应的最优解。与现有的生成解决方案相比，在多模态空间中，我们的方法表现出更快且稳定的收敛性，并且可以学习下游任务的更好表示。重要的是，它提供了一个简单的通用模型，可以击败使用各种任务的领域专业知识定制的高度工程化的管道，同时生成不同的输出。我们的代码将被发布。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于潜在空间学习的条件生成框架，用于多模态空间中的生成建模任务。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习模型在推理阶段多为确定性输出，难以处理多模态生成任务，限制了其灵活性和应用范围。
AI.method: 通过引入潜在变量优化机制，结合回归成本函数最小化，实现多模态条件下最优解的搜索与生成。
AI.result: 相比传统方法，该框架在收敛速度、表示学习效果及多任务性能上均有提升，且能生成多样化输出。
AI.conclusion: 该通用框架可替代领域定制化模型，在保持简单性的同时实现更优的多模态生成效果。

title: Cognitive Learning-Aided Multi-Antenna Communications
title_zh: 认知学习辅助多天线通信
comment: Accepted paper in IEEE Wireless Communications Magazine
comments: Accepted paper in IEEE Wireless Communications Magazine
abstract: Cognitive communications have emerged as a promising solution to enhance, adapt, and invent new tools and capabilities that transcend conventional wireless networks. Deep learning (DL) is critical in enabling essential features of cognitive systems because of its fast prediction performance, adaptive behavior, and model-free structure. These features are especially significant for multi-antenna wireless communications systems, which generate and handle massive data. Multiple antennas may provide multiplexing, diversity, or antenna gains that, respectively, improve the capacity, bit error rate, or the signal-to-interference-plus-noise ratio. In practice, multi-antenna cognitive communications encounter challenges in terms of data complexity and diversity, hardware complexity, and wireless channel dynamics. DL solutions such as federated learning, transfer learning and online learning, tackle these problems at various stages of communications processing, including multi-channel estimation, hybrid beamforming, user localization, and sparse array design. This article provides a synopsis of various DL-based methods to impart cognitive behavior to multi-antenna wireless communications for improved robustness and adaptation to the environmental changes while providing satisfactory spectral efficiency and computation times. We discuss DL design challenges from the perspective of data, learning, and transceiver architectures. In particular, we suggest quantized learning models, data/model parallelization, and distributed learning methods to address the aforementioned challenges.

abstract_zh: 认知通信已成为一种有前景的解决方案，可增强、适应和发明超越传统无线网络的新工具和功能。深度学习 (DL) 由于其快速预测性能、自适应行为和无模型结构，对于实现认知系统的基本功能至关重要。这些功能对于生成和处理大量数据的多天线无线通信系统尤其重要。多个天线可以提供复用、分集或天线增益，分别提高容量、误码率或信号与干扰加噪声比。在实践中，多天线认知通信遇到数据复杂性和多样性、硬件复杂性和无线信道动态方面的挑战。联邦学习、迁移学习和在线学习等深度学习解决方案在通信处理的各个阶段解决这些问题，包括多通道估计、混合波束成形、用户定位和稀疏阵列设计。本文概述了各种基于深度学习的方法，这些方法可将认知行为赋予多天线无线通信，以提高鲁棒性和对环境变化的适应性，同时提供令人满意的频谱效率和计算时间。我们从数据、学习和收发器架构的角度讨论深度学习设计挑战。特别是，我们建议量化学习模型、数据/模型并行化和分布式学习方法来解决上述挑战。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了如何利用深度学习方法增强多天线通信系统的认知能力，以提高其鲁棒性和适应性。
AI.motivation: 多天线无线通信系统面临数据复杂性、硬件复杂性和信道动态变化等挑战，需要一种更智能、自适应的方法来应对。
AI.method: 本文采用联邦学习、迁移学习和在线学习等深度学习方法，用于解决多通道估计、混合波束成形、用户定位和稀疏阵列设计等通信处理的不同阶段的问题。
AI.result: 本文总结了多种基于深度学习的方法，以赋予多天线无线通信系统认知行为，提高其对环境变化的适应性及频谱效率。
AI.conclusion: 本文从数据、学习和收发器架构的角度讨论了深度学习设计的挑战，并提出了量化学习模型、数据/模型并行化和分布式学习方法来应对这些挑战。

title: A Linguistic Analysis of Visually Grounded Dialogues Based on Spatial Expressions
title_zh: 基于空间表达的视觉基础对话的语言学分析
abstract: Recent models achieve promising results in visually grounded dialogues. However, existing datasets often contain undesirable biases and lack sophisticated linguistic analyses, which make it difficult to understand how well current models recognize their precise linguistic structures. To address this problem, we make two design choices: first, we focus on OneCommon Corpus \citep{udagawa2019natural,udagawa2020annotated}, a simple yet challenging common grounding dataset which contains minimal bias by design. Second, we analyze their linguistic structures based on \textit{spatial expressions} and provide comprehensive and reliable annotation for 600 dialogues. We show that our annotation captures important linguistic structures including predicate-argument structure, modification and ellipsis. In our experiments, we assess the model's understanding of these structures through reference resolution. We demonstrate that our annotation can reveal both the strengths and weaknesses of baseline models in essential levels of detail. Overall, we propose a novel framework and resource for investigating fine-grained language understanding in visually grounded dialogues.
summary: Recent models achieve promising results in visually grounded dialogues. However, existing datasets often contain undesirable biases and lack sophisticated linguistic analyses, which make it difficult to understand how well current models recognize their precise linguistic structures. To address this problem, we make two design choices: first, we focus on OneCommon Corpus \citep{udagawa2019natural,udagawa2020annotated}, a simple yet challenging common grounding dataset which contains minimal bias by design. Second, we analyze their linguistic structures based on \textit{spatial expressions} and provide comprehensive and reliable annotation for 600 dialogues. We show that our annotation captures important linguistic structures including predicate-argument structure, modification and ellipsis. In our experiments, we assess the model's understanding of these structures through reference resolution. We demonstrate that our annotation can reveal both the strengths and weaknesses of baseline models in essential levels of detail. Overall, we propose a novel framework and resource for investigating fine-grained language understanding in visually grounded dialogues.
abstract_zh: 最近的模型在基于视觉的对话中取得了有希望的结果。然而，现有的数据集通常包含不良偏差，并且缺乏复杂的语言分析，这使得很难理解当前模型识别其精确语言结构的程度。为了解决这个问题，我们做出两个设计选择：首先，我们专注于 OneCommon Corpus \citep{udagawa2019natural,udagawa2020annotated}，这是一个简单但具有挑战性的共同基础数据集，其设计包含最小的偏差。其次，我们基于 \textit{空间表达} 分析其语言结构，并为 600 个对话提供全面可靠的注释。我们表明，我们的注释捕获了重要的语言结构，包括谓词-论元结构、修饰和省略。在我们的实验中，我们通过参考解析来评估模型对这些结构的理解。我们证明我们的注释可以在基本细​​节层面揭示基线模型的优点和缺点。总的来说，我们提出了一个新颖的框架和资源，用于研究基于视觉的对话中的细粒度语言理解。

AI.tldr: 本文通过分析视觉 grounding 对话中的空间表达，提出了一种新的细粒度语言理解框架和资源。
AI.motivation: 现有数据集存在偏差且缺乏对语言结构的深入分析，导致难以评估模型对语言结构的理解能力。
AI.method: 基于 OneCommon Corpus 数据集，对 600 段对话进行空间表达的精细标注，分析谓词-论元结构、修饰和省略等语言特征，并通过指代解析评估模型表现。
AI.result: 标注体系能有效揭示基线模型在语言理解层面的优势与不足，验证了方法对细粒度语言结构分析的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 本文为视觉 grounding 对话中的语言理解研究提供了新的分析框架和标注资源，推动模型在更精细的语言结构层面优化。

motivation: 现有数据集存在偏差且缺乏对语言结构的深入分析，导致难以评估模型对语言结构的理解能力。
method: 基于 OneCommon Corpus 数据集，对 600 段对话进行空间表达的精细标注，分析谓词-论元结构、修饰和省略等语言特征，并通过指代解析评估模型表现。
result: 标注体系能有效揭示基线模型在语言理解层面的优势与不足，验证了方法对细粒度语言结构分析的有效性。
conclusion: 本文为视觉 grounding 对话中的语言理解研究提供了新的分析框架和标注资源，推动模型在更精细的语言结构层面优化。
search_text: A Linguistic Analysis of Visually Grounded Dialogues Based on Spatial Expressions 基于空间表达的视觉基础对话的语言学分析 Recent models achieve promising results in visually grounded dialogues. However, existing datasets often contain undesirable biases and lack sophisticated linguistic analyses, which make it difficult to understand how well current models recognize their precise linguistic structures. To address this problem, we make two design choices: first, we focus on OneCommon Corpus \citep{udagawa2019natural,udagawa2020annotated}, a simple yet challenging common grounding dataset which contains minimal bias by design. Second, we analyze their linguistic structures based on \textit{spatial expressions} and provide comprehensive and reliable annotation for 600 dialogues. We show that our annotation captures important linguistic structures including predicate-argument structure, modification and ellipsis. In our experiments, we assess the model's understanding of these structures through reference resolution. We demonstrate that our annotation can reveal both the strengths and weaknesses of baseline models in essential levels of detail. Overall, we propose a novel framework and resource for investigating fine-grained language understanding in visually grounded dialogues. 最近的模型在基于视觉的对话中取得了有希望的结果。然而，现有的数据集通常包含不良偏差，并且缺乏复杂的语言分析，这使得很难理解当前模型识别其精确语言结构的程度。为了解决这个问题，我们做出两个设计选择：首先，我们专注于 OneCommon Corpus \citep{udagawa2019natural,udagawa2020annotated}，这是一个简单但具有挑战性的共同基础数据集，其设计包含最小的偏差。其次，我们基于 \textit{空间表达} 分析其语言结构，并为 600 个对话提供全面可靠的注释。我们表明，我们的注释捕获了重要的语言结构，包括谓词-论元结构、修饰和省略。在我们的实验中，我们通过参考解析来评估模型对这些结构的理解。我们证明我们的注释可以在基本细​​节层面揭示基线模型的优点和缺点。总的来说，我们提出了一个新颖的框架和资源，用于研究基于视觉的对话中的细粒度语言理解。 本文通过分析视觉 grounding 对话中的空间表达，提出了一种新的细粒度语言理解框架和资源。 Takuma Udagawa,Takato Yamazaki,Akiko Aizawa cs.CL,cs.AI

authors_text: Yukang Jiang,Jianying Pan,Yanhe Shen,Jin Zhu,Jiamin Huang,Huirui Xie,Xueqin Wang,Yan Luo
title: A Fast and Effective Method of Macula Automatic Detection for Retina Images
title_zh: 快速有效的视网膜图像黄斑自动检测方法
abstract: Retina image processing is one of the crucial and popular topics of medical image processing. The macula fovea is responsible for sharp central vision, which is necessary for human behaviors where visual detail is of primary importance, such as reading, writing, driving, etc. This paper proposes a novel method to locate the macula through a series of morphological processing. On the premise of maintaining high accuracy, our approach is simpler and faster than others. Furthermore, for the hospital's real images, our method is also able to detect the macula robustly.
summary: Retina image processing is one of the crucial and popular topics of medical image processing. The macula fovea is responsible for sharp central vision, which is necessary for human behaviors where visual detail is of primary importance, such as reading, writing, driving, etc. This paper proposes a novel method to locate the macula through a series of morphological processing. On the premise of maintaining high accuracy, our approach is simpler and faster than others. Furthermore, for the hospital's real images, our method is also able to detect the macula robustly.
abstract_zh: 视网膜图像处理是医学图像处理的重要和热门课题之一。黄斑中心负责敏锐的中央视力，这对于视觉细节至关重要的人类行为是必需的，例如阅读、写作、驾驶等。本文提出了一种通过一系列形态学处理来定位黄斑的新方法。在保持高精度的前提下，我们的方法比其他方法更简单、更快。此外，对于医院的真实图像，我们的方法也能够稳健地检测黄斑。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种快速有效的视网膜图像黄斑自动检测方法。
AI.motivation: 黄斑区对中央视力至关重要，现有方法在速度或准确性上存在不足，需开发更高效可靠的检测方案。
AI.method: 通过一系列形态学处理步骤实现黄斑定位，兼顾简洁性与高效性。
AI.result: 方法在保持高准确率的同时显著提升检测速度，并能在实际医院图像中稳健运行。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在效率与准确性上优于现有方案，适用于临床视网膜图像分析场景。

title: Driving Behavior Modeling using Naturalistic Human Driving Data with Inverse Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 使用自然人类驾驶数据和逆强化学习进行驾驶行为建模
abstract: Driving behavior modeling is of great importance for designing safe, smart, and personalized autonomous driving systems. In this paper, an internal reward function-based driving model that emulates the human's decision-making mechanism is utilized. To infer the reward function parameters from naturalistic human driving data, we propose a structural assumption about human driving behavior that focuses on discrete latent driving intentions. It converts the continuous behavior modeling problem to a discrete setting and thus makes maximum entropy inverse reinforcement learning (IRL) tractable to learn reward functions. Specifically, a polynomial trajectory sampler is adopted to generate candidate trajectories considering high-level intentions and approximate the partition function in the maximum entropy IRL framework. An environment model considering interactive behaviors among the ego and surrounding vehicles is built to better estimate the generated trajectories. The proposed method is applied to learn personalized reward functions for individual human drivers from the NGSIM highway driving dataset. The qualitative results demonstrate that the learned reward functions are able to explicitly express the preferences of different drivers and interpret their decisions. The quantitative results reveal that the learned reward functions are robust, which is manifested by only a marginal decline in proximity to the human driving trajectories when applying the reward function in the testing conditions. For the testing performance, the personalized modeling method outperforms the general modeling approach, significantly reducing the modeling errors in human likeness (a custom metric to gauge accuracy), and these two methods deliver better results compared to other baseline methods.
summary: Driving behavior modeling is of great importance for designing safe, smart, and personalized autonomous driving systems. In this paper, an internal reward function-based driving model that emulates the human's decision-making mechanism is utilized. To infer the reward function parameters from naturalistic human driving data, we propose a structural assumption about human driving behavior that focuses on discrete latent driving intentions. It converts the continuous behavior modeling problem to a discrete setting and thus makes maximum entropy inverse reinforcement learning (IRL) tractable to learn reward functions. Specifically, a polynomial trajectory sampler is adopted to generate candidate trajectories considering high-level intentions and approximate the partition function in the maximum entropy IRL framework. An environment model considering interactive behaviors among the ego and surrounding vehicles is built to better estimate the generated trajectories. The proposed method is applied to learn personalized reward functions for individual human drivers from the NGSIM highway driving dataset. The qualitative results demonstrate that the learned reward functions are able to explicitly express the preferences of different drivers and interpret their decisions. The quantitative results reveal that the learned reward functions are robust, which is manifested by only a marginal decline in proximity to the human driving trajectories when applying the reward function in the testing conditions. For the testing performance, the personalized modeling method outperforms the general modeling approach, significantly reducing the modeling errors in human likeness (a custom metric to gauge accuracy), and these two methods deliver better results compared to other baseline methods.
abstract_zh: 驾驶行为建模对于设计安全、智能、个性化的自动驾驶系统具有重要意义。在本文中，利用了一种模拟人类决策机制的基于内部奖励函数的驱动模型。为了从自然的人类驾驶数据中推断奖励函数参数，我们提出了一个关于人类驾驶行为的结构假设，该假设侧重于离散的潜在驾驶意图。它将连续行为建模问题转换为离散设置，从而使最大熵逆强化学习（IRL）易于学习奖励函数。具体来说，采用多项式轨迹采样器来生成考虑高层意图的候选轨迹，并近似最大熵IRL框架中的配分函数。建立考虑自我和周围车辆之间交互行为的环境模型，以更好地估计生成的轨迹。所提出的方法用于从 NGSIM 高速公路驾驶数据集中学习单个人类驾驶员的个性化奖励函数。定性结果表明，学习到的奖励函数能够明确表达不同驾驶员的偏好并解释他们的决策。定量结果表明，学习到的奖励函数是稳健的，这表现为在测试条件下应用奖励函数时，与人类驾驶轨迹的接近程度仅略有下降。对于测试性能，个性化建模方法优于通用建模方法，显着减少了人体相似度（衡量准确性的自定义指标）的建模错误，并且与其他基线方法相比，这两种方法提供了更好的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于逆强化学习的驾驶行为建模方法，通过自然驾驶数据学习个性化奖励函数以模拟人类决策机制。
AI.motivation: 为设计安全、智能的自动驾驶系统，需准确建模人类驾驶行为并捕捉个体差异化的决策偏好。
AI.method: 假设驾驶意图具有离散潜在状态，将连续行为建模转化为离散问题；采用多项式轨迹采样器生成候选轨迹，并构建考虑车辆交互的环境模型辅助轨迹评估。
AI.result: 定性结果表明模型能明确表达不同驾驶员偏好，定量结果验证其鲁棒性且个性化建模方法较通用方法显著降低人类相似度误差。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过离散意图假设和交互环境建模有效提升了驾驶行为建模的准确性与个性化水平。

authors_text: Yun Cao,Yuebin Wang,Junhuan Peng,Liqiang Zhang,Linlin Xu,Kai Yan,Lihua Li
title: DML-GANR: Deep Metric Learning With Generative Adversarial Network Regularization for High Spatial Resolution Remote Sensing Image Retrieval
title_zh: DML-GANR：利用生成对抗网络正则化进行深度度量学习，用于高空间分辨率遥感图像检索
abstract: With a small number of labeled samples for training, it can save considerable manpower and material resources, especially when the amount of high spatial resolution remote sensing images (HSR-RSIs) increases considerably. However, many deep models face the problem of overfitting when using a small number of labeled samples. This might degrade HSRRSI retrieval accuracy. Aiming at obtaining more accurate HSR-RSI retrieval performance with small training samples, we develop a deep metric learning approach with generative adversarial network regularization (DML-GANR) for HSR-RSI retrieval. The DML-GANR starts from a high-level feature extraction (HFE) to extract high-level features, which includes convolutional layers and fully connected (FC) layers. Each of the FC layers is constructed by deep metric learning (DML) to maximize the interclass variations and minimize the intraclass variations. The generative adversarial network (GAN) is adopted to mitigate the overfitting problem and validate the qualities of extracted high-level features. DML-GANR is optimized through a customized approach, and the optimal parameters are obtained. The experimental results on the three data sets demonstrate the superior performance of DML-GANR over state-of-the-art techniques in HSR-RSI retrieval.
summary: With a small number of labeled samples for training, it can save considerable manpower and material resources, especially when the amount of high spatial resolution remote sensing images (HSR-RSIs) increases considerably. However, many deep models face the problem of overfitting when using a small number of labeled samples. This might degrade HSRRSI retrieval accuracy. Aiming at obtaining more accurate HSR-RSI retrieval performance with small training samples, we develop a deep metric learning approach with generative adversarial network regularization (DML-GANR) for HSR-RSI retrieval. The DML-GANR starts from a high-level feature extraction (HFE) to extract high-level features, which includes convolutional layers and fully connected (FC) layers. Each of the FC layers is constructed by deep metric learning (DML) to maximize the interclass variations and minimize the intraclass variations. The generative adversarial network (GAN) is adopted to mitigate the overfitting problem and validate the qualities of extracted high-level features. DML-GANR is optimized through a customized approach, and the optimal parameters are obtained. The experimental results on the three data sets demonstrate the superior performance of DML-GANR over state-of-the-art techniques in HSR-RSI retrieval.
abstract_zh: 用少量的标记样本进行训练，可以节省大量的人力和物力，特别是当高空间分辨率遥感图像（HSR-RSI）数量大幅增加时。然而，许多深度模型在使用少量标记样本时面临过拟合的问题。这可能会降低 HSRRSI 检索的准确性。为了通过小训练样本获得更准确的 HSR-RSI 检索性能，我们开发了一种采用生成对抗网络正则化 (DML-GANR) 的深度度量学习方法，用于 HSR-RSI 检索。 DML-GANR从高级特征提取（HFE）开始提取高级特征，其中包括卷积层和全连接（FC）层。每个 FC 层都是通过深度度量学习 (DML) 构建的，以最大化类间变化并最小化类内变化。采用生成对抗网络（GAN）来缓解过度拟合问题并验证提取的高级特征的质量。通过定制的方法对DML-GANR进行优化，得到最优参数。三个数据集的实验结果表明，在 HSR-RSI 检索中，DML-GANR 的性能优于最先进的技术。

AI.motivation: 高空间分辨率遥感图像数据量庞大且标注成本高，现有深度模型在少量标注样本下易出现过拟合，导致检索性能下降。
AI.method: 通过高阶特征提取网络（含卷积层和全连接层）结合深度度量学习最大化类间差异并最小化类内差异，同时引入生成对抗网络（GAN）缓解过拟合并验证特征质量。
AI.result: 在三个数据集上的实验表明，DML-GANR在高空间分辨率遥感图像检索任务中优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: DML-GANR通过融合深度度量学习与GAN正则化，有效解决了小样本下的过拟合问题，提升了遥感图像检索的准确性。

search_text: DML-GANR: Deep Metric Learning With Generative Adversarial Network Regularization for High Spatial Resolution Remote Sensing Image Retrieval DML-GANR：利用生成对抗网络正则化进行深度度量学习，用于高空间分辨率遥感图像检索 With a small number of labeled samples for training, it can save considerable manpower and material resources, especially when the amount of high spatial resolution remote sensing images (HSR-RSIs) increases considerably. However, many deep models face the problem of overfitting when using a small number of labeled samples. This might degrade HSRRSI retrieval accuracy. Aiming at obtaining more accurate HSR-RSI retrieval performance with small training samples, we develop a deep metric learning approach with generative adversarial network regularization (DML-GANR) for HSR-RSI retrieval. The DML-GANR starts from a high-level feature extraction (HFE) to extract high-level features, which includes convolutional layers and fully connected (FC) layers. Each of the FC layers is constructed by deep metric learning (DML) to maximize the interclass variations and minimize the intraclass variations. The generative adversarial network (GAN) is adopted to mitigate the overfitting problem and validate the qualities of extracted high-level features. DML-GANR is optimized through a customized approach, and the optimal parameters are obtained. The experimental results on the three data sets demonstrate the superior performance of DML-GANR over state-of-the-art techniques in HSR-RSI retrieval. 用少量的标记样本进行训练，可以节省大量的人力和物力，特别是当高空间分辨率遥感图像（HSR-RSI）数量大幅增加时。然而，许多深度模型在使用少量标记样本时面临过拟合的问题。这可能会降低 HSRRSI 检索的准确性。为了通过小训练样本获得更准确的 HSR-RSI 检索性能，我们开发了一种采用生成对抗网络正则化 (DML-GANR) 的深度度量学习方法，用于 HSR-RSI 检索。 DML-GANR从高级特征提取（HFE）开始提取高级特征，其中包括卷积层和全连接（FC）层。每个 FC 层都是通过深度度量学习 (DML) 构建的，以最大化类间变化并最小化类内变化。采用生成对抗网络（GAN）来缓解过度拟合问题并验证提取的高级特征的质量。通过定制的方法对DML-GANR进行优化，得到最优参数。三个数据集的实验结果表明，在 HSR-RSI 检索中，DML-GANR 的性能优于最先进的技术。 本文提出了一种结合生成对抗网络正则化的深度度量学习方法（DML-GANR），用于解决高空间分辨率遥感图像检索中样本量少导致的过拟合问题。 Yun Cao,Yuebin Wang,Junhuan Peng,Liqiang Zhang,Linlin Xu,Kai Yan,Lihua Li cs.CV,math.OC

authors_text: Yun Cao,Jie Mei,Yuebin Wang,Liqiang Zhang,Junhuan Peng,Bing Zhang,Lihua Li,Yibo Zheng
title: SLCRF: Subspace Learning with Conditional Random Field for Hyperspectral Image Classification
title_zh: SLCRF：用于高光谱图像分类的条件随机场子空间学习
abstract: Subspace learning (SL) plays an important role in hyperspectral image (HSI) classification, since it can provide an effective solution to reduce the redundant information in the image pixels of HSIs. Previous works about SL aim to improve the accuracy of HSI recognition. Using a large number of labeled samples, related methods can train the parameters of the proposed solutions to obtain better representations of HSI pixels. However, the data instances may not be sufficient enough to learn a precise model for HSI classification in real applications. Moreover, it is well-known that it takes much time, labor and human expertise to label HSI images. To avoid the aforementioned problems, a novel SL method that includes the probability assumption called subspace learning with conditional random field (SLCRF) is developed. In SLCRF, first, the 3D convolutional autoencoder (3DCAE) is introduced to remove the redundant information in HSI pixels. In addition, the relationships are also constructed using the spectral-spatial information among the adjacent pixels. Then, the conditional random field (CRF) framework can be constructed and further embedded into the HSI SL procedure with the semi-supervised approach. Through the linearized alternating direction method termed LADMAP, the objective function of SLCRF is optimized using a defined iterative algorithm. The proposed method is comprehensively evaluated using the challenging public HSI datasets. We can achieve stateof-the-art performance using these HSI sets.
summary: Subspace learning (SL) plays an important role in hyperspectral image (HSI) classification, since it can provide an effective solution to reduce the redundant information in the image pixels of HSIs. Previous works about SL aim to improve the accuracy of HSI recognition. Using a large number of labeled samples, related methods can train the parameters of the proposed solutions to obtain better representations of HSI pixels. However, the data instances may not be sufficient enough to learn a precise model for HSI classification in real applications. Moreover, it is well-known that it takes much time, labor and human expertise to label HSI images. To avoid the aforementioned problems, a novel SL method that includes the probability assumption called subspace learning with conditional random field (SLCRF) is developed. In SLCRF, first, the 3D convolutional autoencoder (3DCAE) is introduced to remove the redundant information in HSI pixels. In addition, the relationships are also constructed using the spectral-spatial information among the adjacent pixels. Then, the conditional random field (CRF) framework can be constructed and further embedded into the HSI SL procedure with the semi-supervised approach. Through the linearized alternating direction method termed LADMAP, the objective function of SLCRF is optimized using a defined iterative algorithm. The proposed method is comprehensively evaluated using the challenging public HSI datasets. We can achieve stateof-the-art performance using these HSI sets.
abstract_zh: 子空间学习（SL）在高光谱图像（HSI）分类中发挥着重要作用，因为它可以提供有效的解决方案来减少HSI图像像素中的冗余信息。之前关于 SL 的工作旨在提高 HSI 识别的准确性。使用大量标记样本，相关方法可以训练所提出的解决方案的参数，以获得更好的HSI像素表示。然而，数据实例可能不足以在实际应用中学习 HSI 分类的精确模型。此外，众所周知，标记 HSI 图像需要大量时间、劳动力和人力专业知识。为了避免上述问题，开发了一种新颖的 SL 方法，该方法包括称为条件随机场子空间学习 (SLCRF) 的概率假设。在SLCRF中，首先引入3D卷积自动编码器（3DCAE）来去除HSI像素中的冗余信息。此外，还使用相邻像素之间的光谱空间信息来构建关系。然后，可以构建条件随机场（CRF）框架，并通过半监督方法进一步嵌入到 HSI SL 过程中。通过称为 LADMAP 的线性化交替方向方法，使用定义的迭代算法优化 SLCRF 的目标函数。使用具有挑战性的公共 HSI 数据集对所提出的方法进行了综合评估。我们可以使用这些 HSI 集实现最先进的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合条件随机场的子空间学习方法（SLCRF），用于解决高光谱图像分类中数据不足和标记成本高的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有子空间学习方法依赖大量标记样本，但实际应用中高光谱图像数据获取困难且标记成本高，需减少对标注数据的依赖。
AI.method: 采用3D卷积自编码器去除冗余信息，构建光谱-空间关系，结合条件随机场框架与半监督方法，并通过LADMAP算法优化目标函数。
AI.result: 在多个公开高光谱数据集上实现分类性能的最先进水平，验证了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: SLCRF通过半监督学习和CRF框架有效缓解了数据不足问题，提升了高光谱图像分类的准确性和鲁棒性。

However, the data instances may not be sufficient enough to learn a precise model for HSI classification in real applications. Moreover, it is well-known that it takes much time, labor and human expertise to label HSI images. To avoid the aforementioned problems, a novel SL method that includes the probability assumption called subspace learning with conditional random field (SLCRF) is developed. In SLCRF, first, the 3D convolutional autoencoder (3DCAE) is introduced to remove the redundant information in HSI pixels. In addition, the relationships are also constructed using the spectral-spatial information among the adjacent pixels. Then, the conditional random field (CRF) framework can be constructed and further embedded into the HSI SL procedure with the semi-supervised approach. The proposed method is comprehensively evaluated using the challenging public HSI datasets. authors_text: Sumedh A. Sontakke,Arash Mehrjou,Laurent Itti,Bernhard Schölkopf
title: Causal Curiosity: RL Agents Discovering Self-supervised Experiments for Causal Representation Learning
title_zh: 因果好奇心：强化学习代理发现因果表示学习的自我监督实验
comment: International Conference on Machine Learning, PMLR 139, 2021
comments: International Conference on Machine Learning, PMLR 139, 2021
abstract: Animals exhibit an innate ability to learn regularities of the world through interaction. By performing experiments in their environment, they are able to discern the causal factors of variation and infer how they affect the world's dynamics. Inspired by this, we attempt to equip reinforcement learning agents with the ability to perform experiments that facilitate a categorization of the rolled-out trajectories, and to subsequently infer the causal factors of the environment in a hierarchical manner. We introduce {\em causal curiosity}, a novel intrinsic reward, and show that it allows our agents to learn optimal sequences of actions and discover causal factors in the dynamics of the environment. The learned behavior allows the agents to infer a binary quantized representation for the ground-truth causal factors in every environment. Additionally, we find that these experimental behaviors are semantically meaningful (e.g., our agents learn to lift blocks to categorize them by weight), and are learnt in a self-supervised manner with approximately 2.5 times less data than conventional supervised planners. We show that these behaviors can be re-purposed and fine-tuned (e.g., from lifting to pushing or other downstream tasks). Finally, we show that the knowledge of causal factor representations aids zero-shot learning for more complex tasks. Visit https://sites.google.com/usc.edu/causal-curiosity/home for website.
summary: Animals exhibit an innate ability to learn regularities of the world through interaction. By performing experiments in their environment, they are able to discern the causal factors of variation and infer how they affect the world's dynamics. Inspired by this, we attempt to equip reinforcement learning agents with the ability to perform experiments that facilitate a categorization of the rolled-out trajectories, and to subsequently infer the causal factors of the environment in a hierarchical manner. We introduce {\em causal curiosity}, a novel intrinsic reward, and show that it allows our agents to learn optimal sequences of actions and discover causal factors in the dynamics of the environment. The learned behavior allows the agents to infer a binary quantized representation for the ground-truth causal factors in every environment. Additionally, we find that these experimental behaviors are semantically meaningful (e.g., our agents learn to lift blocks to categorize them by weight), and are learnt in a self-supervised manner with approximately 2.5 times less data than conventional supervised planners. We show that these behaviors can be re-purposed and fine-tuned (e.g., from lifting to pushing or other downstream tasks). Finally, we show that the knowledge of causal factor representations aids zero-shot learning for more complex tasks. Visit https://sites.google.com/usc.edu/causal-curiosity/home for website.
abstract_zh: 动物表现出通过互动来学习世界规律的天生能力。通过在环境中进行实验，他们能够辨别变化的因果因素并推断它们如何影响世界的动态。受此启发，我们尝试使强化学习代理能够执行实验，以促进对推出的轨迹进行分类，并随后以分层方式推断环境的因果因素。我们引入了因果好奇心，这是一种新颖的内在奖励，并表明它允许我们的代理学习最佳的行动序列并发现环境动态中的因果因素。学习到的行为允许代理推断每个环境中真实因果因素的二进制量化表示。此外，我们发现这些实验行为在语义上是有意义的（例如，我们的代理学习举起木块并按重量对它们进行分类），并且以自我监督的方式学习，所需数据比传统监督规划器少大约 2.5 倍。我们证明这些行为可以重新调整目的和微调（例如，从举起到推动或其他下游任务）。最后，我们表明因果因素表示的知识有助于更复杂任务的零样本学习。访问 https://sites.google.com/usc.edu/causal-curiosity/home 获取网站。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为'因果好奇心'的内在奖励机制，使强化学习代理能够通过自监督实验发现环境中的因果因素，并学习二值量化表示。
AI.motivation: 受动物通过实验学习世界规律的启发，旨在让强化学习代理通过自主实验发现环境因果关系，减少对监督数据的依赖。
AI.method: 设计基于因果好奇心的内在奖励，驱动代理学习最优动作序列并发现因果因素，通过分层推理实现自监督学习。
AI.result: 代理能学习语义行为（如通过举升物体分类重量），数据效率比传统监督规划器高2.5倍，且可迁移至下游任务并辅助零样本学习。

search_text: Causal Curiosity: RL Agents Discovering Self-supervised Experiments for Causal Representation Learning 因果好奇心：强化学习代理发现因果表示学习的自我监督实验 Animals exhibit an innate ability to learn regularities of the world through interaction. By performing experiments in their environment, they are able to discern the causal factors of variation and infer how they affect the world's dynamics. Inspired by this, we attempt to equip reinforcement learning agents with the ability to perform experiments that facilitate a categorization of the rolled-out trajectories, and to subsequently infer the causal factors of the environment in a hierarchical manner. We introduce {\em causal curiosity}, a novel intrinsic reward, and show that it allows our agents to learn optimal sequences of actions and discover causal factors in the dynamics of the environment. The learned behavior allows the agents to infer a binary quantized representation for the ground-truth causal factors in every environment. Additionally, we find that these experimental behaviors are semantically meaningful (e.g., our agents learn to lift blocks to categorize them by weight), and are learnt in a self-supervised manner with approximately 2.5 times less data than conventional supervised planners. We show that these behaviors can be re-purposed and fine-tuned (e.g., from lifting to pushing or other downstream tasks). Finally, we show that the knowledge of causal factor representations aids zero-shot learning for more complex tasks. Visit https://sites.google.com/usc.edu/causal-curiosity/home for website. 动物表现出通过互动来学习世界规律的天生能力。通过在环境中进行实验，他们能够辨别变化的因果因素并推断它们如何影响世界的动态。受此启发，我们尝试使强化学习代理能够执行实验，以促进对推出的轨迹进行分类，并随后以分层方式推断环境的因果因素。我们引入了因果好奇心，这是一种新颖的内在奖励，并表明它允许我们的代理学习最佳的行动序列并发现环境动态中的因果因素。学习到的行为允许代理推断每个环境中真实因果因素的二进制量化表示。此外，我们发现这些实验行为在语义上是有意义的（例如，我们的代理学习举起木块并按重量对它们进行分类），并且以自我监督的方式学习，所需数据比传统监督规划器少大约 2.5 倍。我们证明这些行为可以重新调整目的和微调（例如，从举起到推动或其他下游任务）。最后，我们表明因果因素表示的知识有助于更复杂任务的零样本学习。访问 https://sites.google.com/usc.edu/causal-curiosity/home 获取网站。 本文提出一种名为'因果好奇心'的内在奖励机制，使强化学习代理能够通过自监督实验发现环境中的因果因素，并学习二值量化表示。 Sumedh A. Sontakke,Arash Mehrjou,Laurent Itti,Bernhard Schölkopf cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.RO

authors_text: Pengfei Fang,Pan Ji,Jieming Zhou,Lars Petersson,Mehrtash Harandi
title: Channel Recurrent Attention Networks for Video Pedestrian Retrieval
title_zh: 用于视频行人检索的通道循环注意力网络
abstract: Full attention, which generates an attention value per element of the input feature maps, has been successfully demonstrated to be beneficial in visual tasks. In this work, we propose a fully attentional network, termed {\it channel recurrent attention network}, for the task of video pedestrian retrieval. The main attention unit, \textit{channel recurrent attention}, identifies attention maps at the frame level by jointly leveraging spatial and channel patterns via a recurrent neural network. This channel recurrent attention is designed to build a global receptive field by recurrently receiving and learning the spatial vectors. Then, a \textit{set aggregation} cell is employed to generate a compact video representation. Empirical experimental results demonstrate the superior performance of the proposed deep network, outperforming current state-of-the-art results across standard video person retrieval benchmarks, and a thorough ablation study shows the effectiveness of the proposed units.
summary: Full attention, which generates an attention value per element of the input feature maps, has been successfully demonstrated to be beneficial in visual tasks. In this work, we propose a fully attentional network, termed {\it channel recurrent attention network}, for the task of video pedestrian retrieval. The main attention unit, \textit{channel recurrent attention}, identifies attention maps at the frame level by jointly leveraging spatial and channel patterns via a recurrent neural network. This channel recurrent attention is designed to build a global receptive field by recurrently receiving and learning the spatial vectors. Then, a \textit{set aggregation} cell is employed to generate a compact video representation. Empirical experimental results demonstrate the superior performance of the proposed deep network, outperforming current state-of-the-art results across standard video person retrieval benchmarks, and a thorough ablation study shows the effectiveness of the proposed units.
abstract_zh: 充分注意力，可以为输入特征图的每个元素生成注意力值，已被成功证明在视觉任务中是有益的。在这项工作中，我们提出了一个完全注意力网络，称为“通道循环注意力网络”，用于视频行人检索任务。主要注意力单元，\textit{通道循环注意力}，通过循环神经网络联合利用空间和通道模式来识别帧级别的注意力图。该通道循环注意力旨在通过循环接收和学习空间向量来构建全局感受野。然后，采用 \textit{set Aggregation} 单元来生成紧凑的视频表示。实证实验结果证明了所提出的深度网络的卓越性能，在标准视频人物检索基准上优于当前最先进的结果，并且彻底的消融研究表明了所提出的单元的有效性。

AI.tldr: 提出通道循环注意力网络（CRAN）用于视频行人检索任务，通过结合空间和通道模式提升检索性能。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在视频行人检索中难以有效捕捉时空信息，需更高效的注意力机制提升特征表示。
AI.method: 设计通道循环注意力单元，通过递归神经网络联合建模空间与通道特征，结合集合聚合生成紧凑视频表示。
AI.result: 实验表明CRAN在标准基准上优于现有SOTA方法，消融实验证实了各模块的有效性。
AI.conclusion: CRAN通过有效建模时空特征提升视频行人检索性能，为该领域提供新方法。

title: Structured Logconcave Sampling with a Restricted Gaussian Oracle
title_zh: 使用受限高斯预言的结构化对数凹采样
comment: 58 pages. The results of Section 5 of this paper, as well as an empirical evaluation, appeared earlier as arXiv:2006.05976. This version fixes an error in the proof of Theorem 1, see Section 1.4
comments: 58 pages. The results of Section 5 of this paper, as well as an empirical evaluation, appeared earlier as arXiv:2006.05976. This version fixes an error in the proof of Theorem 1, see Section 1.4
abstract: We give algorithms for sampling several structured logconcave families to high accuracy. We further develop a reduction framework, inspired by proximal point methods in convex optimization, which bootstraps samplers for regularized densities to improve dependences on problem conditioning. A key ingredient in our framework is the notion of a "restricted Gaussian oracle" (RGO) for $g: \mathbb{R}^d \rightarrow \mathbb{R}$, which is a sampler for distributions whose negative log-likelihood sums a quadratic and $g$. By combining our reduction framework with our new samplers, we obtain the following bounds for sampling structured distributions to total variation distance $ε$. For composite densities $\exp(-f(x) - g(x))$, where $f$ has condition number $κ$ and convex (but possibly non-smooth) $g$ admits an RGO, we obtain a mixing time of $O(κd \log^3\frac{κd}ε)$, matching the state-of-the-art non-composite bound; no composite samplers with better mixing than general-purpose logconcave samplers were previously known. For logconcave finite sums $\exp(-F(x))$, where $F(x) = \frac{1}{n}\sum_{i \in [n]} f_i(x)$ has condition number $κ$, we give a sampler querying $\widetilde{O}(n + κ\max(d, \sqrt{nd}))$ gradient oracles to $\{f_i\}_{i \in [n]}$; no high-accuracy samplers with nontrivial gradient query complexity were previously known. For densities with condition number $κ$, we give an algorithm obtaining mixing time $O(κd \log^2\frac{κd}ε)$, improving the prior state-of-the-art by a logarithmic factor with a significantly simpler analysis; we also show a zeroth-order algorithm attains the same query complexity.
summary: We give algorithms for sampling several structured logconcave families to high accuracy. We further develop a reduction framework, inspired by proximal point methods in convex optimization, which bootstraps samplers for regularized densities to improve dependences on problem conditioning. A key ingredient in our framework is the notion of a "restricted Gaussian oracle" (RGO) for $g: \mathbb{R}^d \rightarrow \mathbb{R}$, which is a sampler for distributions whose negative log-likelihood sums a quadratic and $g$. By combining our reduction framework with our new samplers, we obtain the following bounds for sampling structured distributions to total variation distance $ε$. For composite densities $\exp(-f(x) - g(x))$, where $f$ has condition number $κ$ and convex (but possibly non-smooth) $g$ admits an RGO, we obtain a mixing time of $O(κd \log^3\frac{κd}ε)$, matching the state-of-the-art non-composite bound; no composite samplers with better mixing than general-purpose logconcave samplers were previously known. For logconcave finite sums $\exp(-F(x))$, where $F(x) = \frac{1}{n}\sum_{i \in [n]} f_i(x)$ has condition number $κ$, we give a sampler querying $\widetilde{O}(n + κ\max(d, \sqrt{nd}))$ gradient oracles to $\{f_i\}_{i \in [n]}$; no high-accuracy samplers with nontrivial gradient query complexity were previously known. For densities with condition number $κ$, we give an algorithm obtaining mixing time $O(κd \log^2\frac{κd}ε)$, improving the prior state-of-the-art by a logarithmic factor with a significantly simpler analysis; we also show a zeroth-order algorithm attains the same query complexity.
abstract_zh: 我们给出了对几个结构化对数凹面族进行高精度采样的算法。受凸优化中的近点方法的启发，我们进一步开发了一个简化框架，该框架引导采样器获得正则化密度，以改善对问题条件的依赖性。我们框架中的一个关键要素是 $g 的“受限高斯预言”（RGO）的概念： \mathbb{R}^d \rightarrow \mathbb{R}$，它是负对数似然与二次和 $g$ 相加的分布的采样器。通过将我们的缩减框架与新的采样器相结合，我们获得了以下对总变异距离 $ε$ 的结构化分布进行采样的界限。对于复合密度 $\exp(-f(x) - g(x))$，其中 $f$ 具有条件数 $κ$ 且凸（但可能非光滑）$g$ 承认 RGO，我们获得 $O(κd \log^3\frac{κd}ε)$ 的混合时间，与最先进的非复合边界相匹配；此前还没有发现比通用对数凹面采样器具有更好混合效果的复合采样器。对于对数凹有限和 $\exp(-F(x))$，其中 $F(x) = \frac{1}{n}\sum_{i \in [n]} f_i(x)$ 的条件数为 $κ$，我们给出一个采样器，查询 $\widetilde{O}(n + κ\max(d, \sqrt{nd}))$ 到 $\{f_i\}_{i \in [n]}$ 的梯度预言；以前不知道具有非平凡梯度查询复杂性的高精度采样器。对于条件数 $κ$ 的密度，我们给出了一种获得混合时间 $O(κd \log^2\frac{κd}ε)$ 的算法，通过对数因子改进了现有技术，并且分析明显更简单；我们还展示了零阶算法可以达到相同的查询复杂度。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于受限高斯预言机（RGO）的框架，用于高效采样结构化对数凹函数分布，并改进了采样算法的混合时间复杂度。
AI.motivation: 结构化对数凹分布的采样在机器学习和统计学中具有重要应用，但现有方法在处理非光滑正则化项或大规模有限和时存在效率瓶颈，需改进采样复杂度与问题条件数的依赖关系。
AI.method: 设计受限高斯预言机（RGO）作为核心工具，结合近端点方法框架，将正则化密度采样问题分解为更易处理的子问题，并优化梯度查询复杂度以适应有限和场景。
AI.result: 对于复合密度，混合时间达到$O(κd \\log^3(κd/ε))$；对有限和分布，梯度查询复杂度为$\\widetilde{O}(n + κ\\max(d, \\sqrt{nd}))$；并改进了无梯度算法的对数因子。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为结构化对数凹采样提供了高效算法，显著提升了现有方法的理论界，尤其在处理大规模和非光滑问题时具有优势。

tldr: 本文提出了一种基于受限高斯预言机（RGO）的框架，用于高效采样结构化对数凹函数分布，并改进了采样算法的混合时间复杂度。
motivation: 结构化对数凹分布的采样在机器学习和统计学中具有重要应用，但现有方法在处理非光滑正则化项或大规模有限和时存在效率瓶颈，需改进采样复杂度与问题条件数的依赖关系。
method: 设计受限高斯预言机（RGO）作为核心工具，结合近端点方法框架，将正则化密度采样问题分解为更易处理的子问题，并优化梯度查询复杂度以适应有限和场景。
result: 对于复合密度，混合时间达到$O(κd \\log^3(κd/ε))$；对有限和分布，梯度查询复杂度为$\\widetilde{O}(n + κ\\max(d, \\sqrt{nd}))$；并改进了无梯度算法的对数因子。
conclusion: 该框架为结构化对数凹采样提供了高效算法，显著提升了现有方法的理论界，尤其在处理大规模和非光滑问题时具有优势。
search_text: Structured Logconcave Sampling with a Restricted Gaussian Oracle 使用受限高斯预言的结构化对数凹采样 We give algorithms for sampling several structured logconcave families to high accuracy. We further develop a reduction framework, inspired by proximal point methods in convex optimization, which bootstraps samplers for regularized densities to improve dependences on problem conditioning. A key ingredient in our framework is the notion of a "restricted Gaussian oracle" (RGO) for $g: \mathbb{R}^d \rightarrow \mathbb{R}$, which is a sampler for distributions whose negative log-likelihood sums a quadratic and $g$. By combining our reduction framework with our new samplers, we obtain the following bounds for sampling structured distributions to total variation distance $ε$. For composite densities $\exp(-f(x) - g(x))$, where $f$ has condition number $κ$ and convex (but possibly non-smooth) $g$ admits an RGO, we obtain a mixing time of $O(κd \log^3\frac{κd}ε)$, matching the state-of-the-art non-composite bound; no composite samplers with better mixing than general-purpose logconcave samplers were previously known. For logconcave finite sums $\exp(-F(x))$, where $F(x) = \frac{1}{n}\sum_{i \in [n]} f_i(x)$ has condition number $κ$, we give a sampler querying $\widetilde{O}(n + κ\max(d, \sqrt{nd}))$ gradient oracles to $\{f_i\}_{i \in [n]}$; no high-accuracy samplers with nontrivial gradient query complexity were previously known. For densities with condition number $κ$, we give an algorithm obtaining mixing time $O(κd \log^2\frac{κd}ε)$, improving the prior state-of-the-art by a logarithmic factor with a significantly simpler analysis; we also show a zeroth-order algorithm attains the same query complexity. 我们给出了对几个结构化对数凹面族进行高精度采样的算法。受凸优化中的近点方法的启发，我们进一步开发了一个简化框架，该框架引导采样器获得正则化密度，以改善对问题条件的依赖性。我们框架中的一个关键要素是 $g 的“受限高斯预言”（RGO）的概念： \mathbb{R}^d \rightarrow \mathbb{R}$，它是负对数似然与二次和 $g$ 相加的分布的采样器。通过将我们的缩减框架与新的采样器相结合，我们获得了以下对总变异距离 $ε$ 的结构化分布进行采样的界限。对于复合密度 $\exp(-f(x) - g(x))$，其中 $f$ 具有条件数 $κ$ 且凸（但可能非光滑）$g$ 承认 RGO，我们获得 $O(κd \log^3\frac{κd}ε)$ 的混合时间，与最先进的非复合边界相匹配；此前还没有发现比通用对数凹面采样器具有更好混合效果的复合采样器。对于对数凹有限和 $\exp(-F(x))$，其中 $F(x) = \frac{1}{n}\sum_{i \in [n]} f_i(x)$ 的条件数为 $κ$，我们给出一个采样器，查询 $\widetilde{O}(n + κ\max(d, \sqrt{nd}))$ 到 $\{f_i\}_{i \in [n]}$ 的梯度预言；以前不知道具有非平凡梯度查询复杂性的高精度采样器。对于条件数 $κ$ 的密度，我们给出了一种获得混合时间 $O(κd \log^2\frac{κd}ε)$ 的算法，通过对数因子改进了现有技术，并且分析明显更简单；我们还展示了零阶算法可以达到相同的查询复杂度。 本文提出了一种基于受限高斯预言机（RGO）的框架，用于高效采样结构化对数凹函数分布，并改进了采样算法的混合时间复杂度。 Yin Tat Lee,Ruoqi Shen,Kevin Tian cs.DS,cs.LG,math.OC,stat.CO,stat.ML

title: An Improvement of Reed's Treewidth Approximation
title_zh: Reed树宽近似的改进
abstract: We present a new approximation algorithm for the treewidth problem which finds an upper bound on the treewidth and constructs a corresponding tree decomposition as well. Our algorithm is a faster variation of Reed's classical algorithm. For the benefit of the reader, and to be able to compare these two algorithms, we start with a detailed time analysis of Reed's algorithm. We fill in many details that have been omitted in Reed's paper. Computing tree decompositions parameterized by the treewidth $k$ is fixed parameter tractable (FPT), meaning that there are algorithms running in time $\mathcal{O}(f(k) g(n))$ where $f$ is a computable function, and $g(n)$ is polynomial in $n$, where $n$ is the number of vertices. An analysis of Reed's algorithm shows $f(k) = 2^{\mathcal{O}(k \log k)}$ and $g(n) = n \log n$ for a 5-approximation. Reed simply claims time $\mathcal{O}(n \log n)$ for bounded $k$ for his constant factor approximation algorithm, but the bound of $2^{Ω(k \log k)} n \log n$ is well known. From a practical point of view, we notice that the time of Reed's algorithm also contains a term of $\mathcal{O}(k^2 2^{24k} n \log n)$, which for small $k$ is much worse than the asymptotically leading term of $2^{\mathcal{O}(k \log k)} n \log n$. We analyze $f(k)$ more precisely, because the purpose of this paper is to improve the running times for all reasonably small values of $k$. Our algorithm runs in $\mathcal{O}(f(k)n\log{n})$ too, but with a much smaller dependence on $k$. In our case, $f(k) = 2^{\mathcal{O}(k)}$. This algorithm is simple and fast, especially for small values of $k$. We should mention that Bodlaender et al. [2016] have an algorithm with a linear dependence on $n$, and Korhonen [2021] obtains the much better approximation ratio of 2, while the current paper achieves a better dependence on $k$.
summary: We present a new approximation algorithm for the treewidth problem which finds an upper bound on the treewidth and constructs a corresponding tree decomposition as well. Our algorithm is a faster variation of Reed's classical algorithm. For the benefit of the reader, and to be able to compare these two algorithms, we start with a detailed time analysis of Reed's algorithm. We fill in many details that have been omitted in Reed's paper. Computing tree decompositions parameterized by the treewidth $k$ is fixed parameter tractable (FPT), meaning that there are algorithms running in time $\mathcal{O}(f(k) g(n))$ where $f$ is a computable function, and $g(n)$ is polynomial in $n$, where $n$ is the number of vertices. An analysis of Reed's algorithm shows $f(k) = 2^{\mathcal{O}(k \log k)}$ and $g(n) = n \log n$ for a 5-approximation. Reed simply claims time $\mathcal{O}(n \log n)$ for bounded $k$ for his constant factor approximation algorithm, but the bound of $2^{Ω(k \log k)} n \log n$ is well known. From a practical point of view, we notice that the time of Reed's algorithm also contains a term of $\mathcal{O}(k^2 2^{24k} n \log n)$, which for small $k$ is much worse than the asymptotically leading term of $2^{\mathcal{O}(k \log k)} n \log n$. We analyze $f(k)$ more precisely, because the purpose of this paper is to improve the running times for all reasonably small values of $k$. Our algorithm runs in $\mathcal{O}(f(k)n\log{n})$ too, but with a much smaller dependence on $k$. In our case, $f(k) = 2^{\mathcal{O}(k)}$. This algorithm is simple and fast, especially for small values of $k$. We should mention that Bodlaender et al. [2016] have an algorithm with a linear dependence on $n$, and Korhonen [2021] obtains the much better approximation ratio of 2, while the current paper achieves a better dependence on $k$.
abstract_zh: 我们针对树宽问题提出了一种新的近似算法，该算法找到树宽的上限并构造相应的树分解。我们的算法是里德经典算法的更快变体。为了读者的利益，并且能够比较这两种算法，我们首先对 Reed 算法进行详细的时间分析。我们补充了里德论文中省略的许多细节。计算由树宽 $k$ 参数化的树分解是固定参数易处理（FPT），这意味着有算法在 $\mathcal{O}(f(k) g(n))$ 时间内运行，其中 $f$ 是可计算函数，$g(n)$ 是 $n$ 中的多项式，其中 $n$ 是顶点数。对里德算法的分析表明，对于 5 近似，$f(k) = 2^{\mathcal{O}(k \log k)}$ 和 $g(n) = n \log n$ 。里德只是简单地为他的常数因子近似算法声明了有界 $k$ 的时间 $\mathcal{O}(n \log n)$，但 $2^{Ω(k \log k)} n \log n$ 的界限是众所周知的。从实际的角度来看，我们注意到Reed算法的时间还包含一项$\mathcal{O}(k^2 2^{24k} n \log n)$，对于较小的$k$来说，它比渐近领先项$2^{\mathcal{O}(k \log k)} n \log n$差得多。我们更精确地分析 $f(k)$，因为本文的目的是改善所有相当小的 $k$ 值的运行时间。我们的算法也在 $\mathcal{O}(f(k)n\log{n})$ 中运行，但对 $k$ 的依赖要小得多。在我们的例子中，$f(k) = 2^{\mathcal{O}(k)}$。该算法简单且快速，尤其是对于较小的 $k$ 值。我们应该提到 Bodlaender 等人。 [2016]有一个对$n$具有线性依赖性的算法，并且Korhonen[2021]获得了更好的近似比2，而当前的论文实现了对$k$更好的依赖性。

AI.tldr: 提出了一个改进的树宽近似算法，能够更快地计算树宽的上界并构造相应的树分解。
AI.motivation: Reed的经典算法虽然是一个常数因子近似算法，但其时间复杂度对参数k的依赖较大（$2^{\mathcal{O}(k \log k)}$），且实际运行中对于较小的k还有一个$k^2 2^{24k} n \log n$的项，性能较差。本文旨在改进算法对小k值的运行时间。
AI.method: 通过深入分析Reed算法的时间复杂度，优化算法结构，将依赖参数k的指数部分从$2^{\mathcal{O}(k \log k)}$降低到$2^{\mathcal{O}(k)}$，同时保持5-近似比和$O(f(k)n\log n)$的时间复杂度。
AI.result: 新算法的时间复杂度为$O(2^{\mathcal{O}(k)} n \log n)$，相比Reed算法的$2^{\mathcal{O}(k \log k)} n \log n$，对参数k的依赖显著降低，特别适合小k值的场景。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出了一种更快的树宽近似算法，在保持5-近似比的前提下显著降低了时间复杂度中对参数k的依赖，尤其在小k值时性能优于Reed算法。

title: Knowledge-aware Method for Confusing Charge Prediction
title_zh: 混淆电荷预测的知识感知方法
abstract: Automatic charge prediction task aims to determine the final charges based on fact descriptions of criminal cases, which is a vital application of legal assistant systems. Conventional works usually depend on fact descriptions to predict charges while ignoring the legal schematic knowledge, which makes it difficult to distinguish confusing charges. In this paper, we propose a knowledge-attentive neural network model, which introduces legal schematic knowledge about charges and exploit the knowledge hierarchical representation as the discriminative features to differentiate confusing charges. Our model takes the textual fact description as the input and learns fact representation through a graph convolutional network. A legal schematic knowledge transformer is utilized to generate crucial knowledge representations oriented to the legal schematic knowledge at both the schema and charge levels. We apply a knowledge matching network for effectively incorporating charge information into the fact to learn knowledge-aware fact representation. Finally, we use the knowledge-aware fact representation for charge prediction. We create two real-world datasets and experimental results show that our proposed model can outperform other state-of-the-art baselines on accuracy and F1 score, especially on dealing with confusing charges.
summary: Automatic charge prediction task aims to determine the final charges based on fact descriptions of criminal cases, which is a vital application of legal assistant systems. Conventional works usually depend on fact descriptions to predict charges while ignoring the legal schematic knowledge, which makes it difficult to distinguish confusing charges. In this paper, we propose a knowledge-attentive neural network model, which introduces legal schematic knowledge about charges and exploit the knowledge hierarchical representation as the discriminative features to differentiate confusing charges. Our model takes the textual fact description as the input and learns fact representation through a graph convolutional network. A legal schematic knowledge transformer is utilized to generate crucial knowledge representations oriented to the legal schematic knowledge at both the schema and charge levels. We apply a knowledge matching network for effectively incorporating charge information into the fact to learn knowledge-aware fact representation. Finally, we use the knowledge-aware fact representation for charge prediction. We create two real-world datasets and experimental results show that our proposed model can outperform other state-of-the-art baselines on accuracy and F1 score, especially on dealing with confusing charges.
abstract_zh: 自动指控预测任务旨在根据刑事案件的事实描述确定最终指控，是法律助理系统的重要应用。传统著作通常依靠事实描述来预测罪名，而忽略了法律图解知识，导致难以区分令人困惑的罪名。在本文中，我们提出了一种知识关注神经网络模型，该模型引入了有关指控的法律图解知识，并利用知识层次表示作为判别特征来区分令人困惑的指控。我们的模型以文本事实描述作为输入，并通过图卷积网络学习事实表示。法律图表数据转换器用于在模式和费用级别生成面向法律图表数据的关键知识表示。我们应用知识匹配网络来有效地将电荷信息合并到事实中，以学习知识感知的事实表示。最后，我们使用知识感知的事实表示来进行电荷预测。我们创建了两个真实世界的数据集，实验结果表明，我们提出的模型在准确性和 F1 分数方面优于其他最先进的基线，尤其是在处理令人困惑的费用方面。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于法律知识的混淆指控预测方法，通过引入法律知识层次表示来提升自动指控预测的准确性。
AI.motivation: 传统方法仅依赖案件事实描述预测指控，忽视法律知识结构，导致难以区分相似或混淆的指控类型。
AI.method: 构建知识感知神经网络模型，结合图卷积网络处理事实描述，利用法律知识Transformer生成层级知识表示，并通过知识匹配网络融合指控信息。
AI.result: 在两个真实数据集上实验表明，模型在准确率和F1分数上优于现有方法，尤其在处理混淆指控时表现显著提升。
AI.conclusion: 融合法律知识的模型能有效增强指控预测能力，为法律辅助系统提供更精准的决策支持。

search_text: Knowledge-aware Method for Confusing Charge Prediction 混淆电荷预测的知识感知方法 Automatic charge prediction task aims to determine the final charges based on fact descriptions of criminal cases, which is a vital application of legal assistant systems. Conventional works usually depend on fact descriptions to predict charges while ignoring the legal schematic knowledge, which makes it difficult to distinguish confusing charges. In this paper, we propose a knowledge-attentive neural network model, which introduces legal schematic knowledge about charges and exploit the knowledge hierarchical representation as the discriminative features to differentiate confusing charges. Our model takes the textual fact description as the input and learns fact representation through a graph convolutional network. A legal schematic knowledge transformer is utilized to generate crucial knowledge representations oriented to the legal schematic knowledge at both the schema and charge levels. We apply a knowledge matching network for effectively incorporating charge information into the fact to learn knowledge-aware fact representation. Finally, we use the knowledge-aware fact representation for charge prediction. We create two real-world datasets and experimental results show that our proposed model can outperform other state-of-the-art baselines on accuracy and F1 score, especially on dealing with confusing charges. 自动指控预测任务旨在根据刑事案件的事实描述确定最终指控，是法律助理系统的重要应用。传统著作通常依靠事实描述来预测罪名，而忽略了法律图解知识，导致难以区分令人困惑的罪名。在本文中，我们提出了一种知识关注神经网络模型，该模型引入了有关指控的法律图解知识，并利用知识层次表示作为判别特征来区分令人困惑的指控。我们的模型以文本事实描述作为输入，并通过图卷积网络学习事实表示。法律图表数据转换器用于在模式和费用级别生成面向法律图表数据的关键知识表示。我们应用知识匹配网络来有效地将电荷信息合并到事实中，以学习知识感知的事实表示。最后，我们使用知识感知的事实表示来进行电荷预测。我们创建了两个真实世界的数据集，实验结果表明，我们提出的模型在准确性和 F1 分数方面优于其他最先进的基线，尤其是在处理令人困惑的费用方面。 本文提出一种基于法律知识的混淆指控预测方法，通过引入法律知识层次表示来提升自动指控预测的准确性。 Xiya Cheng,Sheng Bi,Guilin Qi,Yongzhen Wang cs.CL,cs.AI

authors_text: Xiaoyu Yang,Feng Nie,Yufei Feng,Quan Liu,Zhigang Chen,Xiaodan Zhu
title: Program Enhanced Fact Verification with Verbalization and Graph Attention Network
title_zh: 通过语言化和图注意网络来增强事实验证
comment: 16 pages (Accepted by EMNLP 2020 as a long paper)
comments: 16 pages (Accepted by EMNLP 2020 as a long paper)
abstract: Performing fact verification based on structured data is important for many real-life applications and is a challenging research problem, particularly when it involves both symbolic operations and informal inference based on language understanding. In this paper, we present a Program-enhanced Verbalization and Graph Attention Network (ProgVGAT) to integrate programs and execution into textual inference models. Specifically, a verbalization with program execution model is proposed to accumulate evidences that are embedded in operations over the tables. Built on that, we construct the graph attention verification networks, which are designed to fuse different sources of evidences from verbalized program execution, program structures, and the original statements and tables, to make the final verification decision. To support the above framework, we propose a program selection module optimized with a new training strategy based on margin loss, to produce more accurate programs, which is shown to be effective in enhancing the final verification results. Experimental results show that the proposed framework achieves the new state-of-the-art performance, a 74.4% accuracy, on the benchmark dataset TABFACT.
summary: Performing fact verification based on structured data is important for many real-life applications and is a challenging research problem, particularly when it involves both symbolic operations and informal inference based on language understanding. In this paper, we present a Program-enhanced Verbalization and Graph Attention Network (ProgVGAT) to integrate programs and execution into textual inference models. Specifically, a verbalization with program execution model is proposed to accumulate evidences that are embedded in operations over the tables. Built on that, we construct the graph attention verification networks, which are designed to fuse different sources of evidences from verbalized program execution, program structures, and the original statements and tables, to make the final verification decision. To support the above framework, we propose a program selection module optimized with a new training strategy based on margin loss, to produce more accurate programs, which is shown to be effective in enhancing the final verification results. Experimental results show that the proposed framework achieves the new state-of-the-art performance, a 74.4% accuracy, on the benchmark dataset TABFACT.
abstract_zh: 基于结构化数据进行事实验证对于许多现实生活中的应用都很重要，并且是一个具有挑战性的研究问题，特别是当它涉及符号运算和基于语言理解的非正式推理时。在本文中，我们提出了一种程序增强的语言化和图注意网络（ProgVGAT），将程序和执行集成到文本推理模型中。具体来说，提出了一种带有程序执行模型的语言表达来积累嵌入在表操作中的证据。在此基础上，我们构建了图注意力验证网络，该网络旨在融合来自语言程序执行、程序结构以及原始语句和表格的不同证据来源，以做出最终的验证决策。为了支持上述框架，我们提出了一个程序选择模块，该模块使用基于边际损失的新训练策略进行了优化，以产生更准确的程序，这被证明可以有效提高最终验证结果。实验结果表明，所提出的框架在基准数据集 TABFACT 上实现了新的最先进性能，即 74.4% 的准确率。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合程序执行与图注意力网络的框架ProgVGAT，用于增强基于结构化数据的事实验证。
AI.motivation: 事实验证需同时处理符号运算与自然语言推理，传统方法难以有效融合程序逻辑与语言信息，亟需新方法提升准确性。
AI.method: 设计程序执行的文本化模块提取表格操作证据，构建图注意力网络融合程序结构、执行结果及原始文本多源信息，并引入基于边距损失的程序选择模块优化程序生成。
AI.result: 在TABFACT基准测试中达到74.4%的准确率，刷新了现有方法的最优性能。
AI.conclusion: 通过程序执行与图注意力机制的深度融合，有效提升了事实验证的准确性，为结构化数据与语言理解的联合建模提供了新思路。

title: Adversarial Patch Attacks on Monocular Depth Estimation Networks
title_zh: 单目深度估计网络的对抗性补丁攻击
comment: Publisher's Open Access PDF with the CC-BY copyright. Associated video, data and programs are available at https://www.fujii.nuee.nagoya-u.ac.jp/Research/MonoDepth/
comments: Publisher's Open Access PDF with the CC-BY copyright. Associated video, data and programs are available at https://www.fujii.nuee.nagoya-u.ac.jp/Research/MonoDepth/
abstract: Thanks to the excellent learning capability of deep convolutional neural networks (CNN), monocular depth estimation using CNNs has achieved great success in recent years. However, depth estimation from a monocular image alone is essentially an ill-posed problem, and thus, it seems that this approach would have inherent vulnerabilities. To reveal this limitation, we propose a method of adversarial patch attack on monocular depth estimation. More specifically, we generate artificial patterns (adversarial patches) that can fool the target methods into estimating an incorrect depth for the regions where the patterns are placed. Our method can be implemented in the real world by physically placing the printed patterns in real scenes. We also analyze the behavior of monocular depth estimation under attacks by visualizing the activation levels of the intermediate layers and the regions potentially affected by the adversarial attack.
summary: Thanks to the excellent learning capability of deep convolutional neural networks (CNN), monocular depth estimation using CNNs has achieved great success in recent years. However, depth estimation from a monocular image alone is essentially an ill-posed problem, and thus, it seems that this approach would have inherent vulnerabilities. To reveal this limitation, we propose a method of adversarial patch attack on monocular depth estimation. More specifically, we generate artificial patterns (adversarial patches) that can fool the target methods into estimating an incorrect depth for the regions where the patterns are placed. Our method can be implemented in the real world by physically placing the printed patterns in real scenes. We also analyze the behavior of monocular depth estimation under attacks by visualizing the activation levels of the intermediate layers and the regions potentially affected by the adversarial attack.
abstract_zh: 得益于深度卷积神经网络（CNN）出色的学习能力，利用CNN的单目深度估计近年来取得了巨大成功。然而，仅从单目图像进行深度估计本质上是一个不适定问题，因此，这种方法似乎存在固有的漏洞。为了揭示这一局限性，我们提出了一种针对单目深度估计的对抗性补丁攻击方法。更具体地说，我们生成人工模式（对抗性补丁），可以欺骗目标方法来估计放置模式的区域的错误深度。我们的方法可以通过将打印的图案物理地放置在真实场景中来在现实世界中实现。我们还通过可视化中间层的激活水平和可能受对抗性攻击影响的区域来分析单目深度估计在攻击下的行为。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种针对单目深度估计网络的对抗补丁攻击方法，通过生成特定图案误导模型输出错误深度估计。
AI.motivation: 单目深度估计存在固有脆弱性，需通过对抗攻击揭示其局限性并验证模型鲁棒性。
AI.method: 生成对抗补丁图案并物理放置于场景中，结合中间层激活可视化分析攻击影响区域。
AI.result: 实验证明对抗补丁可有效误导深度估计，可视化分析揭示了模型对特定区域的敏感性。
AI.conclusion: 单目深度估计网络易受物理对抗攻击，需进一步研究提升其鲁棒性与安全性。

More specifically, we generate artificial patterns (adversarial patches) that can fool the target methods into estimating an incorrect depth for the regions where the patterns are placed. Our method can be implemented in the real world by physically placing the printed patterns in real scenes. We also analyze the behavior of monocular depth estimation under attacks by visualizing the activation levels of the intermediate layers and the regions potentially affected by the adversarial attack. 得益于深度卷积神经网络（CNN）出色的学习能力，利用CNN的单目深度估计近年来取得了巨大成功。然而，仅从单目图像进行深度估计本质上是一个不适定问题，因此，这种方法似乎存在固有的漏洞。为了揭示这一局限性，我们提出了一种针对单目深度估计的对抗性补丁攻击方法。更具体地说，我们生成人工模式（对抗性补丁），可以欺骗目标方法来估计放置模式的区域的错误深度。我们的方法可以通过将打印的图案物理地放置在真实场景中来在现实世界中实现。我们还通过可视化中间层的激活水平和可能受对抗性攻击影响的区域来分析单目深度估计在攻击下的行为。 本文提出一种针对单目深度估计网络的对抗补丁攻击方法，通过生成特定图案误导模型输出错误深度估计。 Koichiro Yamanaka,Ryutaroh Matsumoto,Keita Takahashi,Toshiaki Fujii cs.CV,cs.CR,eess.IV

title: Domain Adaptive Transfer Learning on Visual Attention Aware Data Augmentation for Fine-grained Visual Categorization
title_zh: 用于细粒度视觉分类的视觉注意感知数据增强的领域自适应迁移学习
abstract: Fine-Grained Visual Categorization (FGVC) is a challenging topic in computer vision. It is a problem characterized by large intra-class differences and subtle inter-class differences. In this paper, we tackle this problem in a weakly supervised manner, where neural network models are getting fed with additional data using a data augmentation technique through a visual attention mechanism. We perform domain adaptive knowledge transfer via fine-tuning on our base network model. We perform our experiment on six challenging and commonly used FGVC datasets, and we show competitive improvement on accuracies by using attention-aware data augmentation techniques with features derived from deep learning model InceptionV3, pre-trained on large scale datasets. Our method outperforms competitor methods on multiple FGVC datasets and showed competitive results on other datasets. Experimental studies show that transfer learning from large scale datasets can be utilized effectively with visual attention based data augmentation, which can obtain state-of-the-art results on several FGVC datasets. We present a comprehensive analysis of our experiments. Our method achieves state-of-the-art results in multiple fine-grained classification datasets including challenging CUB200-2011 bird, Flowers-102, and FGVC-Aircrafts datasets.
summary: Fine-Grained Visual Categorization (FGVC) is a challenging topic in computer vision. It is a problem characterized by large intra-class differences and subtle inter-class differences. In this paper, we tackle this problem in a weakly supervised manner, where neural network models are getting fed with additional data using a data augmentation technique through a visual attention mechanism. We perform domain adaptive knowledge transfer via fine-tuning on our base network model. We perform our experiment on six challenging and commonly used FGVC datasets, and we show competitive improvement on accuracies by using attention-aware data augmentation techniques with features derived from deep learning model InceptionV3, pre-trained on large scale datasets. Our method outperforms competitor methods on multiple FGVC datasets and showed competitive results on other datasets. Experimental studies show that transfer learning from large scale datasets can be utilized effectively with visual attention based data augmentation, which can obtain state-of-the-art results on several FGVC datasets. We present a comprehensive analysis of our experiments. Our method achieves state-of-the-art results in multiple fine-grained classification datasets including challenging CUB200-2011 bird, Flowers-102, and FGVC-Aircrafts datasets.
abstract_zh: 细粒度视觉分类（FGVC）是计算机视觉中的一个具有挑战性的主题。这是一个类内差异大、类间差异细微的问题。在本文中，我们以弱监督的方式解决这个问题，其中神经网络模型通过视觉注意机制使用数据增强技术获得额外的数据。我们通过对基础网络模型进行微调来执行领域自适应知识转移。我们在六个具有挑战性和常用的 FGVC 数据集上进行了实验，通过使用注意力感知数据增强技术以及源自深度学习模型 InceptionV3 的特征（在大规模数据集上进行预训练），我们在准确性方面表现出有竞争力的改进。我们的方法在多个 FGVC 数据集上优于竞争对手的方法，并在其他数据集上显示出有竞争力的结果。实验研究表明，大规模数据集的迁移学习可以通过基于视觉注意的数据增强得到有效利用，从而可以在多个 FGVC 数据集上获得最先进的结果。我们对我们的实验进行了全面的分析。我们的方法在多个细粒度分类数据集（包括具有挑战性的 CUB200-2011 鸟类、Flowers-102 和 FGVC-Aircrafts 数据集）中取得了最先进的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合视觉注意力机制的数据增强与领域自适应迁移学习方法，用于解决细粒度视觉分类（FGVC）中的挑战性问题。
AI.motivation: 细粒度视觉分类存在类内差异大、类间差异细微的难题，传统方法难以有效利用数据增强和迁移学习提升性能。
AI.method: 基于InceptionV3预训练模型，通过视觉注意力机制生成关注区域的数据增强样本，并结合领域自适应微调策略进行知识迁移。
AI.result: 在CUB200-2011、Flowers-102等六个FGVC数据集上取得优于现有方法的准确率，达到当时最先进的性能水平。
AI.conclusion: 视觉注意力驱动的数据增强与迁移学习结合能有效提升FGVC性能，为跨领域细粒度分类提供新思路。

title: RoFT: A Tool for Evaluating Human Detection of Machine-Generated Text
title_zh: RoFT：评估人类对机器生成文本的检测的工具
comment: To be published in Annual Conference on Empirical Methods in Natural Language Processing (EMNLP 2020)
comments: To be published in Annual Conference on Empirical Methods in Natural Language Processing (EMNLP 2020)
abstract: In recent years, large neural networks for natural language generation (NLG) have made leaps and bounds in their ability to generate fluent text. However, the tasks of evaluating quality differences between NLG systems and understanding how humans perceive the generated text remain both crucial and difficult. In this system demonstration, we present Real or Fake Text (RoFT), a website that tackles both of these challenges by inviting users to try their hand at detecting machine-generated text in a variety of domains. We introduce a novel evaluation task based on detecting the boundary at which a text passage that starts off human-written transitions to being machine-generated. We show preliminary results of using RoFT to evaluate detection of machine-generated news articles.
summary: In recent years, large neural networks for natural language generation (NLG) have made leaps and bounds in their ability to generate fluent text. However, the tasks of evaluating quality differences between NLG systems and understanding how humans perceive the generated text remain both crucial and difficult. In this system demonstration, we present Real or Fake Text (RoFT), a website that tackles both of these challenges by inviting users to try their hand at detecting machine-generated text in a variety of domains. We introduce a novel evaluation task based on detecting the boundary at which a text passage that starts off human-written transitions to being machine-generated. We show preliminary results of using RoFT to evaluate detection of machine-generated news articles.
abstract_zh: 近年来，用于自然语言生成（NLG）的大型神经网络在生成流畅文本的能力方面取得了突飞猛进的发展。然而，评估 NLG 系统之间的质量差异以及理解人类如何感知生成的文本的任务仍然至关重要且困难。在此系统演示中，我们展示了 Real or Fake Text (RoFT)，该网站通过邀请用户尝试检测各个领域中机器生成的文本来解决这两个挑战。我们引入了一种新颖的评估任务，该任务基于检测从人类编写的文本段落开始过渡到机器生成的边界。我们展示了使用 RoFT 评估机器生成新闻文章检测的初步结果。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍RoFT工具，通过让用户检测机器生成文本的边界，评估人类对生成文本的识别能力。
AI.motivation: 尽管机器生成文本技术进步，但评估其质量差异及人类感知仍具挑战，需新方法解决。
AI.method: 开发RoFT网站，设计检测文本从人类撰写过渡到机器生成边界的任务，通过用户参与进行评估。
AI.result: 初步结果显示RoFT能有效评估用户对机器生成新闻文章的检测能力。
AI.conclusion: RoFT为研究人类识别机器生成文本的能力提供了新工具，未来需进一步验证其广泛应用性。

authors_text: Gongbo Liang,Connor Greenwell,Yu Zhang,Xiaoqin Wang,Ramakanth Kavuluru,Nathan Jacobs
title: Contrastive Cross-Modal Pre-Training: A General Strategy for Small Sample Medical Imaging
title_zh: 对比跨模态预训练：小样本医学成像的通用策略
comment: This work is accepted to the IEEE Journal of Biomedical and Health Informatics
comments: This work is accepted to the IEEE Journal of Biomedical and Health Informatics
abstract: A key challenge in training neural networks for a given medical imaging task is often the difficulty of obtaining a sufficient number of manually labeled examples. In contrast, textual imaging reports, which are often readily available in medical records, contain rich but unstructured interpretations written by experts as part of standard clinical practice. We propose using these textual reports as a form of weak supervision to improve the image interpretation performance of a neural network without requiring additional manually labeled examples. We use an image-text matching task to train a feature extractor and then fine-tune it in a transfer learning setting for a supervised task using a small labeled dataset. The end result is a neural network that automatically interprets imagery without requiring textual reports during inference. This approach can be applied to any task for which text-image pairs are readily available. We evaluate our method on three classification tasks and find consistent performance improvements, reducing the need for labeled data by 67%-98%.
summary: A key challenge in training neural networks for a given medical imaging task is often the difficulty of obtaining a sufficient number of manually labeled examples. In contrast, textual imaging reports, which are often readily available in medical records, contain rich but unstructured interpretations written by experts as part of standard clinical practice. We propose using these textual reports as a form of weak supervision to improve the image interpretation performance of a neural network without requiring additional manually labeled examples. We use an image-text matching task to train a feature extractor and then fine-tune it in a transfer learning setting for a supervised task using a small labeled dataset. The end result is a neural network that automatically interprets imagery without requiring textual reports during inference. This approach can be applied to any task for which text-image pairs are readily available. We evaluate our method on three classification tasks and find consistent performance improvements, reducing the need for labeled data by 67%-98%.
abstract_zh: 针对给定医学成像任务训练神经网络的一个关键挑战通常是难以获得足够数量的手动标记示例。相比之下，文本成像报告通常在病历中很容易获得，包含专家撰写的丰富但非结构化的解释，作为标准临床实践的一部分。我们建议使用这些文本报告作为弱监督的一种形式，以提高神经网络的图像解释性能，而无需额外的手动标记示例。我们使用图像文本匹配任务来训练特征提取器，然后使用小型标记数据集在监督任务的迁移学习设置中对其进行微调。最终结果是一个神经网络，可以在推理过程中自动解释图像，而不需要文本报告。这种方法可以应用于任何容易获得文本-图像对的任务。我们在三个分类任务上评估我们的方法，并发现一致的性能改进，将标记数据的需求减少了 67%-98%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种利用医学影像报告中的文本作为弱监督信号，通过对比跨模态预训练策略，在小样本情况下提升医疗影像模型性能的方法。
AI.motivation: 医疗影像任务面临标注数据不足的挑战，而临床记录中存在大量未结构化的文本报告，可作为潜在的弱监督信号。
AI.method: 通过图像-文本匹配任务预训练特征提取器，再结合小规模标注数据进行迁移学习，最终实现无需文本报告的影像自动解读。
AI.result: 在三个分类任务中实现性能提升，标注数据需求减少67%-98%。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为文本-图像配对任务提供通用解决方案，显著降低医疗影像分析对标注数据的依赖。
