search_text: Contrastive Cross-Modal Pre-Training: A General Strategy for Small Sample Medical Imaging 对比跨模态预训练：小样本医学成像的通用策略 A key challenge in training neural networks for a given medical imaging task is often the difficulty of obtaining a sufficient number of manually labeled examples. In contrast, textual imaging reports, which are often readily available in medical records, contain rich but unstructured interpretations written by experts as part of standard clinical practice. We propose using these textual reports as a form of weak supervision to improve the image interpretation performance of a neural network without requiring additional manually labeled examples. We use an image-text matching task to train a feature extractor and then fine-tune it in a transfer learning setting for a supervised task using a small labeled dataset. The end result is a neural network that automatically interprets imagery without requiring textual reports during inference. This approach can be applied to any task for which text-image pairs are readily available. We evaluate our method on three classification tasks and find consistent performance improvements, reducing the need for labeled data by 67%-98%. 针对给定医学成像任务训练神经网络的一个关键挑战通常是难以获得足够数量的手动标记示例。相比之下，文本成像报告通常在病历中很容易获得，包含专家撰写的丰富但非结构化的解释，作为标准临床实践的一部分。我们建议使用这些文本报告作为弱监督的一种形式，以提高神经网络的图像解释性能，而无需额外的手动标记示例。我们使用图像文本匹配任务来训练特征提取器，然后使用小型标记数据集在监督任务的迁移学习设置中对其进行微调。最终结果是一个神经网络，可以在推理过程中自动解释图像，而不需要文本报告。这种方法可以应用于任何容易获得文本-图像对的任务。我们在三个分类任务上评估我们的方法，并发现一致的性能改进，将标记数据的需求减少了 67%-98%。 本文提出一种利用医学影像报告中的文本作为弱监督信号，通过对比跨模态预训练策略，在小样本情况下提升医疗影像模型性能的方法。 Gongbo Liang,Connor Greenwell,Yu Zhang,Xiaoqin Wang,Ramakanth Kavuluru,Nathan Jacobs cs.LG,cs.CL,cs.CV,eess.IV

authors_text: Sara Hooker,Nyalleng Moorosi,Gregory Clark,Samy Bengio,Emily Denton
title: Characterising Bias in Compressed Models
title_zh: 表征压缩模型中的偏差
abstract: The popularity and widespread use of pruning and quantization is driven by the severe resource constraints of deploying deep neural networks to environments with strict latency, memory and energy requirements. These techniques achieve high levels of compression with negligible impact on top-line metrics (top-1 and top-5 accuracy). However, overall accuracy hides disproportionately high errors on a small subset of examples; we call this subset Compression Identified Exemplars (CIE). We further establish that for CIE examples, compression amplifies existing algorithmic bias. Pruning disproportionately impacts performance on underrepresented features, which often coincides with considerations of fairness. Given that CIE is a relatively small subset but a great contributor of error in the model, we propose its use as a human-in-the-loop auditing tool to surface a tractable subset of the dataset for further inspection or annotation by a domain expert. We provide qualitative and quantitative support that CIE surfaces the most challenging examples in the data distribution for human-in-the-loop auditing.
summary: The popularity and widespread use of pruning and quantization is driven by the severe resource constraints of deploying deep neural networks to environments with strict latency, memory and energy requirements. These techniques achieve high levels of compression with negligible impact on top-line metrics (top-1 and top-5 accuracy). However, overall accuracy hides disproportionately high errors on a small subset of examples; we call this subset Compression Identified Exemplars (CIE). We further establish that for CIE examples, compression amplifies existing algorithmic bias. Pruning disproportionately impacts performance on underrepresented features, which often coincides with considerations of fairness. Given that CIE is a relatively small subset but a great contributor of error in the model, we propose its use as a human-in-the-loop auditing tool to surface a tractable subset of the dataset for further inspection or annotation by a domain expert. We provide qualitative and quantitative support that CIE surfaces the most challenging examples in the data distribution for human-in-the-loop auditing.
abstract_zh: 剪枝和量化的流行和广泛使用是由将深度神经网络部署到具有严格延迟、内存和能源要求的环境中的严格资源限制推动的。这些技术实现了高水平的压缩，对顶线指标（top-1 和 top-5 准确度）的影响可以忽略不计。然而，整体准确性隐藏了一小部分示例中不成比例的高错误；我们将此子集称为压缩识别示例 (CIE)。我们进一步证明，对于 CIE 示例，压缩放大了现有的算法偏差。修剪会对代表性不足的特征的性能产生不成比例的影响，这通常与公平性的考虑相一致。鉴于 CIE 是一个相对较小的子集，但在模型中产生很大的错误，我们建议将其用作人机循环审核工具，以显示数据集的易于处理的子集，以供领域专家进一步检查或注释。我们提供定性和定量支持，帮助 CIE 展示数据分布中最具挑战性的示例，以进行人机交互审核。

AI.tldr: 分析压缩模型中的偏差，并提出CIE作为人类参与的审计工具。
AI.motivation: 压缩模型在资源受限环境下广泛应用，但可能放大算法偏差，影响公平性，需检测并解决这一问题。
AI.method: 通过分析压缩模型的错误分布，识别出CIE子集，并作为人工审计的工具。
AI.result: CIE能有效识别数据分布中最具挑战性的例子，帮助人工审计发现模型偏差。
AI.conclusion: CIE作为审计工具能有效揭示压缩模型中的偏差，为公平性和模型评估提供新方法。

title: Sequential Changepoint Detection in Neural Networks with Checkpoints
title_zh: 具有检查点的神经网络中的顺序变化点检测
abstract: We introduce a framework for online changepoint detection and simultaneous model learning which is applicable to highly parametrized models, such as deep neural networks. It is based on detecting changepoints across time by sequentially performing generalized likelihood ratio tests that require only evaluations of simple prediction score functions. This procedure makes use of checkpoints, consisting of early versions of the actual model parameters, that allow to detect distributional changes by performing predictions on future data. We define an algorithm that bounds the Type I error in the sequential testing procedure. We demonstrate the efficiency of our method in challenging continual learning applications with unknown task changepoints, and show improved performance compared to online Bayesian changepoint detection.
summary: We introduce a framework for online changepoint detection and simultaneous model learning which is applicable to highly parametrized models, such as deep neural networks. It is based on detecting changepoints across time by sequentially performing generalized likelihood ratio tests that require only evaluations of simple prediction score functions. This procedure makes use of checkpoints, consisting of early versions of the actual model parameters, that allow to detect distributional changes by performing predictions on future data. We define an algorithm that bounds the Type I error in the sequential testing procedure. We demonstrate the efficiency of our method in challenging continual learning applications with unknown task changepoints, and show improved performance compared to online Bayesian changepoint detection.
abstract_zh: 我们引入了一个在线变化点检测和同步模型学习的框架，该框架适用于高度参数化的模型，例如深度神经网络。它基于通过顺序执行广义似然比测试来检测随时间变化的点，该测试仅需要评估简单的预测得分函数。此过程利用由实际模型参数的早期版本组成的检查点，允许通过对未来数据执行预测来检测分布变化。我们定义了一种算法来限制顺序测试过程中的 I 类错误。我们展示了我们的方法在挑战具有未知任务变化点的持续学习应用程序时的效率，并且与在线贝叶斯变化点检测相比表现出改进的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种适用于深度神经网络的在线变点检测框架，通过检查点和广义似然比检验实现模型学习与分布变化检测。
AI.motivation: 传统方法难以有效处理高度参数化模型的在线学习与分布变化检测，需设计高效且误差可控的变点检测机制。
AI.method: 基于广义似然比检验，利用模型检查点进行未来数据预测，结合算法控制第一类错误，实现变点检测与模型更新的协同。
AI.result: 在未知任务变点的持续学习场景中，该方法较在线贝叶斯检测展现出更优性能，有效提升模型适应能力。
AI.conclusion: 提出的框架为复杂模型的在线学习提供了可靠变点检测方案，在控制错误率的同时优化了模型更新效率。

title: Psychophysiological responses to takeover requests in conditionally automated driving
title_zh: 有条件自动驾驶中对接管请求的心理生理反应
abstract: In SAE Level 3 automated driving, taking over control from automation raises significant safety concerns because drivers out of the vehicle control loop have difficulty negotiating takeover transitions. Existing studies on takeover transitions have focused on drivers' behavioral responses to takeover requests (TORs). As a complement, this exploratory study aimed to examine drivers' psychophysiological responses to TORs as a result of varying non-driving-related tasks (NDRTs), traffic density and TOR lead time. A total number of 102 drivers were recruited and each of them experienced 8 takeover events in a high fidelity fixed-base driving simulator. Drivers' gaze behaviors, heart rate (HR) activities, galvanic skin responses (GSRs), and facial expressions were recorded and analyzed during two stages. First, during the automated driving stage, we found that drivers had lower heart rate variability, narrower horizontal gaze dispersion, and shorter eyes-on-road time when they had a high level of cognitive load relative to a low level of cognitive load. Second, during the takeover transition stage, 4s lead time led to inhibited blink numbers and larger maximum and mean GSR phasic activation compared to 7s lead time, whilst heavy traffic density resulted in increased HR acceleration patterns than light traffic density. Our results showed that psychophysiological measures can indicate specific internal states of drivers, including their workload, emotions, attention, and situation awareness in a continuous, non-invasive and real-time manner. The findings provide additional support for the value of using psychophysiological measures in automated driving and for future applications in driver monitoring systems and adaptive alert systems.
summary: In SAE Level 3 automated driving, taking over control from automation raises significant safety concerns because drivers out of the vehicle control loop have difficulty negotiating takeover transitions. Existing studies on takeover transitions have focused on drivers' behavioral responses to takeover requests (TORs). As a complement, this exploratory study aimed to examine drivers' psychophysiological responses to TORs as a result of varying non-driving-related tasks (NDRTs), traffic density and TOR lead time. A total number of 102 drivers were recruited and each of them experienced 8 takeover events in a high fidelity fixed-base driving simulator. Drivers' gaze behaviors, heart rate (HR) activities, galvanic skin responses (GSRs), and facial expressions were recorded and analyzed during two stages. First, during the automated driving stage, we found that drivers had lower heart rate variability, narrower horizontal gaze dispersion, and shorter eyes-on-road time when they had a high level of cognitive load relative to a low level of cognitive load. Second, during the takeover transition stage, 4s lead time led to inhibited blink numbers and larger maximum and mean GSR phasic activation compared to 7s lead time, whilst heavy traffic density resulted in increased HR acceleration patterns than light traffic density. Our results showed that psychophysiological measures can indicate specific internal states of drivers, including their workload, emotions, attention, and situation awareness in a continuous, non-invasive and real-time manner. The findings provide additional support for the value of using psychophysiological measures in automated driving and for future applications in driver monitoring systems and adaptive alert systems.
abstract_zh: 在 SAE 3 级自动驾驶中，从自动化接管控制会引发重大安全问题，因为车辆控制环路之外的驾驶员很难协商接管过渡。现有关于接管过渡的研究主要集中在驾驶员对接管请求 (TOR) 的行为反应。作为补充，这项探索性研究旨在检查驾驶员因不同的非驾驶相关任务 (NDRT)、交通密度和 TOR 提前时间而对 TOR 的心理生理反应。共招募102名驾驶员，每人在高保真固定基地驾驶模拟器中经历8次接管事件。在两个阶段记录和分析驾驶员的注视行为、心率（HR）活动、皮肤电反应（GSR）和面部表情。首先，在自动驾驶阶段，我们发现，相对于认知负荷较低的驾驶员，认知负荷较高的驾驶员心率变异性较低、水平注视分散较窄、注视道路时间较短。其次，在接管过渡阶段，与 7 秒提前时间相比，4 秒提前时间会导致眨眼次数受到抑制，并且最大和平均 GSR 阶段性激活更大，而高交通密度导致 HR 加速模式比低交通密度增加。我们的结果表明，心理生理学测量可以以连续、非侵入性和实时的方式指示驾驶员的特定内部状态，包括他们的工作量、情绪、注意力和情境意识。研究结果为自动驾驶中使用心理生理学测量的价值以及驾驶员监控系统和自适应警报系统的未来应用提供了额外的支持。

AI.tldr: 该论文研究了在SAE Level 3自动驾驶中，驾驶员在不同条件下对接管请求（TORs）的心理生理反应。
AI.motivation: 现有研究主要关注驾驶员对TORs的行为反应，而缺乏对其心理生理状态的探讨。本文旨在通过非侵入式生理指标补充现有研究，以提升自动驾驶系统的安全性和监控能力。
AI.method: 招募102名驾驶员，在高保真驾驶模拟器中经历8次接管事件，记录其眼动、心率、皮肤电反应和面部表情数据，分析不同认知负荷、交通密度及TOR提前时间的影响。
AI.result: 高认知负荷下驾驶员心率变异性降低、注视范围变窄；4秒提前时间导致眨眼次数减少且皮肤电反应增强；高交通密度下心率加速模式更显著。心理生理指标可实时反映驾驶员的工作负荷、情绪和注意力状态。
AI.conclusion: 心理生理指标能有效监测驾驶员内部状态，为自动驾驶中的驾驶员监控系统和自适应警报系统提供理论支持。

search_text: Psychophysiological responses to takeover requests in conditionally automated driving 有条件自动驾驶中对接管请求的心理生理反应 In SAE Level 3 automated driving, taking over control from automation raises significant safety concerns because drivers out of the vehicle control loop have difficulty negotiating takeover transitions. Existing studies on takeover transitions have focused on drivers' behavioral responses to takeover requests (TORs). As a complement, this exploratory study aimed to examine drivers' psychophysiological responses to TORs as a result of varying non-driving-related tasks (NDRTs), traffic density and TOR lead time. A total number of 102 drivers were recruited and each of them experienced 8 takeover events in a high fidelity fixed-base driving simulator. Drivers' gaze behaviors, heart rate (HR) activities, galvanic skin responses (GSRs), and facial expressions were recorded and analyzed during two stages. First, during the automated driving stage, we found that drivers had lower heart rate variability, narrower horizontal gaze dispersion, and shorter eyes-on-road time when they had a high level of cognitive load relative to a low level of cognitive load. Second, during the takeover transition stage, 4s lead time led to inhibited blink numbers and larger maximum and mean GSR phasic activation compared to 7s lead time, whilst heavy traffic density resulted in increased HR acceleration patterns than light traffic density. Our results showed that psychophysiological measures can indicate specific internal states of drivers, including their workload, emotions, attention, and situation awareness in a continuous, non-invasive and real-time manner. The findings provide additional support for the value of using psychophysiological measures in automated driving and for future applications in driver monitoring systems and adaptive alert systems. 在 SAE 3 级自动驾驶中，从自动化接管控制会引发重大安全问题，因为车辆控制环路之外的驾驶员很难协商接管过渡。现有关于接管过渡的研究主要集中在驾驶员对接管请求 (TOR) 的行为反应。作为补充，这项探索性研究旨在检查驾驶员因不同的非驾驶相关任务 (NDRT)、交通密度和 TOR 提前时间而对 TOR 的心理生理反应。共招募102名驾驶员，每人在高保真固定基地驾驶模拟器中经历8次接管事件。在两个阶段记录和分析驾驶员的注视行为、心率（HR）活动、皮肤电反应（GSR）和面部表情。首先，在自动驾驶阶段，我们发现，相对于认知负荷较低的驾驶员，认知负荷较高的驾驶员心率变异性较低、水平注视分散较窄、注视道路时间较短。其次，在接管过渡阶段，与 7 秒提前时间相比，4 秒提前时间会导致眨眼次数受到抑制，并且最大和平均 GSR 阶段性激活更大，而高交通密度导致 HR 加速模式比低交通密度增加。我们的结果表明，心理生理学测量可以以连续、非侵入性和实时的方式指示驾驶员的特定内部状态，包括他们的工作量、情绪、注意力和情境意识。研究结果为自动驾驶中使用心理生理学测量的价值以及驾驶员监控系统和自适应警报系统的未来应用提供了额外的支持。 该论文研究了在SAE Level 3自动驾驶中，驾驶员在不同条件下对接管请求（TORs）的心理生理反应。 Na Du,X. title: Emotional Design
title_zh: 情感化设计
abstract: Emotional design has been well recognized in the domain of human factors and ergonomics. In this chapter, we reviewed related models and methods of emotional design. We are motivated to encourage emotional designers to take multiple perspectives when examining these models and methods. Then we proposed a systematic process for emotional design, including affective-cognitive needs elicitation, affective-cognitive needs analysis, and affective-cognitive needs fulfillment to support emotional design. Within each step, we provided an updated review of the representative methods to support and offer further guidance on emotional design. We hope researchers and industrial practitioners can take a systematic approach to consider each step in the framework with care. Finally, the speculations on the challenges and future directions can potentially help researchers across different fields to further advance emotional design.
summary: Emotional design has been well recognized in the domain of human factors and ergonomics. In this chapter, we reviewed related models and methods of emotional design. We are motivated to encourage emotional designers to take multiple perspectives when examining these models and methods. Then we proposed a systematic process for emotional design, including affective-cognitive needs elicitation, affective-cognitive needs analysis, and affective-cognitive needs fulfillment to support emotional design. Within each step, we provided an updated review of the representative methods to support and offer further guidance on emotional design. We hope researchers and industrial practitioners can take a systematic approach to consider each step in the framework with care. Finally, the speculations on the challenges and future directions can potentially help researchers across different fields to further advance emotional design.
abstract_zh: 情感设计在人为因素和人体工程学领域得到了广泛认可。本章我们回顾了情感设计的相关模型和方法。我们有动力鼓励情感设计师在检查这些模型和方法时采取多种视角。然后，我们提出了情感设计的系统流程，包括情感认知需求启发、情感认知需求分析和情感认知需求满足来支持情感设计。在每个步骤中，我们都提供了对代表性方法的更新审查，以支持情感设计并提供进一步的指导。我们希望研究人员和行业从业者能够采取系统的方法来仔细考虑框架中的每一步。最后，对挑战和未来方向的推测可以帮助不同领域的研究人员进一步推进情感设计。

AI.tldr: 提出情感设计的系统化流程，涵盖需求激发、分析与满足，以指导设计师和研究者。
AI.motivation: 鼓励设计师从多角度审视情感设计模型与方法，推动系统化设计流程的应用。
AI.method: 通过回顾现有模型与方法，提出包含需求激发、分析与满足的三步骤系统化流程，并提供各阶段的方法综述。
AI.result: 为研究者与工业界提供系统化情感设计框架的指导，并探讨未来挑战与发展方向。
AI.conclusion: 呼吁跨领域研究者协同推进情感设计的理论与实践发展。

authors_text: Diganta Misra,Trikay Nalamada,Ajay Uppili Arasanipalai,Qibin Hou
title: Rotate to Attend: Convolutional Triplet Attention Module
title_zh: 旋转参与：卷积三元组注意力模块
abstract: Benefiting from the capability of building inter-dependencies among channels or spatial locations, attention mechanisms have been extensively studied and broadly used in a variety of computer vision tasks recently. In this paper, we investigate light-weight but effective attention mechanisms and present triplet attention, a novel method for computing attention weights by capturing cross-dimension interaction using a three-branch structure. For an input tensor, triplet attention builds inter-dimensional dependencies by the rotation operation followed by residual transformations and encodes inter-channel and spatial information with negligible computational overhead. Our method is simple as well as efficient and can be easily plugged into classic backbone networks as an add-on module. We demonstrate the effectiveness of our method on various challenging tasks including image classification on ImageNet-1k and object detection on MSCOCO and PASCAL VOC datasets. Furthermore, we provide extensive in-sight into the performance of triplet attention by visually inspecting the GradCAM and GradCAM++ results. The empirical evaluation of our method supports our intuition on the importance of capturing dependencies across dimensions when computing attention weights. Code for this paper can be publicly accessed at https://github.com/LandskapeAI/triplet-attention
summary: Benefiting from the capability of building inter-dependencies among channels or spatial locations, attention mechanisms have been extensively studied and broadly used in a variety of computer vision tasks recently. In this paper, we investigate light-weight but effective attention mechanisms and present triplet attention, a novel method for computing attention weights by capturing cross-dimension interaction using a three-branch structure. For an input tensor, triplet attention builds inter-dimensional dependencies by the rotation operation followed by residual transformations and encodes inter-channel and spatial information with negligible computational overhead. Our method is simple as well as efficient and can be easily plugged into classic backbone networks as an add-on module. We demonstrate the effectiveness of our method on various challenging tasks including image classification on ImageNet-1k and object detection on MSCOCO and PASCAL VOC datasets. Furthermore, we provide extensive in-sight into the performance of triplet attention by visually inspecting the GradCAM and GradCAM++ results. The empirical evaluation of our method supports our intuition on the importance of capturing dependencies across dimensions when computing attention weights. Code for this paper can be publicly accessed at https://github.com/LandskapeAI/triplet-attention
abstract_zh: 受益于在通道或空间位置之间建立相互依赖性的能力，注意力机制最近已被广泛研究并广泛应用于各种计算机视觉任务中。在本文中，我们研究了轻量级但有效的注意力机制，并提出了三元组注意力，这是一种通过使用三分支结构捕获跨维度交互来计算注意力权重的新方法。对于输入张量，三元组注意力通过旋转操作和残差变换构建维度间依赖关系，并以可忽略的计算开销对通道间和空间信息进行编码。我们的方法既简单又高效，可以作为附加模块轻松插入经典骨干网络。我们证明了我们的方法在各种具有挑战性的任务上的有效性，包括 ImageNet-1k 上的图像分类以及 MSCOCO 和 PASCAL VOC 数据集上的对象检测。此外，我们通过目视检查 GradCAM 和 GradCAM++ 结果，对三重注意力的表现提供了广泛的见解。对我们方法的实证评估支持了我们的直觉，即在计算注意力权重时捕获跨维度依赖性的重要性。本文的代码可以在 https://github.com/LandskapeAI/triplet-attention 公开访问

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种轻量级的三元组注意力模块，通过旋转操作和残差变换捕捉跨维度交互，提升计算机视觉任务性能。
AI.motivation: 尽管注意力机制已广泛应用，但现有方法在跨通道和空间维度的依赖建模上仍有改进空间，需更高效且有效的机制。
AI.method: 设计三元组注意力模块，利用旋转操作构建跨维度依赖，结合残差变换编码通道与空间信息，以极低计算成本实现。
AI.result: 在ImageNet-1k分类及MSCOCO/PASCAL VOC检测任务中验证有效性，GradCAM可视化分析进一步证明跨维度依赖的重要性。
AI.conclusion: 三元组注意力模块可作为轻量插件提升主流网络性能，实验证实跨维度依赖建模对注意力权重计算的关键作用。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种轻量级的三元组注意力模块，通过旋转操作和残差变换捕捉跨维度交互，提升计算机视觉任务性能。
ai_content.motivation: 尽管注意力机制已广泛应用，但现有方法在跨通道和空间维度的依赖建模上仍有改进空间，需更高效且有效的机制。
ai_content.method: 设计三元组注意力模块，利用旋转操作构建跨维度依赖，结合残差变换编码通道与空间信息，以极低计算成本实现。

search_text: Rotate to Attend: Convolutional Triplet Attention Module 旋转参与：卷积三元组注意力模块 Benefiting from the capability of building inter-dependencies among channels or spatial locations, attention mechanisms have been extensively studied and broadly used in a variety of computer vision tasks recently. In this paper, we investigate light-weight but effective attention mechanisms and present triplet attention, a novel method for computing attention weights by capturing cross-dimension interaction using a three-branch structure. For an input tensor, triplet attention builds inter-dimensional dependencies by the rotation operation followed by residual transformations and encodes inter-channel and spatial information with negligible computational overhead. Our method is simple as well as efficient and can be easily plugged into classic backbone networks as an add-on module. We demonstrate the effectiveness of our method on various challenging tasks including image classification on ImageNet-1k and object detection on MSCOCO and PASCAL VOC datasets. Furthermore, we provide extensive in-sight into the performance of triplet attention by visually inspecting the GradCAM and GradCAM++ results. The empirical evaluation of our method supports our intuition on the importance of capturing dependencies across dimensions when computing attention weights. Code for this paper can be publicly accessed at https://github.com/LandskapeAI/triplet-attention 受益于在通道或空间位置之间建立相互依赖性的能力，注意力机制最近已被广泛研究并广泛应用于各种计算机视觉任务中。在本文中，我们研究了轻量级但有效的注意力机制，并提出了三元组注意力，这是一种通过使用三分支结构捕获跨维度交互来计算注意力权重的新方法。对于输入张量，三元组注意力通过旋转操作和残差变换构建维度间依赖关系，并以可忽略的计算开销对通道间和空间信息进行编码。我们的方法既简单又高效，可以作为附加模块轻松插入经典骨干网络。我们证明了我们的方法在各种具有挑战性的任务上的有效性，包括 ImageNet-1k 上的图像分类以及 MSCOCO 和 PASCAL VOC 数据集上的对象检测。此外，我们通过目视检查 GradCAM 和 GradCAM++ 结果，对三重注意力的表现提供了广泛的见解。对我们方法的实证评估支持了我们的直觉，即在计算注意力权重时捕获跨维度依赖性的重要性。本文的代码可以在 https://github.com/LandskapeAI/triplet-attention 公开访问 本文提出一种轻量级的三元组注意力模块，通过旋转操作和残差变换捕捉跨维度交互，提升计算机视觉任务性能。 Diganta Misra,Trikay Nalamada,Ajay Uppili Arasanipalai,Qibin Hou cs.CV

title: Symbolic Verification of Quantum Circuits
title_zh: 量子电路的符号验证
abstract: This short note proposes a symbolic approach for representing and reasoning about quantum circuits using complex, vector or matrix-valued Boolean expressions. A major benefit of this approach is that it allows us to directly borrow the existing techniques and tools for verification of classical logic circuits in reasoning about quantum circuits.
summary: This short note proposes a symbolic approach for representing and reasoning about quantum circuits using complex, vector or matrix-valued Boolean expressions. A major benefit of this approach is that it allows us to directly borrow the existing techniques and tools for verification of classical logic circuits in reasoning about quantum circuits.
abstract_zh: 这篇简短的笔记提出了一种使用复杂的向量或矩阵值布尔表达式来表示和推理量子电路的符号方法。这种方法的一个主要好处是，它允许我们在量子电路推理中直接借用现有的经典逻辑电路验证技术和工具。

AI.tldr: 提出一种符号化方法用于量子电路的验证，利用复数、向量或矩阵值布尔表达式进行表示和推理
AI.motivation: 传统经典逻辑电路验证技术难以直接适用于量子电路，需寻找新的符号化方法以提升验证效率与准确性
AI.method: 采用复数、向量及矩阵值布尔表达式构建符号化模型，并整合经典逻辑电路验证工具进行量子电路分析
AI.result: 验证方法在理论上可行，能够有效利用现有经典工具进行量子电路的符号化验证，提升验证效率
AI.conclusion: 该符号化方法为量子电路验证提供新思路，有助于推动量子计算领域形式化验证工具的发展

title: A deep learning pipeline for identification of motor units in musculoskeletal ultrasound
title_zh: 用于识别肌肉骨骼超声中运动单位的深度学习流程
abstract: Ultrasound imaging provides information from a large part of the muscle. It has recently been shown that ultrafast ultrasound imaging can be used to record and analyze the mechanical response of individual MUs using blind source separation. In this work, we present an alternative method - a deep learning pipeline - to identify active MUs in ultrasound image sequences, including segmentation of their territories and signal estimation of their mechanical responses (twitch train). We train and evaluate the model using simulated data mimicking the complex activation pattern of tens of activated MUs with overlapping territories and partially synchronized activation patterns. Using a slow fusion approach (based on 3D CNNs), we transform the spatiotemporal image sequence data to 2D representations and apply a deep neural network architecture for segmentation. Next, we employ a second deep neural network architecture for signal estimation. The results show that the proposed pipeline can effectively identify individual MUs, estimate their territories, and estimate their twitch train signal at low contraction forces. The framework can retain spatio-temporal consistencies and information of the mechanical response of MU activity even when the ultrasound image sequences are transformed into a 2D representation for compatibility with more traditional computer vision and image processing techniques. The proposed pipeline is potentially useful to identify simultaneously active MUs in whole muscles in ultrasound image sequences of voluntary skeletal muscle contractions at low force levels.
summary: Ultrasound imaging provides information from a large part of the muscle. It has recently been shown that ultrafast ultrasound imaging can be used to record and analyze the mechanical response of individual MUs using blind source separation. In this work, we present an alternative method - a deep learning pipeline - to identify active MUs in ultrasound image sequences, including segmentation of their territories and signal estimation of their mechanical responses (twitch train). We train and evaluate the model using simulated data mimicking the complex activation pattern of tens of activated MUs with overlapping territories and partially synchronized activation patterns. Using a slow fusion approach (based on 3D CNNs), we transform the spatiotemporal image sequence data to 2D representations and apply a deep neural network architecture for segmentation. Next, we employ a second deep neural network architecture for signal estimation. The results show that the proposed pipeline can effectively identify individual MUs, estimate their territories, and estimate their twitch train signal at low contraction forces. The framework can retain spatio-temporal consistencies and information of the mechanical response of MU activity even when the ultrasound image sequences are transformed into a 2D representation for compatibility with more traditional computer vision and image processing techniques. The proposed pipeline is potentially useful to identify simultaneously active MUs in whole muscles in ultrasound image sequences of voluntary skeletal muscle contractions at low force levels.
abstract_zh: 超声成像提供大部分肌肉的信息。最近的研究表明，超快超声成像可用于通过盲源分离来记录和分析各个 MU 的机械响应。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种替代方法 - 深度学习管道 - 来识别超声图像序列中的活动 MU，包括其区域分割和机械响应（抽搐序列）的信号估计。我们使用模拟数据来训练和评估模型，模拟数十个具有重叠区域和部分同步激活模式的激活 MU 的复杂激活模式。使用慢速融合方法（基于 3D CNN），我们将时空图像序列数据转换为 2D 表示，并应用深度神经网络架构进行分割。接下来，我们采用第二个深度神经网络架构进行信号估计。结果表明，所提出的管道可以有效地识别各个 MU，估计它们的领土，并估计它们在低收缩力下的抽搐序列信号。即使超声图像序列被转换为二维表示以与更传统的计算机视觉和图像处理技术兼容，该框架也可以保留 MU 活动的时空一致性和机械响应信息。所提出的流程可能有助于识别低力水平下自愿骨骼肌收缩的超声图像序列中整个肌肉中同时活跃的 MU。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于深度学习的管道，用于在肌肉骨骼超声图像序列中识别活动的运动单元（MUs），包括分割其区域并估计机械响应信号。
AI.motivation: 传统方法如盲源分离在处理复杂激活模式和部分同步激活的重叠运动单元区域时存在局限性，需开发更高效的深度学习方法。
AI.method: 采用慢融合方法（基于3D卷积神经网络）将时空图像序列转换为2D表示，并应用深度神经网络进行分割和信号估计，使用模拟数据训练和评估模型。
AI.result: 该管道能有效识别单个MUs，估计其区域及低收缩力下的机械响应信号，并在转换为2D表示后保持时空一致性。
AI.conclusion: 该框架可潜在用于识别低力度自愿骨骼肌收缩的超声图像序列中同时激活的MUs，具有实际应用价值。

authors_text: Xiao Yan,Gang Kou,Feng Xiao,Dapeng Zhang,Xianghua Gan
title: Demand Forecasting in Bike-sharing Systems Based on A Multiple Spatiotemporal Fusion Network
title_zh: 基于多时空融合网络的共享单车系统需求预测
abstract: Bike-sharing systems (BSSs) have become increasingly popular around the globe and have attracted a wide range of research interests. In this paper, the demand forecasting problem in BSSs is studied. Spatial and temporal features are critical for demand forecasting in BSSs, but it is challenging to extract spatiotemporal dynamics. Another challenge is to capture the relations between spatiotemporal dynamics and external factors, such as weather, day-of-week, and time-of-day. To address these challenges, we propose a multiple spatiotemporal fusion network named MSTF-Net. MSTF-Net consists of multiple spatiotemporal blocks: 3D convolutional network (3D-CNN) blocks, eidetic 3D convolutional long short-term memory networks (E3D-LSTM) blocks, and fully-connected (FC) blocks. Specifically, 3D-CNN blocks highlight extracting short-term spatiotemporal dependence in each fragment (i.e., closeness, period, and trend); E3D-LSTM blocks further extract long-term spatiotemporal dependence over all fragments; FC blocks extract nonlinear correlations of external factors. Finally, the latent representations of E3D-LSTM and FC blocks are fused to obtain the final prediction. For two real-world datasets, it is shown that MSTF-Net outperforms seven state-of-the-art models.
summary: Bike-sharing systems (BSSs) have become increasingly popular around the globe and have attracted a wide range of research interests. In this paper, the demand forecasting problem in BSSs is studied. Spatial and temporal features are critical for demand forecasting in BSSs, but it is challenging to extract spatiotemporal dynamics. Another challenge is to capture the relations between spatiotemporal dynamics and external factors, such as weather, day-of-week, and time-of-day. To address these challenges, we propose a multiple spatiotemporal fusion network named MSTF-Net. MSTF-Net consists of multiple spatiotemporal blocks: 3D convolutional network (3D-CNN) blocks, eidetic 3D convolutional long short-term memory networks (E3D-LSTM) blocks, and fully-connected (FC) blocks. Specifically, 3D-CNN blocks highlight extracting short-term spatiotemporal dependence in each fragment (i.e., closeness, period, and trend); E3D-LSTM blocks further extract long-term spatiotemporal dependence over all fragments; FC blocks extract nonlinear correlations of external factors. Finally, the latent representations of E3D-LSTM and FC blocks are fused to obtain the final prediction. For two real-world datasets, it is shown that MSTF-Net outperforms seven state-of-the-art models.
abstract_zh: 自行车共享系统（BSS）在全球越来越受欢迎，并吸引了广泛的研究兴趣。本文研究了BSS中的需求预测问题。空间和时间特征对于 BSS 中的需求预测至关重要，但提取时空动态具有挑战性。另一个挑战是捕捉时空动态与外部因素（例如天气、星期几和一天中的时间）之间的关系。为了应对这些挑战，我们提出了一种名为 MSTF-Net 的多时空融合网络。 MSTF-Net 由多个时空块组成：3D 卷积网络 (3D-CNN) 块、清晰的 3D 卷积长短期记忆网络 (E3D-LSTM) 块和全连接 (FC) 块。具体来说，3D-CNN 块强调提取每个片段中的短期时空依赖性（即接近度、周期和趋势）； E3D-LSTM块进一步提取所有片段的长期时空依赖性； FC 块提取外部因素的非线性相关性。最后，融合 E3D-LSTM 和 FC 块的潜在表示以获得最终预测。对于两个真实世界的数据集，结果表明 MSTF-Net 的性能优于七个最先进的模型。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种多时空融合网络（MSTF-Net），用于解决共享单车系统中的需求预测问题。
AI.motivation: 共享单车需求预测需同时捕捉时空动态特征与外部因素（如天气、时间等）的关联，但现有方法难以有效融合多源异构信息。
AI.method: 设计包含3D-CNN块（提取短期时空依赖）、E3D-LSTM块（提取长期时空依赖）和全连接块（建模外部因素非线性关系）的MSTF-Net，通过多模态特征融合实现精准预测。
AI.result: 在两个真实数据集上，MSTF-Net优于七种先进模型，验证了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: MSTF-Net通过分层时空建模与多因素融合，显著提升了共享单车需求预测的准确性。

search_text: Demand Forecasting in Bike-sharing Systems Based on A Multiple Spatiotemporal Fusion Network 基于多时空融合网络的共享单车系统需求预测 Bike-sharing systems (BSSs) have become increasingly popular around the globe and have attracted a wide range of research interests. In this paper, the demand forecasting problem in BSSs is studied. Spatial and temporal features are critical for demand forecasting in BSSs, but it is challenging to extract spatiotemporal dynamics. Another challenge is to capture the relations between spatiotemporal dynamics and external factors, such as weather, day-of-week, and time-of-day. To address these challenges, we propose a multiple spatiotemporal fusion network named MSTF-Net. MSTF-Net consists of multiple spatiotemporal blocks: 3D convolutional network (3D-CNN) blocks, eidetic 3D convolutional long short-term memory networks (E3D-LSTM) blocks, and fully-connected (FC) blocks. Specifically, 3D-CNN blocks highlight extracting short-term spatiotemporal dependence in each fragment (i.e., closeness, period, and trend); E3D-LSTM blocks further extract long-term spatiotemporal dependence over all fragments; FC blocks extract nonlinear correlations of external factors. Finally, the latent representations of E3D-LSTM and FC blocks are fused to obtain the final prediction. For two real-world datasets, it is shown that MSTF-Net outperforms seven state-of-the-art models. 自行车共享系统（BSS）在全球越来越受欢迎，并吸引了广泛的研究兴趣。本文研究了BSS中的需求预测问题。空间和时间特征对于 BSS 中的需求预测至关重要，但提取时空动态具有挑战性。另一个挑战是捕捉时空动态与外部因素（例如天气、星期几和一天中的时间）之间的关系。为了应对这些挑战，我们提出了一种名为 MSTF-Net 的多时空融合网络。 MSTF-Net 由多个时空块组成：3D 卷积网络 (3D-CNN) 块、清晰的 3D 卷积长短期记忆网络 (E3D-LSTM) 块和全连接 (FC) 块。具体来说，3D-CNN 块强调提取每个片段中的短期时空依赖性（即接近度、周期和趋势）； E3D-LSTM块进一步提取所有片段的长期时空依赖性； FC 块提取外部因素的非线性相关性。最后，融合 E3D-LSTM 和 FC 块的潜在表示以获得最终预测。对于两个真实世界的数据集，结果表明 MSTF-Net 的性能优于七个最先进的模型。 本文提出一种多时空融合网络（MSTF-Net），用于解决共享单车系统中的需求预测问题。 Xiao Yan,Gang Kou,Feng Xiao,Dapeng Zhang,Xianghua Gan cs.CV

authors_text: Guilherme V. Nardari,Avraham Cohen,Steven W. Chen,Xu Liu,Vaibhav Arcot,Roseli A. F. Romero,Vijay Kumar
title: Place Recognition in Forests with Urquhart Tessellations
title_zh: 使用厄克特镶嵌图案进行森林中的地点识别
abstract: In this letter, we present a novel descriptor based on Urquhart tessellations derived from the position of trees in a forest. We propose a framework that uses these descriptors to detect previously seen observations and landmark correspondences, even with partial overlap and noise. We run loop closure detection experiments in simulation and real-world data map-merging from different flights of an Unmanned Aerial Vehicle (UAV) in a pine tree forest and show that our method outperforms state-of-the-art approaches in accuracy and robustness.
summary: In this letter, we present a novel descriptor based on Urquhart tessellations derived from the position of trees in a forest. We propose a framework that uses these descriptors to detect previously seen observations and landmark correspondences, even with partial overlap and noise. We run loop closure detection experiments in simulation and real-world data map-merging from different flights of an Unmanned Aerial Vehicle (UAV) in a pine tree forest and show that our method outperforms state-of-the-art approaches in accuracy and robustness.
abstract_zh: 在这封信中，我们提出了一种基于从森林中树木的位置导出的厄克特镶嵌的新颖描述符。我们提出了一个框架，使用这些描述符来检测先前看到的观察结果和地标对应关系，即使存在部分重叠和噪声。我们在松树林中无人机（UAV）不同飞行的模拟和现实数据地图合并中进行了闭环检测实验，并表明我们的方法在准确性和鲁棒性方面优于最先进的方法。

AI.tldr: 提出基于Urquhart剖分的描述符，用于森林环境中鲁棒的地点识别与地标匹配。
AI.motivation: 传统方法在森林场景中因树木相似性高、环境复杂导致地点识别准确率低，需更鲁棒的解决方案。
AI.method: 利用森林树木位置生成Urquhart剖分描述符，结合UAV多飞行数据构建闭环检测框架，处理部分重叠与噪声。
AI.result: 在仿真与真实森林数据中，该方法在准确率和鲁棒性上优于现有最先进算法。
AI.conclusion: Urquhart剖分描述符有效解决了森林场景下地点识别难题，适用于复杂环境的SLAM与地图融合任务。

authors_text: Yash Satsangi,Shimon Whiteson,Frans A. Oliehoek,Henri Bouma
title: Real-Time Resource Allocation for Tracking Systems
title_zh: 跟踪系统的实时资源分配
abstract: Automated tracking is key to many computer vision applications. However, many tracking systems struggle to perform in real-time due to the high computational cost of detecting people, especially in ultra high resolution images. We propose a new algorithm called \emph{PartiMax} that greatly reduces this cost by applying the person detector only to the relevant parts of the image. PartiMax exploits information in the particle filter to select $k$ of the $n$ candidate \emph{pixel boxes} in the image. We prove that PartiMax is guaranteed to make a near-optimal selection with error bounds that are independent of the problem size. Furthermore, empirical results on a real-life dataset show that our system runs in real-time by processing only 10\% of the pixel boxes in the image while still retaining 80\% of the original tracking performance achieved when processing all pixel boxes.
summary: Automated tracking is key to many computer vision applications. However, many tracking systems struggle to perform in real-time due to the high computational cost of detecting people, especially in ultra high resolution images. We propose a new algorithm called \emph{PartiMax} that greatly reduces this cost by applying the person detector only to the relevant parts of the image. PartiMax exploits information in the particle filter to select $k$ of the $n$ candidate \emph{pixel boxes} in the image. We prove that PartiMax is guaranteed to make a near-optimal selection with error bounds that are independent of the problem size. Furthermore, empirical results on a real-life dataset show that our system runs in real-time by processing only 10\% of the pixel boxes in the image while still retaining 80\% of the original tracking performance achieved when processing all pixel boxes.
abstract_zh: 自动跟踪是许多计算机视觉应用的关键。然而，由于检测人员的计算成本很高，尤其是在超高分辨率图像中，许多跟踪系统难以实时执行。我们提出了一种名为 \emph{PartiMax} 的新算法，该算法通过仅将人物检测器应用于图像的相关部分来大大降低此成本。 PartiMax 利用粒子滤波器中的信息来选择图像中 $n$ 候选 \emph{像素框} 中的 $k$。我们证明 PartiMax 保证做出接近最优的选择，其误差范围与问题大小无关。此外，现实数据集的实证结果表明，我们的系统通过仅处理图像中 10% 的像素框来实时运行，同时仍然保留处理所有像素框时实现的 80% 的原始跟踪性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为PartiMax的实时资源分配算法，通过仅检测图像相关区域来降低跟踪系统的计算成本。
AI.motivation: 现有跟踪系统在处理超高分辨率图像时因计算成本过高而难以实现实时性，需优化资源分配以提升效率。
AI.method: 利用粒子滤波器从图像中选择k个候选像素框，通过理论证明其选择误差与问题规模无关，从而减少计算量。
AI.result: 实验表明，该算法仅处理10%的像素框即可保留80%的原始跟踪性能，成功实现实时处理。
AI.conclusion: PartiMax通过高效资源分配显著降低了计算成本，为高分辨率场景下的实时跟踪提供了可行方案。

authors_text: Rakshit Naidu,Ankita Ghosh,Yash Maurya,Shamanth R Nayak K,Soumya Snigdha Kundu
title: IS-CAM: Integrated Score-CAM for axiomatic-based explanations
title_zh: IS-CAM：用于基于公理解释的集成 Score-CAM
abstract: Convolutional Neural Networks have been known as black-box models as humans cannot interpret their inner functionalities. With an attempt to make CNNs more interpretable and trustworthy, we propose IS-CAM (Integrated Score-CAM), where we introduce the integration operation within the Score-CAM pipeline to achieve visually sharper attribution maps quantitatively. Our method is evaluated on 2000 randomly selected images from the ILSVRC 2012 Validation dataset, which proves the versatility of IS-CAM to account for different models and methods.
summary: Convolutional Neural Networks have been known as black-box models as humans cannot interpret their inner functionalities. With an attempt to make CNNs more interpretable and trustworthy, we propose IS-CAM (Integrated Score-CAM), where we introduce the integration operation within the Score-CAM pipeline to achieve visually sharper attribution maps quantitatively. Our method is evaluated on 2000 randomly selected images from the ILSVRC 2012 Validation dataset, which proves the versatility of IS-CAM to account for different models and methods.
abstract_zh: 卷积神经网络被称为黑盒模型，因为人类无法解释其内部功能。为了使 CNN 更具可解释性和可信度，我们提出了 IS-CAM（Integrated Score-CAM），在 Score-CAM 管道中引入集成操作，以定量地实现视觉上更清晰的归因图。我们的方法在 ILSVRC 2012 验证数据集中随机选择的 2000 个图像上进行了评估，这证明了 IS-CAM 解释不同模型和方法的多功能性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出IS-CAM方法，通过集成操作改进Score-CAM算法，以生成更清晰的视觉归因图，提升卷积神经网络的可解释性。
AI.motivation: 卷积神经网络（CNN）作为黑箱模型缺乏可解释性，需通过归因方法增强其可信度与透明度。
AI.method: 在Score-CAM框架中引入积分操作，通过量化整合特征图信息生成更精确的归因热力图。
AI.result: 在ILSVRC 2012验证集的2000张随机图像上验证，证明IS-CAM适用于不同模型和方法，具有广泛适用性。
AI.conclusion: IS-CAM通过积分操作有效提升了归因图的清晰度与准确性，为CNN的可解释性研究提供了新思路。

authors_text: Zhuoran Shen,Irwan Bello,Raviteja Vemulapalli,Xuhui Jia,Ching-Hui Chen
title: Global Self-Attention Networks for Image Recognition
title_zh: 用于图像识别的全局自注意力网络
abstract: Recently, a series of works in computer vision have shown promising results on various image and video understanding tasks using self-attention. However, due to the quadratic computational and memory complexities of self-attention, these works either apply attention only to low-resolution feature maps in later stages of a deep network or restrict the receptive field of attention in each layer to a small local region. To overcome these limitations, this work introduces a new global self-attention module, referred to as the GSA module, which is efficient enough to serve as the backbone component of a deep network. This module consists of two parallel layers: a content attention layer that attends to pixels based only on their content and a positional attention layer that attends to pixels based on their spatial locations. The output of this module is the sum of the outputs of the two layers. Based on the proposed GSA module, we introduce new standalone global attention-based deep networks that use GSA modules instead of convolutions to model pixel interactions. Due to the global extent of the proposed GSA module, a GSA network has the ability to model long-range pixel interactions throughout the network. Our experimental results show that GSA networks outperform the corresponding convolution-based networks significantly on the CIFAR-100 and ImageNet datasets while using less parameters and computations. The proposed GSA networks also outperform various existing attention-based networks on the ImageNet dataset.
summary: Recently, a series of works in computer vision have shown promising results on various image and video understanding tasks using self-attention. However, due to the quadratic computational and memory complexities of self-attention, these works either apply attention only to low-resolution feature maps in later stages of a deep network or restrict the receptive field of attention in each layer to a small local region. To overcome these limitations, this work introduces a new global self-attention module, referred to as the GSA module, which is efficient enough to serve as the backbone component of a deep network. This module consists of two parallel layers: a content attention layer that attends to pixels based only on their content and a positional attention layer that attends to pixels based on their spatial locations. The output of this module is the sum of the outputs of the two layers. Based on the proposed GSA module, we introduce new standalone global attention-based deep networks that use GSA modules instead of convolutions to model pixel interactions. Due to the global extent of the proposed GSA module, a GSA network has the ability to model long-range pixel interactions throughout the network. Our experimental results show that GSA networks outperform the corresponding convolution-based networks significantly on the CIFAR-100 and ImageNet datasets while using less parameters and computations. The proposed GSA networks also outperform various existing attention-based networks on the ImageNet dataset.
abstract_zh: 最近，计算机视觉领域的一系列工作在使用自注意力的各种图像和视频理解任务上显示出了有希望的结果。然而，由于自注意力的二次计算和记忆复杂性，这些工作要么仅将注意力应用于深度网络后期阶段的低分辨率特征图，要么将每层注意力的感受野限制在一个小的局部区域。为了克服这些限制，这项工作引入了一种新的全局自注意力模块，称为 GSA 模块，它足够高效，可以作为深度网络的骨干组件。该模块由两个并行层组成：内容关注层仅根据像素的内容关注像素，位置关注层根据像素的空间位置关注像素。该模块的输出是两层输出的总和。基于所提出的 GSA 模块，我们引入了新的独立的基于全局注意力的深度网络，该网络使用 GSA 模块而不是卷积来建模像素交互。由于所提出的 GSA 模块的全局范围，GSA 网络能够对整个网络中的远程像素交互进行建模。我们的实验结果表明，GSA 网络在 CIFAR-100 和 ImageNet 数据集上显着优于相应的基于卷积的网络，同时使用更少的参数和计算。所提出的 GSA 网络在 ImageNet 数据集上也优于各种现有的基于注意力的网络。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为GSA的全局自注意力模块，用于图像识别任务，通过改进自注意力机制的计算效率来提升模型性能。
AI.motivation: 现有自注意力机制因计算复杂度高，难以在高分辨率特征图或大感受野场景中应用，限制了其在深度网络中的有效性。
AI.method: 设计包含内容注意力层和位置注意力层的GSA模块，通过并行计算像素内容与空间位置信息并求和，构建基于GSA的深度网络替代传统卷积网络。
AI.result: 在CIFAR-100和ImageNet数据集上，GSA网络在参数量和计算量更少的情况下显著优于卷积网络，并超越现有注意力网络性能。
AI.conclusion: GSA模块通过全局注意力机制有效建模长距离像素交互，在保持高效计算的同时提升了图像识别性能，是卷积网络和现有注意力方法的有效替代方案。

title: Online Action Detection in Streaming Videos with Time Buffers
title_zh: 具有时间缓冲区的流视频中的在线动作检测
abstract: We formulate the problem of online temporal action detection in live streaming videos, acknowledging one important property of live streaming videos that there is normally a broadcast delay between the latest captured frame and the actual frame viewed by the audience. The standard setting of the online action detection task requires immediate prediction after a new frame is captured. We illustrate that its lack of consideration of the delay is imposing unnecessary constraints on the models and thus not suitable for this problem. We propose to adopt the problem setting that allows models to make use of the small `buffer time' incurred by the delay in live streaming videos. We design an action start and end detection framework for this online with buffer setting with two major components: flattened I3D and window-based suppression. Experiments on three standard temporal action detection benchmarks under the proposed setting demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed framework. We show that by having a suitable problem setting for this problem with wide-applications, we can achieve much better detection accuracy than off-the-shelf online action detection models.
summary: We formulate the problem of online temporal action detection in live streaming videos, acknowledging one important property of live streaming videos that there is normally a broadcast delay between the latest captured frame and the actual frame viewed by the audience. The standard setting of the online action detection task requires immediate prediction after a new frame is captured. We illustrate that its lack of consideration of the delay is imposing unnecessary constraints on the models and thus not suitable for this problem. We propose to adopt the problem setting that allows models to make use of the small `buffer time' incurred by the delay in live streaming videos. We design an action start and end detection framework for this online with buffer setting with two major components: flattened I3D and window-based suppression. Experiments on three standard temporal action detection benchmarks under the proposed setting demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed framework. We show that by having a suitable problem setting for this problem with wide-applications, we can achieve much better detection accuracy than off-the-shelf online action detection models.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了实时流视频中的在线时间动作检测问题，承认实时流视频的一个重要特性，即最新捕获的帧与观众观看的实际帧之间通常存在广播延迟。在线动作检测任务的标准设置要求捕获新帧后立即进行预测。我们说明，它缺乏对延迟的考虑，对模型施加了不必要的约束，因此不适合这个问题。我们建议采用这样的问题设置，允许模型利用直播视频延迟带来的小“缓冲时间”。我们为此设计了一个在线动作开始和结束检测框架，其缓冲区设置包含两个主要组件：扁平化 I3D 和基于窗口的抑制。在所提出的设置下对三个标准时间动作检测基准进行的实验证明了所提出框架的有效性。我们表明，通过为这个具有广泛应用的问题设置合适的问题设置，我们可以实现比现成的在线动作检测模型更好的检测精度。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种适用于直播视频的在线动作检测方法，通过利用直播中的缓冲时间提升检测准确性。
AI.motivation: 传统在线动作检测方法要求实时预测，但未考虑直播视频中普遍存在的广播延迟，导致模型约束过严且效果受限。
AI.method: 设计包含扁平化I3D网络和基于窗口的抑制机制的框架，通过利用缓冲时间优化动作起始与结束检测。
AI.result: 在三个标准时序动作检测基准测试中，该框架在缓冲设置下显著优于现有在线检测模型。
AI.conclusion: 合理的问题设定（利用缓冲时间）能有效提升直播场景下的动作检测性能，具有广泛的应用价值。

method: 设计包含扁平化I3D网络和基于窗口的抑制机制的框架，通过利用缓冲时间优化动作起始与结束检测。
result: 在三个标准时序动作检测基准测试中，该框架在缓冲设置下显著优于现有在线检测模型。
conclusion: 合理的问题设定（利用缓冲时间）能有效提升直播场景下的动作检测性能，具有广泛的应用价值。
search_text: Online Action Detection in Streaming Videos with Time Buffers 具有时间缓冲区的流视频中的在线动作检测 We formulate the problem of online temporal action detection in live streaming videos, acknowledging one important property of live streaming videos that there is normally a broadcast delay between the latest captured frame and the actual frame viewed by the audience. The standard setting of the online action detection task requires immediate prediction after a new frame is captured. We illustrate that its lack of consideration of the delay is imposing unnecessary constraints on the models and thus not suitable for this problem. We propose to adopt the problem setting that allows models to make use of the small `buffer time' incurred by the delay in live streaming videos. We design an action start and end detection framework for this online with buffer setting with two major components: flattened I3D and window-based suppression. Experiments on three standard temporal action detection benchmarks under the proposed setting demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed framework. We show that by having a suitable problem setting for this problem with wide-applications, we can achieve much better detection accuracy than off-the-shelf online action detection models. 我们提出了实时流视频中的在线时间动作检测问题，承认实时流视频的一个重要特性，即最新捕获的帧与观众观看的实际帧之间通常存在广播延迟。在线动作检测任务的标准设置要求捕获新帧后立即进行预测。我们说明，它缺乏对延迟的考虑，对模型施加了不必要的约束，因此不适合这个问题。我们建议采用这样的问题设置，允许模型利用直播视频延迟带来的小“缓冲时间”。我们为此设计了一个在线动作开始和结束检测框架，其缓冲区设置包含两个主要组件：扁平化 I3D 和基于窗口的抑制。在所提出的设置下对三个标准时间动作检测基准进行的实验证明了所提出框架的有效性。我们表明，通过为这个具有广泛应用的问题设置合适的问题设置，我们可以实现比现成的在线动作检测模型更好的检测精度。 本文提出了一种适用于直播视频的在线动作检测方法，通过利用直播中的缓冲时间提升检测准确性。 Bowen Zhang,Hao Chen,Meng Wang,Yuanjun Xiong cs.CV

authors_text: Ahmed Salem,Yannick Sautter,Michael Backes,Mathias Humbert,Yang Zhang
title: BAAAN: Backdoor Attacks Against Autoencoder and GAN-Based Machine Learning Models
title_zh: BAAAN：针对自动编码器和基于 GAN 的机器学习模型的后门攻击
abstract: The tremendous progress of autoencoders and generative adversarial networks (GANs) has led to their application to multiple critical tasks, such as fraud detection and sanitized data generation. This increasing adoption has fostered the study of security and privacy risks stemming from these models. However, previous works have mainly focused on membership inference attacks. In this work, we explore one of the most severe attacks against machine learning models, namely the backdoor attack, against both autoencoders and GANs. The backdoor attack is a training time attack where the adversary implements a hidden backdoor in the target model that can only be activated by a secret trigger. State-of-the-art backdoor attacks focus on classification-based tasks. We extend the applicability of backdoor attacks to autoencoders and GAN-based models. More concretely, we propose the first backdoor attack against autoencoders and GANs where the adversary can control what the decoded or generated images are when the backdoor is activated. Our results show that the adversary can build a backdoored autoencoder that returns a target output for all backdoored inputs, while behaving perfectly normal on clean inputs. Similarly, for the GANs, our experiments show that the adversary can generate data from a different distribution when the backdoor is activated, while maintaining the same utility when the backdoor is not.
summary: The tremendous progress of autoencoders and generative adversarial networks (GANs) has led to their application to multiple critical tasks, such as fraud detection and sanitized data generation. This increasing adoption has fostered the study of security and privacy risks stemming from these models. However, previous works have mainly focused on membership inference attacks. In this work, we explore one of the most severe attacks against machine learning models, namely the backdoor attack, against both autoencoders and GANs. The backdoor attack is a training time attack where the adversary implements a hidden backdoor in the target model that can only be activated by a secret trigger. State-of-the-art backdoor attacks focus on classification-based tasks. We extend the applicability of backdoor attacks to autoencoders and GAN-based models. More concretely, we propose the first backdoor attack against autoencoders and GANs where the adversary can control what the decoded or generated images are when the backdoor is activated. Our results show that the adversary can build a backdoored autoencoder that returns a target output for all backdoored inputs, while behaving perfectly normal on clean inputs. Similarly, for the GANs, our experiments show that the adversary can generate data from a different distribution when the backdoor is activated, while maintaining the same utility when the backdoor is not.
abstract_zh: 自动编码器和生成对抗网络（GAN）的巨大进步使其应用于多种关键任务，例如欺诈检测和净化数据生成。这种越来越多的采用促进了对这些模型产生的安全和隐私风险的研究。然而，之前的工作主要集中在成员推理攻击上。在这项工作中，我们探索了针对机器学习模型的最严重的攻击之一，即针对自动编码器和 GAN 的后门攻击。后门攻击是一种训练时攻击，对手在目标模型中实现一个隐藏的后门，该后门只能通过秘密触发器激活。最先进的后门攻击侧重于基于分类的任务。我们将后门攻击的适用性扩展到自动编码器和基于 GAN 的模型。更具体地说，我们提出了针对自动编码器和 GAN 的第一个后门攻击，其中对手可以在后门激活时控制解码或生成的图像。我们的结果表明，对手可以构建一个后门自动编码器，为所有后门输入返回目标输出，同时在干净的输入上表现得完全正常。同样，对于 GAN，我们的实验表明，当后门激活时，对手可以从不同的分布生成数据，而当后门未激活时，对手可以保持相同的效用。

AI.tldr: 本文提出BAAAN方法，针对自编码器和GAN模型设计后门攻击，使模型在触发条件下生成特定输出。
AI.motivation: 尽管自编码器和GAN在关键任务中广泛应用，但现有研究主要关注成员推断攻击，后门攻击的威胁尚未被充分探讨。
AI.method: 在训练阶段植入隐蔽后门，通过秘密触发器控制解码或生成结果，扩展后门攻击至非分类任务模型。
AI.result: 实验表明，后门自编码器可对污染输入输出目标数据且保持正常表现；后门GAN可生成不同分布数据而不影响常规功能。
AI.conclusion: 该攻击验证了自编码器和GAN的潜在安全漏洞，凸显了模型鲁棒性研究的必要性。

authors_text: Tim Lebailly,Sena Kiciroglu,Mathieu Salzmann,Pascal Fua,Wei Wang
title: Motion Prediction Using Temporal Inception Module
title_zh: 使用时间初始模块进行运动预测
comment: 16 pages, 4 figures. To appear in the proceedings of the 15th Asian Conference on Computer Vision, ACCV 2020
comments: 16 pages, 4 figures. To appear in the proceedings of the 15th Asian Conference on Computer Vision, ACCV 2020
abstract: Human motion prediction is a necessary component for many applications in robotics and autonomous driving. Recent methods propose using sequence-to-sequence deep learning models to tackle this problem. However, they do not focus on exploiting different temporal scales for different length inputs. We argue that the diverse temporal scales are important as they allow us to look at the past frames with different receptive fields, which can lead to better predictions. In this paper, we propose a Temporal Inception Module (TIM) to encode human motion. Making use of TIM, our framework produces input embeddings using convolutional layers, by using different kernel sizes for different input lengths. The experimental results on standard motion prediction benchmark datasets Human3.6M and CMU motion capture dataset show that our approach consistently outperforms the state of the art methods.
summary: Human motion prediction is a necessary component for many applications in robotics and autonomous driving. Recent methods propose using sequence-to-sequence deep learning models to tackle this problem. However, they do not focus on exploiting different temporal scales for different length inputs. We argue that the diverse temporal scales are important as they allow us to look at the past frames with different receptive fields, which can lead to better predictions. In this paper, we propose a Temporal Inception Module (TIM) to encode human motion. Making use of TIM, our framework produces input embeddings using convolutional layers, by using different kernel sizes for different input lengths. The experimental results on standard motion prediction benchmark datasets Human3.6M and CMU motion capture dataset show that our approach consistently outperforms the state of the art methods.
abstract_zh: 人体运动预测是机器人和自动驾驶领域许多应用的必要组成部分。最近的方法建议使用序列到序列深度学习模型来解决这个问题。然而，他们并不专注于为不同长度的输入利用不同的时间尺度。我们认为，不同的时间尺度很重要，因为它们使我们能够以不同的感受野来查看过去的帧，这可以带来更好的预测。在本文中，我们提出了一种时间初始模块（TIM）来编码人体运动。利用 TIM，我们的框架通过对不同的输入长度使用不同的内核大小，使用卷积层生成输入嵌入。标准运动预测基准数据集 Human3.6M 和 CMU 运动捕捉数据集的实验结果表明，我们的方法始终优于最先进的方法。

AI.tldr: 提出时间卷积模块（TIM）用于人类运动预测，以处理不同时间尺度的输入。
AI.motivation: 现有方法未充分利用不同时间尺度的信息，而不同时间尺度能提供不同感受野的过去帧，有助于更准确的预测。
AI.method: 设计时间卷积模块（TIM），利用不同卷积核处理不同长度的输入，生成输入嵌入。
AI.result: 在Human3.6M和CMU数据集上的实验表明，该方法在运动预测任务中优于现有最先进的方法。
AI.conclusion: 时间卷积模块通过有效利用不同时间尺度的信息，显著提升了运动预测的准确性。

authors_text: Olga Poppe,Chuan Lei,Elke A. Rundensteiner,David Maier
title: GRETA: Graph-based Real-time Event Trend Aggregation
title_zh: GRETA：基于图的实时事件趋势聚合
comment: Technical report for the paper in VLDB 2017
comments: Technical report for the paper in VLDB 2017
abstract: Streaming applications from algorithmic trading to traffic management deploy Kleene patterns to detect and aggregate arbitrarily-long event sequences, called event trends. State-of-the-art systems process such queries in two steps. Namely, they first construct all trends and then aggregate them. Due to the exponential costs of trend construction, this two-step approach suffers from both a long delays and high memory costs. To overcome these limitations, we propose the Graph-based Real-time Event Trend Aggregation (Greta) approach that dynamically computes event trend aggregation without first constructing these trends. We define the Greta graph to compactly encode all trends. Our Greta runtime incrementally maintains the graph, while dynamically propagating aggregates along its edges. Based on the graph, the final aggregate is incrementally updated and instantaneously returned at the end of each query window. Our Greta runtime represents a win-win solution, reducing both the time complexity from exponential to quadratic and the space complexity from exponential to linear in the number of events. Our experiments demonstrate that Greta achieves up to four orders of magnitude speed-up and up to 50--fold memory reduction compared to the state-of-the-art two-step approaches.
summary: Streaming applications from algorithmic trading to traffic management deploy Kleene patterns to detect and aggregate arbitrarily-long event sequences, called event trends. State-of-the-art systems process such queries in two steps. Namely, they first construct all trends and then aggregate them. Due to the exponential costs of trend construction, this two-step approach suffers from both a long delays and high memory costs. To overcome these limitations, we propose the Graph-based Real-time Event Trend Aggregation (Greta) approach that dynamically computes event trend aggregation without first constructing these trends. We define the Greta graph to compactly encode all trends. Our Greta runtime incrementally maintains the graph, while dynamically propagating aggregates along its edges. Based on the graph, the final aggregate is incrementally updated and instantaneously returned at the end of each query window. Our Greta runtime represents a win-win solution, reducing both the time complexity from exponential to quadratic and the space complexity from exponential to linear in the number of events. Our experiments demonstrate that Greta achieves up to four orders of magnitude speed-up and up to 50--fold memory reduction compared to the state-of-the-art two-step approaches.
abstract_zh: 从算法交易到流量管理的流应用程序部署 Kleene 模式来检测和聚合任意长的事件序列（称为事件趋势）。最先进的系统分两步处理此类查询。也就是说，他们首先构建所有趋势，然后汇总它们。由于趋势构建的指数成本，这种两步方法面临着较长的延迟和较高的内存成本。为了克服这些限制，我们提出了基于图的实时事件趋势聚合（Greta）方法，该方法可以动态计算事件趋势聚合，而无需首先构建这些趋势。我们定义 Greta 图来紧凑地编码所有趋势。我们的 Greta 运行时增量维护图，同时沿其边缘动态传播聚合。根据该图，最终聚合会增量更新并在每个查询窗口结束时立即返回。我们的 Greta 运行时代表了一个双赢的解决方案，将时间复杂度从指数级降低到二次级，将空间复杂度从事件数量的指数级降低到线性。我们的实验表明，与最先进的两步方法相比，Greta 实现了高达四个数量级的加速和高达 50 倍的内存减少。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于图的实时事件趋势聚合方法GRETA，解决传统方法在处理长事件序列时的高时间与内存消耗问题。
AI.motivation: 现有系统采用两步法（先构建趋势再聚合）导致指数级时间与内存开销，难以满足实时性需求。
AI.method: 通过构建紧凑的图结构编码所有趋势，运行时增量维护图并沿边动态传播聚合结果，将时间复杂度从指数级降至二次方，空间复杂度从指数级降至线性。
AI.result: 实验表明，GRETA相比现有方法速度提升达四个数量级，内存消耗减少50倍。
AI.conclusion: GRETA通过图结构优化实现了时间与空间复杂度的突破，为实时事件趋势聚合提供了高效解决方案。

search_text: GRETA: Graph-based Real-time Event Trend Aggregation GRETA：基于图的实时事件趋势聚合 Streaming applications from algorithmic trading to traffic management deploy Kleene patterns to detect and aggregate arbitrarily-long event sequences, called event trends. State-of-the-art systems process such queries in two steps. Namely, they first construct all trends and then aggregate them. Due to the exponential costs of trend construction, this two-step approach suffers from both a long delays and high memory costs. To overcome these limitations, we propose the Graph-based Real-time Event Trend Aggregation (Greta) approach that dynamically computes event trend aggregation without first constructing these trends. We define the Greta graph to compactly encode all trends. Our Greta runtime incrementally maintains the graph, while dynamically propagating aggregates along its edges. Based on the graph, the final aggregate is incrementally updated and instantaneously returned at the end of each query window. Our Greta runtime represents a win-win solution, reducing both the time complexity from exponential to quadratic and the space complexity from exponential to linear in the number of events. Our experiments demonstrate that Greta achieves up to four orders of magnitude speed-up and up to 50--fold memory reduction compared to the state-of-the-art two-step approaches. 从算法交易到流量管理的流应用程序部署 Kleene 模式来检测和聚合任意长的事件序列（称为事件趋势）。最先进的系统分两步处理此类查询。也就是说，他们首先构建所有趋势，然后汇总它们。由于趋势构建的指数成本，这种两步方法面临着较长的延迟和较高的内存成本。为了克服这些限制，我们提出了基于图的实时事件趋势聚合（Greta）方法，该方法可以动态计算事件趋势聚合，而无需首先构建这些趋势。我们定义 Greta 图来紧凑地编码所有趋势。我们的 Greta 运行时增量维护图，同时沿其边缘动态传播聚合。根据该图，最终聚合会增量更新并在每个查询窗口结束时立即返回。我们的 Greta 运行时代表了一个双赢的解决方案，将时间复杂度从指数级降低到二次级，将空间复杂度从事件数量的指数级降低到线性。我们的实验表明，与最先进的两步方法相比，Greta 实现了高达四个数量级的加速和高达 50 倍的内存减少。 本文提出基于图的实时事件趋势聚合方法GRETA，解决传统方法在处理长事件序列时的高时间与内存消耗问题。 Olga Poppe,Chuan Lei,Elke A. authors_text: Charles Welch,Jonathan K. Kummerfeld,Verónica Pérez-Rosas,Rada Mihalcea
title: Compositional Demographic Word Embeddings
title_zh: 构成人口统计词嵌入
abstract: Word embeddings are usually derived from corpora containing text from many individuals, thus leading to general purpose representations rather than individually personalized representations. While personalized embeddings can be useful to improve language model performance and other language processing tasks, they can only be computed for people with a large amount of longitudinal data, which is not the case for new users. We propose a new form of personalized word embeddings that use demographic-specific word representations derived compositionally from full or partial demographic information for a user (i.e., gender, age, location, religion). We show that the resulting demographic-aware word representations outperform generic word representations on two tasks for English: language modeling and word associations. We further explore the trade-off between the number of available attributes and their relative effectiveness and discuss the ethical implications of using them.
summary: Word embeddings are usually derived from corpora containing text from many individuals, thus leading to general purpose representations rather than individually personalized representations. While personalized embeddings can be useful to improve language model performance and other language processing tasks, they can only be computed for people with a large amount of longitudinal data, which is not the case for new users. We propose a new form of personalized word embeddings that use demographic-specific word representations derived compositionally from full or partial demographic information for a user (i.e., gender, age, location, religion). We show that the resulting demographic-aware word representations outperform generic word representations on two tasks for English: language modeling and word associations. We further explore the trade-off between the number of available attributes and their relative effectiveness and discuss the ethical implications of using them.
abstract_zh: 词嵌入通常源自包含许多个体文本的语料库，从而产生通用目的表示，而不是个人个性化表示。虽然个性化嵌入对于提高语言模型性能和其他语言处理任务很有用，但它们只能针对拥有大量纵向数据的人进行计算，而对于新用户来说则不然。我们提出了一种新形式的个性化词嵌入，它使用从用户的全部或部分人口统计信息（即性别、年龄、位置、宗教）中组合得出的特定于人口统计的词表示。我们表明，在英语的两项任务上，所得到的人口统计感知单词表示优于通用单词表示：语言建模和单词关联。我们进一步探讨可用属性的数量与其相对有效性之间的权衡，并讨论使用它们的道德影响。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于人口统计信息组合生成个性化词嵌入的新方法，以改善语言模型性能。
AI.motivation: 传统词嵌入缺乏个性化，而现有个性化方法需要大量用户数据，难以适用于新用户。本文旨在通过人口统计属性构建可扩展的个性化词表示。
AI.method: 利用用户性别、年龄、地域等人口属性，通过组合学习生成特定群体的词嵌入表示。
AI.result: 在英文语言建模和词关联任务中，人口统计感知的词嵌入优于通用词嵌入，且分析了属性数量与效果的权衡关系。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效提升了个性化表示能力，但需谨慎考虑人口属性使用可能带来的伦理风险。

authors_text: Florian Mai,Nikolaos Pappas,Ivan Montero,Noah A. Smith,James Henderson
title: Plug and Play Autoencoders for Conditional Text Generation
title_zh: 用于条件文本生成的即插即用自动编码器
abstract: Text autoencoders are commonly used for conditional generation tasks such as style transfer. We propose methods which are plug and play, where any pretrained autoencoder can be used, and only require learning a mapping within the autoencoder's embedding space, training embedding-to-embedding (Emb2Emb). This reduces the need for labeled training data for the task and makes the training procedure more efficient. Crucial to the success of this method is a loss term for keeping the mapped embedding on the manifold of the autoencoder and a mapping which is trained to navigate the manifold by learning offset vectors. Evaluations on style transfer tasks both with and without sequence-to-sequence supervision show that our method performs better than or comparable to strong baselines while being up to four times faster.
summary: Text autoencoders are commonly used for conditional generation tasks such as style transfer. We propose methods which are plug and play, where any pretrained autoencoder can be used, and only require learning a mapping within the autoencoder's embedding space, training embedding-to-embedding (Emb2Emb). This reduces the need for labeled training data for the task and makes the training procedure more efficient. Crucial to the success of this method is a loss term for keeping the mapped embedding on the manifold of the autoencoder and a mapping which is trained to navigate the manifold by learning offset vectors. Evaluations on style transfer tasks both with and without sequence-to-sequence supervision show that our method performs better than or comparable to strong baselines while being up to four times faster.
abstract_zh: 文本自动编码器通常用于条件生成任务，例如样式传输。我们提出了即插即用的方法，可以使用任何预训练的自动编码器，并且只需要学习自动编码器的嵌入空间内的映射，训练嵌入到嵌入（Emb2Emb）。这减少了任务对标记训练数据的需求，并使训练过程更加高效。该方法成功的关键是用于将映射嵌入保持在自动编码器流形上的损失项以及通过学习偏移向量来训练以导航流形的映射。对有或没有序列到序列监督的风格迁移任务的评估表明，我们的方法比强基线表现更好或与之相当，同时速度提高了四倍。

AI.tldr: 提出一种即插即用的自动编码器方法，用于条件文本生成任务，如风格迁移，通过在预训练自动编码器的嵌入空间中学习映射来提高效率。
AI.motivation: 减少对标签数据的依赖，提高训练效率，同时保持生成质量。
AI.method: 利用预训练自动编码器，在其嵌入空间中学习嵌入到嵌入（Emb2Emb）的映射，通过保持嵌入在流形上的损失项和学习偏移向量来导航流形。
AI.result: 在风格迁移任务中，该方法在有无序列到序列监督的情况下均表现优于或媲美现有方法，训练速度提升达四倍。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过减少对标签数据的依赖和提升训练效率，有效实现了条件文本生成，适用于多种任务。

Evaluations on style transfer tasks both with and without sequence-to-sequence supervision show that our method performs better than or comparable to strong baselines while being up to four times faster. 文本自动编码器通常用于条件生成任务，例如样式传输。我们提出了即插即用的方法，可以使用任何预训练的自动编码器，并且只需要学习自动编码器的嵌入空间内的映射，训练嵌入到嵌入（Emb2Emb）。这减少了任务对标记训练数据的需求，并使训练过程更加高效。该方法成功的关键是用于将映射嵌入保持在自动编码器流形上的损失项以及通过学习偏移向量来训练以导航流形的映射。对有或没有序列到序列监督的风格迁移任务的评估表明，我们的方法比强基线表现更好或与之相当，同时速度提高了四倍。 提出一种即插即用的自动编码器方法，用于条件文本生成任务，如风格迁移，通过在预训练自动编码器的嵌入空间中学习映射来提高效率。 Florian Mai,Nikolaos Pappas,Ivan Montero,Noah A. Smith,James Henderson cs.CL,cs.AI

title: Dynamic Query Evaluation Over Structures with Low Degree
title_zh: 低度结构的动态查询评估
abstract: We consider the evaluation of first-order queries over classes of databases that have bounded degree and low degree. More precisely, given a query and a database, we want to efficiently test whether there is a solution, count how many solutions there are, or be able to enumerate the set of all solutions. Bounded and low degree are rather natural notions and both yield efficient algorithms. For example, Berkholz, Keppeler, and Schweikardt showed in 2017 that over databases of bounded degree, not only any first order query can efficiently be tested, counted and enumerated, but the data structure used can be updated when the database itself is updated. This paper extends existing results in two directions. First, we show that over classes of databases with low degree, there is a data structure that enables us to test, count and enumerate the solutions of first order queries. This data structure can also be efficiently recomputed when the database is updated. Secondly, for classes of databases with bounded degree we show that, without increasing the preprocessing time, we can compute a data structure that does not depend on the query but only on its quantifier rank. We can therefore perform a single preprocessing that can later be used for many queries.
summary: We consider the evaluation of first-order queries over classes of databases that have bounded degree and low degree. More precisely, given a query and a database, we want to efficiently test whether there is a solution, count how many solutions there are, or be able to enumerate the set of all solutions. Bounded and low degree are rather natural notions and both yield efficient algorithms. For example, Berkholz, Keppeler, and Schweikardt showed in 2017 that over databases of bounded degree, not only any first order query can efficiently be tested, counted and enumerated, but the data structure used can be updated when the database itself is updated. This paper extends existing results in two directions. First, we show that over classes of databases with low degree, there is a data structure that enables us to test, count and enumerate the solutions of first order queries. This data structure can also be efficiently recomputed when the database is updated. Secondly, for classes of databases with bounded degree we show that, without increasing the preprocessing time, we can compute a data structure that does not depend on the query but only on its quantifier rank. We can therefore perform a single preprocessing that can later be used for many queries.
abstract_zh: 我们考虑对具有有限度和低度的数据库类进行一阶查询的评估。更准确地说，给定一个查询和一个数据库，我们希望有效地测试是否存在解决方案，计算有多少个解决方案，或者能够枚举所有解决方案的集合。有界和低度是相当自然的概念，并且都产生有效的算法。例如，Berkholz、Keppeler 和 Schweikardt 在 2017 年表明，在有界度数据库上，不仅可以有效地测试、计数和枚举任何一阶查询，而且可以在数据库本身更新时更新所使用的数据结构。本文在两个方向上扩展了现有的结果。首先，我们表明，在低度数据库类别上，存在一种数据结构，使我们能够测试、计数和枚举一阶查询的解决方案。当数据库更新时，该数据结构也可以有效地重新计算。其次，对于具有有限度的数据库类别，我们表明，在不增加预处理时间的情况下，我们可以计算不依赖于查询而仅依赖于其量词排名的数据结构。因此，我们可以执行单个预处理，稍后可用于许多查询。

AI.tldr: 本文研究在低度结构上动态评估首次级查询的方法，扩展了现有结果并提出新的数据结构。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在有界度数据库上可高效处理查询，但低度数据库的动态更新和通用查询处理仍需改进。
AI.method: 设计适用于低度数据库的数据结构，支持查询测试、计数和枚举，并优化预处理以独立于具体查询。
AI.result: 提出低度数据库的动态数据结构，以及基于量化等级的通用预处理方法，提升多查询效率。
AI.conclusion: 本文扩展了有界度数据库的成果，为低度结构提供动态查询解决方案，并优化了预处理通用性。

authors_text: Hirokazu Kameoka,Takuhiro Kaneko,Kou Tanaka,Nobukatsu Hojo,Shogo Seki
title: VoiceGrad: Non-Parallel Any-to-Many Voice Conversion with Annealed Langevin Dynamics
title_zh: VoiceGrad：使用 Annealed Langevin Dynamics 的非并行任意对多语音转换
comment: For more details on the baseline method used for comparison, please refer to our article in arXiv:2008.12604
comments: For more details on the baseline method used for comparison, please refer to our article in arXiv:2008.12604
abstract: In this paper, we propose a non-parallel any-to-many voice conversion (VC) method termed VoiceGrad. Inspired by WaveGrad, a recently introduced novel waveform generation method, VoiceGrad is based upon the concepts of score matching and Langevin dynamics. It uses weighted denoising score matching to train a score approximator, a fully convolutional network with a U-Net structure designed to predict the gradient of the log density of the speech feature sequences of multiple speakers, and performs VC by using annealed Langevin dynamics to iteratively update an input feature sequence towards the nearest stationary point of the target distribution based on the trained score approximator network. Thanks to the nature of this concept, VoiceGrad enables any-to-many VC, a VC scenario in which the speaker of input speech can be arbitrary, and allows for non-parallel training, which requires no parallel utterances or transcriptions.
summary: In this paper, we propose a non-parallel any-to-many voice conversion (VC) method termed VoiceGrad. Inspired by WaveGrad, a recently introduced novel waveform generation method, VoiceGrad is based upon the concepts of score matching and Langevin dynamics. It uses weighted denoising score matching to train a score approximator, a fully convolutional network with a U-Net structure designed to predict the gradient of the log density of the speech feature sequences of multiple speakers, and performs VC by using annealed Langevin dynamics to iteratively update an input feature sequence towards the nearest stationary point of the target distribution based on the trained score approximator network. Thanks to the nature of this concept, VoiceGrad enables any-to-many VC, a VC scenario in which the speaker of input speech can be arbitrary, and allows for non-parallel training, which requires no parallel utterances or transcriptions.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一种称为 VoiceGrad 的非并行任意对多语音转换（VC）方法。受最近推出的新型波形生成方法 WaveGrad 的启发，VoiceGrad 基于乐谱匹配和 Langevin 动力学的概念。它使用加权去噪分数匹配来训练分数近似器，这是一个具有 U-Net 结构的全卷积网络，旨在预测多个说话人的语音特征序列的对数密度的梯度，并通过使用退火的 Langevin 动力学来执行 VC，以基于训练的分数近似器网络迭代地将输入特征序列更新到目标分布的最近驻点。由于这个概念的本质，VoiceGrad 支持任意对多 VC，即输入语音的说话者可以是任意的 VC 场景，并允许非并行训练，不需要并行话语或转录。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种非并行任意到多说话人语音转换方法VoiceGrad，基于分数匹配和朗之万动力学实现无需并行数据的语音转换。
AI.motivation: 传统语音转换方法通常需要并行语料库进行训练，限制了实际应用。本文旨在开发一种无需并行数据的非并行任意到多说话人语音转换方法。
AI.method: 受WaveGrad启发，采用加权去噪分数匹配训练U-Net结构的分数近似器，通过退火朗之万动力学迭代更新输入特征序列，使其逼近目标分布的平稳点。
AI.result: VoiceGrad实现了任意输入说话人到多个目标说话人的语音转换，验证了非并行训练的有效性，无需平行语句或转录文本。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的VoiceGrad方法通过分数匹配与朗之万动力学结合，成功解决了非并行语音转换难题，为语音合成与转换领域提供了新思路。

authors_text: Tarun Gupta,Anuj Mahajan,Bei Peng,Wendelin Böhmer,Shimon Whiteson
title: UneVEn: Universal Value Exploration for Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: UneVEn：多智能体强化学习的普世价值探索
abstract: VDN and QMIX are two popular value-based algorithms for cooperative MARL that learn a centralized action value function as a monotonic mixing of per-agent utilities. While this enables easy decentralization of the learned policy, the restricted joint action value function can prevent them from solving tasks that require significant coordination between agents at a given timestep. We show that this problem can be overcome by improving the joint exploration of all agents during training. Specifically, we propose a novel MARL approach called Universal Value Exploration (UneVEn) that learns a set of related tasks simultaneously with a linear decomposition of universal successor features. With the policies of already solved related tasks, the joint exploration process of all agents can be improved to help them achieve better coordination. Empirical results on a set of exploration games, challenging cooperative predator-prey tasks requiring significant coordination among agents, and StarCraft II micromanagement benchmarks show that UneVEn can solve tasks where other state-of-the-art MARL methods fail.
summary: VDN and QMIX are two popular value-based algorithms for cooperative MARL that learn a centralized action value function as a monotonic mixing of per-agent utilities. While this enables easy decentralization of the learned policy, the restricted joint action value function can prevent them from solving tasks that require significant coordination between agents at a given timestep. We show that this problem can be overcome by improving the joint exploration of all agents during training. Specifically, we propose a novel MARL approach called Universal Value Exploration (UneVEn) that learns a set of related tasks simultaneously with a linear decomposition of universal successor features. With the policies of already solved related tasks, the joint exploration process of all agents can be improved to help them achieve better coordination. Empirical results on a set of exploration games, challenging cooperative predator-prey tasks requiring significant coordination among agents, and StarCraft II micromanagement benchmarks show that UneVEn can solve tasks where other state-of-the-art MARL methods fail.
abstract_zh: VDN 和 QMIX 是用于协作 MARL 的两种流行的基于价值的算法，它们将集中式动作价值函数学习为每个代理实用程序的单调混合。虽然这使得学习策略可以轻松分散，但受限的联合行动价值函数可能会阻止它们解决需要在给定时间步长之间进行大量协调的任务。我们表明，可以通过改进训练期间所有智能体的联合探索来克服这个问题。具体来说，我们提出了一种称为通用价值探索（UneVEn）的新颖的 MARL 方法，该方法在通用后继特征的线性分解的同时学习一组相关任务。利用已经解决的相关任务的策略，可以改进所有智能体的联合探索过程，帮助它们实现更好的协调。一组探索游戏、需要代理之间进行大量协调的挑战性合作捕食者-猎物任务以及星际争霸 II 微观管理基准的实证结果表明，UneVEn 可以解决其他最先进的 MARL 方法失败的任务。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为UneVEn的多智能体强化学习方法，通过改进联合探索机制解决协作任务中的协调难题。
AI.motivation: 现有基于价值的MARL算法（如VDN/QMIX）因受限的联合动作价值函数，难以处理需要即时协调的复杂任务。
AI.method: 提出Universal Value Exploration方法，利用线性分解的普遍继承特征同时学习相关任务，通过已解决任务的策略提升联合探索效率。
AI.result: 在探索游戏、协作捕食者-猎物任务和StarCraft II基准测试中，UneVEn成功解决了其他先进方法无法处理的复杂协调任务。
AI.conclusion: UneVEn通过增强多智能体联合探索能力，显著提升了协作型MARL在需要精细协调场景中的性能表现。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种名为UneVEn的多智能体强化学习方法，通过改进联合探索机制解决协作任务中的协调难题。
ai_content.motivation: 现有基于价值的MARL算法（如VDN/QMIX）因受限的联合动作价值函数，难以处理需要即时协调的复杂任务。
ai_content.method: 提出Universal Value Exploration方法，利用线性分解的普遍继承特征同时学习相关任务，通过已解决任务的策略提升联合探索效率。
ai_content.result: 在探索游戏、协作捕食者-猎物任务和StarCraft II基准测试中，UneVEn成功解决了其他先进方法无法处理的复杂协调任务。
ai_content.conclusion: UneVEn通过增强多智能体联合探索能力，显著提升了协作型MARL在需要精细协调场景中的性能表现。
