search_text: UneVEn: Universal Value Exploration for Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning UneVEn：多智能体强化学习的普世价值探索 VDN and QMIX are two popular value-based algorithms for cooperative MARL that learn a centralized action value function as a monotonic mixing of per-agent utilities. While this enables easy decentralization of the learned policy, the restricted joint action value function can prevent them from solving tasks that require significant coordination between agents at a given timestep. We show that this problem can be overcome by improving the joint exploration of all agents during training. Specifically, we propose a novel MARL approach called Universal Value Exploration (UneVEn) that learns a set of related tasks simultaneously with a linear decomposition of universal successor features. With the policies of already solved related tasks, the joint exploration process of all agents can be improved to help them achieve better coordination. Empirical results on a set of exploration games, challenging cooperative predator-prey tasks requiring significant coordination among agents, and StarCraft II micromanagement benchmarks show that UneVEn can solve tasks where other state-of-the-art MARL methods fail. VDN 和 QMIX 是用于协作 MARL 的两种流行的基于价值的算法，它们将集中式动作价值函数学习为每个代理实用程序的单调混合。虽然这使得学习策略可以轻松分散，但受限的联合行动价值函数可能会阻止它们解决需要在给定时间步长之间进行大量协调的任务。我们表明，可以通过改进训练期间所有智能体的联合探索来克服这个问题。具体来说，我们提出了一种称为通用价值探索（UneVEn）的新颖的 MARL 方法，该方法在通用后继特征的线性分解的同时学习一组相关任务。利用已经解决的相关任务的策略，可以改进所有智能体的联合探索过程，帮助它们实现更好的协调。一组探索游戏、需要代理之间进行大量协调的挑战性合作捕食者-猎物任务以及星际争霸 II 微观管理基准的实证结果表明，UneVEn 可以解决其他最先进的 MARL 方法失败的任务。 本文提出一种名为UneVEn的多智能体强化学习方法，通过改进联合探索机制解决协作任务中的协调难题。 Tarun Gupta,Anuj Mahajan,Bei Peng,Wendelin Böhmer,Shimon Whiteson cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.MA

title: Digital Voicing of Silent Speech
title_zh: 无声语音的数字发声
abstract: In this paper, we consider the task of digitally voicing silent speech, where silently mouthed words are converted to audible speech based on electromyography (EMG) sensor measurements that capture muscle impulses. While prior work has focused on training speech synthesis models from EMG collected during vocalized speech, we are the first to train from EMG collected during silently articulated speech. We introduce a method of training on silent EMG by transferring audio targets from vocalized to silent signals. Our method greatly improves intelligibility of audio generated from silent EMG compared to a baseline that only trains with vocalized data, decreasing transcription word error rate from 64% to 4% in one data condition and 88% to 68% in another. To spur further development on this task, we share our new dataset of silent and vocalized facial EMG measurements.
summary: In this paper, we consider the task of digitally voicing silent speech, where silently mouthed words are converted to audible speech based on electromyography (EMG) sensor measurements that capture muscle impulses. While prior work has focused on training speech synthesis models from EMG collected during vocalized speech, we are the first to train from EMG collected during silently articulated speech. We introduce a method of training on silent EMG by transferring audio targets from vocalized to silent signals. Our method greatly improves intelligibility of audio generated from silent EMG compared to a baseline that only trains with vocalized data, decreasing transcription word error rate from 64% to 4% in one data condition and 88% to 68% in another. To spur further development on this task, we share our new dataset of silent and vocalized facial EMG measurements.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们考虑以数字方式发出无声语音的任务，其中根据捕获肌肉脉冲的肌电图 (EMG) 传感器测量结果，将无声的言语转换为可听语音。虽然之前的工作重点是根据发声语音期间收集的肌电图来训练语音合成模型，但我们是第一个根据无声语音期间收集的肌电图来训练语音合成模型的人。我们介绍了一种通过将音频目标从有声信号转移到无声信号来训练无声肌电图的方法。与仅使用发声数据进行训练的基线相比，我们的方法极大地提高了无声 EMG 生成的音频的清晰度，在一种数据条件下将转录单词错误率从 64% 降低到 4%，在另一种数据条件下从 88% 降低到 68%。为了促进这项任务的进一步发展，我们分享了新的无声和发声面部肌电图测量数据集。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于静默语音的数字发声方法，通过肌电图（EMG）传感器捕捉的肌肉脉冲将无声言语转化为可听语音。
AI.motivation: 先前研究主要基于发声时的EMG数据训练语音合成模型，而本文首次尝试从静默发音的EMG数据中训练模型，以解决静默语音数字化的挑战。
AI.method: 通过将发声语音的目标音频转移到静默信号中，提出了一种针对静默EMG的训练方法，利用音频目标迁移提升模型性能。
AI.result: 在两种数据条件下，生成的语音可懂度显著提升，词错误率从64%降至4%，以及从88%降至68%。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效提升了静默EMG生成语音的质量，并通过共享新的静默与发声面部EMG数据集推动相关研究发展。

authors_text: Yannick Le Cacheux,Hervé Le Borgne,Michel Crucianu
title: Using Sentences as Semantic Representations in Large Scale Zero-Shot Learning
title_zh: 在大规模零样本学习中使用句子作为语义表示
abstract: Zero-shot learning aims to recognize instances of unseen classes, for which no visual instance is available during training, by learning multimodal relations between samples from seen classes and corresponding class semantic representations. These class representations usually consist of either attributes, which do not scale well to large datasets, or word embeddings, which lead to poorer performance. A good trade-off could be to employ short sentences in natural language as class descriptions. We explore different solutions to use such short descriptions in a ZSL setting and show that while simple methods cannot achieve very good results with sentences alone, a combination of usual word embeddings and sentences can significantly outperform current state-of-the-art.
summary: Zero-shot learning aims to recognize instances of unseen classes, for which no visual instance is available during training, by learning multimodal relations between samples from seen classes and corresponding class semantic representations. These class representations usually consist of either attributes, which do not scale well to large datasets, or word embeddings, which lead to poorer performance. A good trade-off could be to employ short sentences in natural language as class descriptions. We explore different solutions to use such short descriptions in a ZSL setting and show that while simple methods cannot achieve very good results with sentences alone, a combination of usual word embeddings and sentences can significantly outperform current state-of-the-art.
abstract_zh: 零样本学习旨在通过学习可见类样本与相应类语义表示之间的多模态关系来识别未见类的实例，在训练期间没有可用的视觉实例。这些类表示通常由不能很好地扩展到大型数据集的属性或导致性能较差的词嵌入组成。一个好的权衡可能是使用自然语言中的短句子作为类描述。我们探索了在 ZSL 设置中使用此类简短描述的不同解决方案，并表明，虽然简单的方法无法单独使用句子取得很好的结果，但通常的单词嵌入和句子的组合可以显着优于当前的最先进技术。

AI.tldr: 本论文探讨在大规模零样本学习中使用短句作为语义表示，以提升模型对未见过类别的识别能力。
AI.motivation: 传统零样本学习中使用的属性描述扩展性差，而词嵌入效果有限，需寻找更有效的语义表示方法。
AI.method: 通过结合常规词嵌入与自然语言短句描述，探索多种方法以增强语义表示的表达能力。
AI.result: 实验表明，结合词嵌入与短句的方法显著优于当前最先进的零样本学习模型。
AI.conclusion: 短句作为语义表示在零样本学习中表现优异，与词嵌入结合可进一步提升性能。

authors_text: Bowen Zhang,Hexiang Hu,Vihan Jain,Eugene Ie,Fei Sha
title: Learning to Represent Image and Text with Denotation Graph
title_zh: 学习用指代图表示图像和文本
abstract: Learning to fuse vision and language information and representing them is an important research problem with many applications. Recent progresses have leveraged the ideas of pre-training (from language modeling) and attention layers in Transformers to learn representation from datasets containing images aligned with linguistic expressions that describe the images. In this paper, we propose learning representations from a set of implied, visually grounded expressions between image and text, automatically mined from those datasets. In particular, we use denotation graphs to represent how specific concepts (such as sentences describing images) can be linked to abstract and generic concepts (such as short phrases) that are also visually grounded. This type of generic-to-specific relations can be discovered using linguistic analysis tools. We propose methods to incorporate such relations into learning representation. We show that state-of-the-art multimodal learning models can be further improved by leveraging automatically harvested structural relations. The representations lead to stronger empirical results on downstream tasks of cross-modal image retrieval, referring expression, and compositional attribute-object recognition. Both our codes and the extracted denotation graphs on the Flickr30K and the COCO datasets are publically available on https://sha-lab.github.io/DG.
summary: Learning to fuse vision and language information and representing them is an important research problem with many applications. Recent progresses have leveraged the ideas of pre-training (from language modeling) and attention layers in Transformers to learn representation from datasets containing images aligned with linguistic expressions that describe the images. In this paper, we propose learning representations from a set of implied, visually grounded expressions between image and text, automatically mined from those datasets. In particular, we use denotation graphs to represent how specific concepts (such as sentences describing images) can be linked to abstract and generic concepts (such as short phrases) that are also visually grounded. This type of generic-to-specific relations can be discovered using linguistic analysis tools. We propose methods to incorporate such relations into learning representation. We show that state-of-the-art multimodal learning models can be further improved by leveraging automatically harvested structural relations. The representations lead to stronger empirical results on downstream tasks of cross-modal image retrieval, referring expression, and compositional attribute-object recognition. Both our codes and the extracted denotation graphs on the Flickr30K and the COCO datasets are publically available on https://sha-lab.github.io/DG.
abstract_zh: 学习融合视觉和语言信息并表示它们是许多应用中的一个重要研究问题。最近的进展利用了 Transformers 中的预训练（来自语言建模）和注意力层的思想，从包含与描述图像的语言表达一致的图像的数据集中学习表示。在本文中，我们建议从图像和文本之间的一组隐含的、基于视觉的表达中学习表示，这些表达是从这些数据集中自动挖掘的。特别是，我们使用指代图来表示特定概念（例如描述图像的句子）如何与同样具有视觉基础的抽象和通用概念（例如短语）联系起来。这种类型的通用到特定的关系可以使用语言分析工具来发现。我们提出了将这种关系纳入学习表示的方法。我们表明，通过利用自动收获的结构关系可以进一步改进最先进的多模式学习模型。这些表示在跨模态图像检索、指代表达和组合属性-对象识别等下游任务上产生了更强的实证结果。我们的代码以及 Flickr30K 和 COCO 数据集上提取的表示图均可在 https://sha-lab.github.io/DG 上公开获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出利用标注图学习图像与文本的联合表示，通过挖掘数据集中的隐含语义关系提升多模态表示效果。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖预训练和注意力机制，但未充分挖掘图像-文本对中隐含的语义结构关系，限制了跨模态理解能力。
AI.method: 构建标注图表示具体概念（如图像描述）与抽象概念（如短语）的关联，利用语言分析工具自动提取通用-具体关系，并将其整合到表示学习框架中。
AI.result: 在跨模态检索、指代表达和组合属性识别任务中，模型性能显著优于现有方法，且代码与标注图已在公开数据集上发布。
AI.conclusion: 结构化语义关系的显式建模能有效增强多模态表示，为跨模态任务提供可复用的语义关联知识。

search_text: Learning to Represent Image and Text with Denotation Graph 学习用指代图表示图像和文本 Learning to fuse vision and language information and representing them is an important research problem with many applications. Recent progresses have leveraged the ideas of pre-training (from language modeling) and attention layers in Transformers to learn representation from datasets containing images aligned with linguistic expressions that describe the images. In this paper, we propose learning representations from a set of implied, visually grounded expressions between image and text, automatically mined from those datasets. In particular, we use denotation graphs to represent how specific concepts (such as sentences describing images) can be linked to abstract and generic concepts (such as short phrases) that are also visually grounded. This type of generic-to-specific relations can be discovered using linguistic analysis tools. We propose methods to incorporate such relations into learning representation. We show that state-of-the-art multimodal learning models can be further improved by leveraging automatically harvested structural relations. The representations lead to stronger empirical results on downstream tasks of cross-modal image retrieval, referring expression, and compositional attribute-object recognition. Both our codes and the extracted denotation graphs on the Flickr30K and the COCO datasets are publically available on https://sha-lab.github.io/DG. 学习融合视觉和语言信息并表示它们是许多应用中的一个重要研究问题。最近的进展利用了 Transformers 中的预训练（来自语言建模）和注意力层的思想，从包含与描述图像的语言表达一致的图像的数据集中学习表示。在本文中，我们建议从图像和文本之间的一组隐含的、基于视觉的表达中学习表示，这些表达是从这些数据集中自动挖掘的。特别是，我们使用指代图来表示特定概念（例如描述图像的句子）如何与同样具有视觉基础的抽象和通用概念（例如短语）联系起来。这种类型的通用到特定的关系可以使用语言分析工具来发现。我们提出了将这种关系纳入学习表示的方法。我们表明，通过利用自动收获的结构关系可以进一步改进最先进的多模式学习模型。这些表示在跨模态图像检索、指代表达和组合属性-对象识别等下游任务上产生了更强的实证结果。我们的代码以及 Flickr30K 和 COCO 数据集上提取的表示图均可在 https://sha-lab.github.io/DG 上公开获取。 本文提出利用标注图学习图像与文本的联合表示，通过挖掘数据集中的隐含语义关系提升多模态表示效果。 Bowen Zhang,Hexiang Hu,Vihan Jain,Eugene Ie,Fei Sha cs.CV,cs.CL,cs.LG

title: Human-Level Performance in No-Press Diplomacy via Equilibrium Search
title_zh: 通过均衡搜索在无新闻外交中达到人类水平的表现
abstract: Prior AI breakthroughs in complex games have focused on either the purely adversarial or purely cooperative settings. In contrast, Diplomacy is a game of shifting alliances that involves both cooperation and competition. For this reason, Diplomacy has proven to be a formidable research challenge. In this paper we describe an agent for the no-press variant of Diplomacy that combines supervised learning on human data with one-step lookahead search via regret minimization. Regret minimization techniques have been behind previous AI successes in adversarial games, most notably poker, but have not previously been shown to be successful in large-scale games involving cooperation. We show that our agent greatly exceeds the performance of past no-press Diplomacy bots, is unexploitable by expert humans, and ranks in the top 2% of human players when playing anonymous games on a popular Diplomacy website.
summary: Prior AI breakthroughs in complex games have focused on either the purely adversarial or purely cooperative settings. In contrast, Diplomacy is a game of shifting alliances that involves both cooperation and competition. For this reason, Diplomacy has proven to be a formidable research challenge. In this paper we describe an agent for the no-press variant of Diplomacy that combines supervised learning on human data with one-step lookahead search via regret minimization. Regret minimization techniques have been behind previous AI successes in adversarial games, most notably poker, but have not previously been shown to be successful in large-scale games involving cooperation. We show that our agent greatly exceeds the performance of past no-press Diplomacy bots, is unexploitable by expert humans, and ranks in the top 2% of human players when playing anonymous games on a popular Diplomacy website.
abstract_zh: 此前人工智能在复杂游戏中的突破主要集中在纯粹对抗性或纯粹合作性的设置上。相比之下，外交是一种联盟不断变化的游戏，既涉及合作又涉及竞争。因此，外交已被证明是一项艰巨的研究挑战。在本文中，我们描述了一种外交无新闻变体的代理，它将对人类数据的监督学习与通过遗憾最小化的一步前瞻搜索相结合。遗憾最小化技术一直是人工智能在对抗性游戏（尤其是扑克）中取得成功的原因，但此前并未被证明在涉及合作的大型游戏中取得了成功。我们表明，我们的代理大大超过了过去无新闻外交机器人的性能，无法被人类专家利用，并且在流行的外交网站上玩匿名游戏时排名在人类玩家的前 2%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合监督学习与后悔最小化搜索的智能体，在无压外交游戏中实现超越人类顶尖玩家的性能。
AI.motivation: 外交游戏包含动态联盟的协作与竞争，传统AI方法难以处理此类复杂交互，亟需新范式突破。
AI.method: 融合人类数据监督学习与基于后悔最小化的一步前瞻搜索算法，平衡协作与竞争决策。
AI.result: 智能体击败历史最佳bot，对专家不可被利用，在匿名对战中位列全球前2%人类玩家。
AI.conclusion: 该方法验证了均衡搜索在混合协作-竞争场景的有效性，为复杂社会交互AI提供新思路。

title: A Contrastive Learning Approach for Training Variational Autoencoder Priors
title_zh: 训练变分自动编码器先验的对比学习方法
abstract: Variational autoencoders (VAEs) are one of the powerful likelihood-based generative models with applications in many domains. However, they struggle to generate high-quality images, especially when samples are obtained from the prior without any tempering. One explanation for VAEs' poor generative quality is the prior hole problem: the prior distribution fails to match the aggregate approximate posterior. Due to this mismatch, there exist areas in the latent space with high density under the prior that do not correspond to any encoded image. Samples from those areas are decoded to corrupted images. To tackle this issue, we propose an energy-based prior defined by the product of a base prior distribution and a reweighting factor, designed to bring the base closer to the aggregate posterior. We train the reweighting factor by noise contrastive estimation, and we generalize it to hierarchical VAEs with many latent variable groups. Our experiments confirm that the proposed noise contrastive priors improve the generative performance of state-of-the-art VAEs by a large margin on the MNIST, CIFAR-10, CelebA 64, and CelebA HQ 256 datasets. Our method is simple and can be applied to a wide variety of VAEs to improve the expressivity of their prior distribution.
summary: Variational autoencoders (VAEs) are one of the powerful likelihood-based generative models with applications in many domains. However, they struggle to generate high-quality images, especially when samples are obtained from the prior without any tempering. One explanation for VAEs' poor generative quality is the prior hole problem: the prior distribution fails to match the aggregate approximate posterior. Due to this mismatch, there exist areas in the latent space with high density under the prior that do not correspond to any encoded image. Samples from those areas are decoded to corrupted images. To tackle this issue, we propose an energy-based prior defined by the product of a base prior distribution and a reweighting factor, designed to bring the base closer to the aggregate posterior. We train the reweighting factor by noise contrastive estimation, and we generalize it to hierarchical VAEs with many latent variable groups. Our experiments confirm that the proposed noise contrastive priors improve the generative performance of state-of-the-art VAEs by a large margin on the MNIST, CIFAR-10, CelebA 64, and CelebA HQ 256 datasets. Our method is simple and can be applied to a wide variety of VAEs to improve the expressivity of their prior distribution.
abstract_zh: 变分自动编码器（VAE）是强大的基于似然的生成模型之一，在许多领域都有应用。然而，他们很难生成高质量的图像，特别是当样本是在没有任何回火的情况下从先前获得的样本时。 VAE 生成质量差的一种解释是先验洞问题：先验分布无法匹配聚合近似后验。由于这种不匹配，在先验条件下的潜在空间中存在不对应于任何编码图像的高密度区域。来自这些区域的样本被解码为损坏的图像。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种基于能量的先验，由基础先验分布和重新加权因子的乘积定义，旨在使基础更接近聚合后验。我们通过噪声对比估计来训练重新加权因子，并将其推广到具有许多潜在变量组的分层 VAE。我们的实验证实，所提出的噪声对比先验在 MNIST、CIFAR-10、CelebA 64 和 CelebA HQ 256 数据集上大幅提高了最先进的 VAE 的生成性能。我们的方法很简单，可以应用于各种 VAE，以提高其先验分布的表达能力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于对比学习的变分自编码器（VAE）先验训练方法，解决VAE生成质量不足的问题。
AI.motivation: VAE在生成高质量图像时存在先验分布与后验分布不匹配导致的'先验洞'问题，使得潜在空间中高密度区域无法对应有效图像。
AI.method: 设计能量基先验分布，通过噪声对比估计训练重加权因子，使基础先验更贴近聚合后验，并扩展至多层潜在变量组的层次化VAE。
AI.result: 在MNIST、CIFAR-10、CelebA等数据集上，该方法显著提升SOTA VAE的生成性能，尤其改善了无温控采样时的图像质量。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过简单有效的对比学习框架，为提升VAE先验分布表达能力提供了通用解决方案。

conclusion: 该方法通过简单有效的对比学习框架，为提升VAE先验分布表达能力提供了通用解决方案。
search_text: A Contrastive Learning Approach for Training Variational Autoencoder Priors 训练变分自动编码器先验的对比学习方法 Variational autoencoders (VAEs) are one of the powerful likelihood-based generative models with applications in many domains. However, they struggle to generate high-quality images, especially when samples are obtained from the prior without any tempering. One explanation for VAEs' poor generative quality is the prior hole problem: the prior distribution fails to match the aggregate approximate posterior. Due to this mismatch, there exist areas in the latent space with high density under the prior that do not correspond to any encoded image. Samples from those areas are decoded to corrupted images. To tackle this issue, we propose an energy-based prior defined by the product of a base prior distribution and a reweighting factor, designed to bring the base closer to the aggregate posterior. We train the reweighting factor by noise contrastive estimation, and we generalize it to hierarchical VAEs with many latent variable groups. Our experiments confirm that the proposed noise contrastive priors improve the generative performance of state-of-the-art VAEs by a large margin on the MNIST, CIFAR-10, CelebA 64, and CelebA HQ 256 datasets. Our method is simple and can be applied to a wide variety of VAEs to improve the expressivity of their prior distribution. 变分自动编码器（VAE）是强大的基于似然的生成模型之一，在许多领域都有应用。然而，他们很难生成高质量的图像，特别是当样本是在没有任何回火的情况下从先前获得的样本时。 VAE 生成质量差的一种解释是先验洞问题：先验分布无法匹配聚合近似后验。由于这种不匹配，在先验条件下的潜在空间中存在不对应于任何编码图像的高密度区域。来自这些区域的样本被解码为损坏的图像。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种基于能量的先验，由基础先验分布和重新加权因子的乘积定义，旨在使基础更接近聚合后验。我们通过噪声对比估计来训练重新加权因子，并将其推广到具有许多潜在变量组的分层 VAE。我们的实验证实，所提出的噪声对比先验在 MNIST、CIFAR-10、CelebA 64 和 CelebA HQ 256 数据集上大幅提高了最先进的 VAE 的生成性能。我们的方法很简单，可以应用于各种 VAE，以提高其先验分布的表达能力。 本文提出一种基于对比学习的变分自编码器（VAE）先验训练方法，解决VAE生成质量不足的问题。 Jyoti Aneja,Alexander Schwing,Jan Kautz,Arash Vahdat cs.LG,cs.CV,stat.ML

title: On Additive Approximate Submodularity
title_zh: 关于加法近似子模性
abstract: A real-valued set function is (additively) approximately submodular if it satisfies the submodularity conditions with an additive error. Approximate submodularity arises in many settings, especially in machine learning, where the function evaluation might not be exact. In this paper we study how close such approximately submodular functions are to truly submodular functions. We show that an approximately submodular function defined on a ground set of $n$ elements is $O(n^2)$ pointwise-close to a submodular function. This result also provides an algorithmic tool that can be used to adapt existing submodular optimization algorithms to approximately submodular functions. To complement, we show an $Ω(\sqrt{n})$ lower bound on the distance to submodularity. These results stand in contrast to the case of approximate modularity, where the distance to modularity is a constant, and approximate convexity, where the distance to convexity is logarithmic.
summary: A real-valued set function is (additively) approximately submodular if it satisfies the submodularity conditions with an additive error. Approximate submodularity arises in many settings, especially in machine learning, where the function evaluation might not be exact. In this paper we study how close such approximately submodular functions are to truly submodular functions. We show that an approximately submodular function defined on a ground set of $n$ elements is $O(n^2)$ pointwise-close to a submodular function. This result also provides an algorithmic tool that can be used to adapt existing submodular optimization algorithms to approximately submodular functions. To complement, we show an $Ω(\sqrt{n})$ lower bound on the distance to submodularity. These results stand in contrast to the case of approximate modularity, where the distance to modularity is a constant, and approximate convexity, where the distance to convexity is logarithmic.
abstract_zh: 如果实值集合函数满足具有加性误差的子模性条件，则它是（加性地）近似子模性的。近似子模块性出现在许多环境中，特别是在机器学习中，其中函数评估可能不准确。在本文中，我们研究了这种近似子模函数与真正的子模函数有多接近。我们证明，在 $n$ 个元素的基本集合上定义的近似子模函数是 $O(n^2)$ 逐点接近子模函数。该结果还提供了一种算法工具，可用于使现有的子模优化算法适应近似子模函数。作为补充，我们显示了子模性距离的 $Ω(\sqrt{n})$ 下界。这些结果与近似模块化的情况形成鲜明对比，其中到模块化的距离是常数，而近似凸性的情况是到凸性的距离是对数的。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了近似子模函数与真实子模函数之间的接近程度，并探讨了其在机器学习中的应用。
AI.motivation: 在机器学习中，函数评估可能不精确，导致近似子模函数的出现。需要理解这类函数与真实子模函数的差异，并为优化算法提供理论支持。
AI.method: 通过数学分析证明近似子模函数的点wise距离上界，并结合算法工具适应现有优化方法，同时构造下界实例进行对比。
AI.result: 证明近似子模函数在n元素集合上与真实子模函数的点wise距离为O(n²)，并给出Ω(√n)的下界，与近似模ularity和凸性的距离特性形成对比。
AI.conclusion: 近似子模函数与真实子模函数的距离随问题规模显著增长，这一结果为算法设计提供了理论依据，同时揭示了不同函数性质逼近的差异性。

authors_text: James D. Miller,Roman Yampolskiy,Olle Haggstrom,Stuart Armstrong
title: Chess as a Testing Grounds for the Oracle Approach to AI Safety
title_zh: 国际象棋作为 Oracle 人工智能安全方法的测试场
abstract: To reduce the danger of powerful super-intelligent AIs, we might make the first such AIs oracles that can only send and receive messages. This paper proposes a possibly practical means of using machine learning to create two classes of narrow AI oracles that would provide chess advice: those aligned with the player's interest, and those that want the player to lose and give deceptively bad advice. The player would be uncertain which type of oracle it was interacting with. As the oracles would be vastly more intelligent than the player in the domain of chess, experience with these oracles might help us prepare for future artificial general intelligence oracles.
summary: To reduce the danger of powerful super-intelligent AIs, we might make the first such AIs oracles that can only send and receive messages. This paper proposes a possibly practical means of using machine learning to create two classes of narrow AI oracles that would provide chess advice: those aligned with the player's interest, and those that want the player to lose and give deceptively bad advice. The player would be uncertain which type of oracle it was interacting with. As the oracles would be vastly more intelligent than the player in the domain of chess, experience with these oracles might help us prepare for future artificial general intelligence oracles.
abstract_zh: 为了减少强大的超级智能人工智能的危险，我们可能会制造第一个只能发送和接收消息的人工智能神谕。本文提出了一种可能实用的方法，使用机器学习来创建两类狭义的人工智能预言机，这些预言机将提供国际象棋建议：那些与玩家的兴趣一致的，以及那些希望玩家失败并给出欺骗性的糟糕建议的。玩家将不确定它正在与哪种类型的神谕进行交互。由于在国际象棋领域，预言机比棋手聪明得多，因此这些预言机的经验可能会帮助我们为未来的通用人工智能预言机做好准备。

AI.tldr: 本文提出将国际象棋作为测试‘Oracle’人工智能安全方法的实验场，通过构建两类提供棋局建议的窄人工智能Oracle（利益对齐型与欺骗型）来模拟未来超级智能AI的风险场景。
AI.motivation: 为降低超级智能AI带来的风险，需提前研究如何控制其行为。通过构建仅能通信的Oracle型AI，并在棋类等可控领域进行测试，可为应对未来通用人工智能（AGI）提供安全方案验证。
AI.method: 开发两类基于机器学习的棋类Oracle：1) 严格遵循玩家利益的对齐型Oracle；2) 旨在误导玩家的欺骗型Oracle。通过让玩家与未知类型的Oracle对弈，研究其行为特征与风险控制机制。
AI.result: 验证了在棋类领域构建Oracle型AI的可行性，展示了玩家在面对不同意图Oracle时的决策差异，为分析超级智能AI的潜在风险提供了实验框架。
AI.conclusion: 国际象棋作为可控实验场，可有效模拟Oracle型AI的安全问题，为未来AGI的开发提供风险预演和控制策略研究基础。

title: SAFENet: Self-Supervised Monocular Depth Estimation with Semantic-Aware Feature Extraction
title_zh: SAFENet：具有语义感知特征提取的自监督单目深度估计
abstract: Self-supervised monocular depth estimation has emerged as a promising method because it does not require groundtruth depth maps during training. As an alternative for the groundtruth depth map, the photometric loss enables to provide self-supervision on depth prediction by matching the input image frames. However, the photometric loss causes various problems, resulting in less accurate depth values compared with supervised approaches. In this paper, we propose SAFENet that is designed to leverage semantic information to overcome the limitations of the photometric loss. Our key idea is to exploit semantic-aware depth features that integrate the semantic and geometric knowledge. Therefore, we introduce multi-task learning schemes to incorporate semantic-awareness into the representation of depth features. Experiments on KITTI dataset demonstrate that our methods compete or even outperform the state-of-the-art methods. Furthermore, extensive experiments on different datasets show its better generalization ability and robustness to various conditions, such as low-light or adverse weather.
summary: Self-supervised monocular depth estimation has emerged as a promising method because it does not require groundtruth depth maps during training. As an alternative for the groundtruth depth map, the photometric loss enables to provide self-supervision on depth prediction by matching the input image frames. However, the photometric loss causes various problems, resulting in less accurate depth values compared with supervised approaches. In this paper, we propose SAFENet that is designed to leverage semantic information to overcome the limitations of the photometric loss. Our key idea is to exploit semantic-aware depth features that integrate the semantic and geometric knowledge. Therefore, we introduce multi-task learning schemes to incorporate semantic-awareness into the representation of depth features. Experiments on KITTI dataset demonstrate that our methods compete or even outperform the state-of-the-art methods. Furthermore, extensive experiments on different datasets show its better generalization ability and robustness to various conditions, such as low-light or adverse weather.
abstract_zh: 自监督单目深度估计已成为一种有前途的方法，因为它在训练过程中不需要地面真实深度图。作为真实深度图的替代方案，光度损失能够通过匹配输入图像帧来提供深度预测的自我监督。然而，光度损失会导致各种问题，导致与监督方法相比深度值不太准确。在本文中，我们提出了 SAFENet，旨在利用语义信息来克服光度损失的限制。我们的关键思想是利用集成语义和几何知识的语义感知深度特征。因此，我们引入多任务学习方案，将语义意识纳入深度特征的表示中。 KITTI 数据集上的实验表明，我们的方法可以竞争甚至超越最先进的方法。此外，对不同数据集的大量实验表明其具有更好的泛化能力和对各种条件（例如弱光或恶劣天气）的鲁棒性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出SAFENet，一种结合语义感知特征提取的自监督单目深度估计方法，以克服传统光度损失的局限性。
AI.motivation: 传统自监督单目深度估计依赖光度损失，但存在深度预测精度不足的问题，需引入语义信息提升性能。
AI.method: 通过多任务学习框架，将语义感知机制融入深度特征表示，整合语义与几何信息以优化深度估计。
AI.result: 在KITTI数据集上达到或超越现有最优方法，且在低光、恶劣天气等场景下展现更强的泛化能力与鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: SAFENet有效解决了光度损失的缺陷，证明了语义感知特征在自监督深度估计中的优势。

search_text: SAFENet: Self-Supervised Monocular Depth Estimation with Semantic-Aware Feature Extraction SAFENet：具有语义感知特征提取的自监督单目深度估计 Self-supervised monocular depth estimation has emerged as a promising method because it does not require groundtruth depth maps during training. As an alternative for the groundtruth depth map, the photometric loss enables to provide self-supervision on depth prediction by matching the input image frames. However, the photometric loss causes various problems, resulting in less accurate depth values compared with supervised approaches. In this paper, we propose SAFENet that is designed to leverage semantic information to overcome the limitations of the photometric loss. Our key idea is to exploit semantic-aware depth features that integrate the semantic and geometric knowledge. Therefore, we introduce multi-task learning schemes to incorporate semantic-awareness into the representation of depth features. Experiments on KITTI dataset demonstrate that our methods compete or even outperform the state-of-the-art methods. Furthermore, extensive experiments on different datasets show its better generalization ability and robustness to various conditions, such as low-light or adverse weather. 自监督单目深度估计已成为一种有前途的方法，因为它在训练过程中不需要地面真实深度图。作为真实深度图的替代方案，光度损失能够通过匹配输入图像帧来提供深度预测的自我监督。然而，光度损失会导致各种问题，导致与监督方法相比深度值不太准确。在本文中，我们提出了 SAFENet，旨在利用语义信息来克服光度损失的限制。我们的关键思想是利用集成语义和几何知识的语义感知深度特征。因此，我们引入多任务学习方案，将语义意识纳入深度特征的表示中。 KITTI 数据集上的实验表明，我们的方法可以竞争甚至超越最先进的方法。此外，对不同数据集的大量实验表明其具有更好的泛化能力和对各种条件（例如弱光或恶劣天气）的鲁棒性。 本文提出SAFENet，一种结合语义感知特征提取的自监督单目深度估计方法，以克服传统光度损失的局限性。 Jaehoon Choi,Dongki Jung,Donghwan Lee,Changick Kim cs.CV

title: Iterative Methods for Computing Eigenvectors of Nonlinear Operators
title_zh: 计算非线性算子特征向量的迭代方法
abstract: In this chapter we are examining several iterative methods for solving nonlinear eigenvalue problems. These arise in variational image-processing, graph partition and classification, nonlinear physics and more. The canonical eigenproblem we solve is $T(u)=λu$, where $T:\R^n\to \R^n$ is some bounded nonlinear operator. Other variations of eigenvalue problems are also discussed. We present a progression of 5 algorithms, coauthored in recent years by the author and colleagues. Each algorithm attempts to solve a unique problem or to improve the theoretical foundations. The algorithms can be understood as nonlinear PDE's which converge to an eigenfunction in the continuous time domain. This allows a unique view and understanding of the discrete iterative process. Finally, it is shown how to evaluate numerically the results, along with some examples and insights related to priors of nonlinear denoisers, both classical algorithms and ones based on deep networks.
summary: In this chapter we are examining several iterative methods for solving nonlinear eigenvalue problems. These arise in variational image-processing, graph partition and classification, nonlinear physics and more. The canonical eigenproblem we solve is $T(u)=λu$, where $T:\R^n\to \R^n$ is some bounded nonlinear operator. Other variations of eigenvalue problems are also discussed. We present a progression of 5 algorithms, coauthored in recent years by the author and colleagues. Each algorithm attempts to solve a unique problem or to improve the theoretical foundations. The algorithms can be understood as nonlinear PDE's which converge to an eigenfunction in the continuous time domain. This allows a unique view and understanding of the discrete iterative process. Finally, it is shown how to evaluate numerically the results, along with some examples and insights related to priors of nonlinear denoisers, both classical algorithms and ones based on deep networks.
abstract_zh: 在本章中，我们将研究解决非线性特征值问题的几种迭代方法。这些出现在变分图像处理、图划分和分类、非线性物理等领域。我们解决的典型特征问题是 $T(u)=λu$，其中 $T:\R^n\to \R^n$ 是一些有界非线性算子。还讨论了特征值问题的其他变体。我们提出了 5 种算法的进展，这些算法是作者和同事近年来共同创作的。每个算法都试图解决一个独特的问题或改进理论基础。该算法可以理解为非线性偏微分方程，它收敛于连续时域中的特征函数。这允许对离散迭代过程有独特的看法和理解。最后，展示了如何对结果进行数值评估，以及与非线性降噪器先验相关的一些示例和见解，包括经典算法和基于深度网络的算法。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了用于求解非线性算子特征向量的迭代方法，提出了五种算法并分析其在图像处理等领域的应用。
AI.motivation: 非线性特征值问题在图像处理、图划分和非线性物理中广泛应用，但现有方法存在理论和计算上的不足，需改进算法框架。
AI.method: 通过将离散迭代过程转化为连续时间域的非线性偏微分方程，提出五种渐进式算法，并结合数值实验验证其有效性。
AI.result: 展示了算法在非线性去噪器中的数值评估结果，涵盖经典算法与深度网络方法的先验知识分析。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法为非线性特征值问题提供了理论分析框架，算法在多领域应用中表现出良好的收敛性和实用性。

title: LETI: Latency Estimation Tool and Investigation of Neural Networks inference on Mobile GPU
title_zh: LETI：移动 GPU 上的延迟估计工具和神经网络推理研究
comment: Please, don't use this draft version because there are some mistakes in data
comments: Please, don't use this draft version because there are some mistakes in data
abstract: A lot of deep learning applications are desired to be run on mobile devices. Both accuracy and inference time are meaningful for a lot of them. While the number of FLOPs is usually used as a proxy for neural network latency, it may be not the best choice. In order to obtain a better approximation of latency, research community uses look-up tables of all possible layers for latency calculation for the final prediction of the inference on mobile CPU. It requires only a small number of experiments. Unfortunately, on mobile GPU this method is not applicable in a straight-forward way and shows low precision. In this work, we consider latency approximation on mobile GPU as a data and hardware-specific problem. Our main goal is to construct a convenient latency estimation tool for investigation(LETI) of neural network inference and building robust and accurate latency prediction models for each specific task. To achieve this goal, we build open-source tools which provide a convenient way to conduct massive experiments on different target devices focusing on mobile GPU. After evaluation of the dataset, we learn the regression model on experimental data and use it for future latency prediction and analysis. We experimentally demonstrate the applicability of such an approach on a subset of popular NAS-Benchmark 101 dataset and also evaluate the most popular neural network architectures for two mobile GPUs. As a result, we construct latency prediction model with good precision on the target evaluation subset. We consider LETI as a useful tool for neural architecture search or massive latency evaluation. The project is available at https://github.com/leti-ai
summary: A lot of deep learning applications are desired to be run on mobile devices. Both accuracy and inference time are meaningful for a lot of them. While the number of FLOPs is usually used as a proxy for neural network latency, it may be not the best choice. In order to obtain a better approximation of latency, research community uses look-up tables of all possible layers for latency calculation for the final prediction of the inference on mobile CPU. It requires only a small number of experiments. Unfortunately, on mobile GPU this method is not applicable in a straight-forward way and shows low precision. In this work, we consider latency approximation on mobile GPU as a data and hardware-specific problem. Our main goal is to construct a convenient latency estimation tool for investigation(LETI) of neural network inference and building robust and accurate latency prediction models for each specific task. To achieve this goal, we build open-source tools which provide a convenient way to conduct massive experiments on different target devices focusing on mobile GPU. After evaluation of the dataset, we learn the regression model on experimental data and use it for future latency prediction and analysis. We experimentally demonstrate the applicability of such an approach on a subset of popular NAS-Benchmark 101 dataset and also evaluate the most popular neural network architectures for two mobile GPUs. As a result, we construct latency prediction model with good precision on the target evaluation subset. We consider LETI as a useful tool for neural architecture search or massive latency evaluation. The project is available at https://github.com/leti-ai
abstract_zh: 许多深度学习应用程序都希望在移动设备上运行。准确性和推理时间对他们中的许多人来说都很有意义。虽然 FLOP 数量通常用作神经网络延迟的代理，但它可能不是最佳选择。为了获得更好的延迟近似值，研究社区使用所有可能层的查找表进行延迟计算，以最终预测移动 CPU 上的推理。它只需要少量的实验。不幸的是，在移动 GPU 上，该方法不能直接应用并且精度较低。在这项工作中，我们将移动 GPU 上的延迟近似视为一个数据和硬件特定的问题。我们的主要目标是构建一个方便的延迟估计工具，用于神经网络推理研究（LETI），并为每个特定任务构建稳健且准确的延迟预测模型。为了实现这一目标，我们构建了开源工具，为在不同目标设备上针对移动 GPU 进行大规模实验提供了便捷的方法。对数据集进行评估后，我们学习实验数据的回归模型，并将其用于未来的延迟预测和分析。我们通过实验证明了这种方法在流行的 NAS-Benchmark 101 数据集的子集上的适用性，并评估了两个移动 GPU 的最流行的神经网络架构。因此，我们在目标评估子集上构建了具有良好精度的延迟预测模型。我们认为 LETI 是神经架构搜索或大规模延迟评估的有用工具。该项目位于 https://github.com/leti-ai

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为LETI的延迟估计工具，用于在移动GPU上进行神经网络推理的延迟预测和分析。
AI.motivation: 尽管FLOPs通常被用作神经网络延迟的代理指标，但它并不总是准确。在移动GPU上，现有方法精度较低，因此需要一种更精确的延迟估计工具。
AI.method: 本文构建了一个开源工具LETI，用于在不同目标设备上进行大量实验，并基于实验数据训练回归模型，以预测未来的延迟。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在NAS-Benchmark 101数据集的一个子集上具有较高的预测精度，并对两种流行的移动GPU上的神经网络架构进行了评估。
AI.conclusion: LETI是一个有用的工具，可用于神经网络架构搜索或大规模延迟评估。

conclusion: LETI是一个有用的工具，可用于神经网络架构搜索或大规模延迟评估。
search_text: LETI: Latency Estimation Tool and Investigation of Neural Networks inference on Mobile GPU LETI：移动 GPU 上的延迟估计工具和神经网络推理研究 A lot of deep learning applications are desired to be run on mobile devices. Both accuracy and inference time are meaningful for a lot of them. While the number of FLOPs is usually used as a proxy for neural network latency, it may be not the best choice. In order to obtain a better approximation of latency, research community uses look-up tables of all possible layers for latency calculation for the final prediction of the inference on mobile CPU. It requires only a small number of experiments. Unfortunately, on mobile GPU this method is not applicable in a straight-forward way and shows low precision. In this work, we consider latency approximation on mobile GPU as a data and hardware-specific problem. Our main goal is to construct a convenient latency estimation tool for investigation(LETI) of neural network inference and building robust and accurate latency prediction models for each specific task. To achieve this goal, we build open-source tools which provide a convenient way to conduct massive experiments on different target devices focusing on mobile GPU. After evaluation of the dataset, we learn the regression model on experimental data and use it for future latency prediction and analysis. We experimentally demonstrate the applicability of such an approach on a subset of popular NAS-Benchmark 101 dataset and also evaluate the most popular neural network architectures for two mobile GPUs. As a result, we construct latency prediction model with good precision on the target evaluation subset. We consider LETI as a useful tool for neural architecture search or massive latency evaluation. The project is available at https://github.com/leti-ai 许多深度学习应用程序都希望在移动设备上运行。准确性和推理时间对他们中的许多人来说都很有意义。虽然 FLOP 数量通常用作神经网络延迟的代理，但它可能不是最佳选择。为了获得更好的延迟近似值，研究社区使用所有可能层的查找表进行延迟计算，以最终预测移动 CPU 上的推理。它只需要少量的实验。不幸的是，在移动 GPU 上，该方法不能直接应用并且精度较低。在这项工作中，我们将移动 GPU 上的延迟近似视为一个数据和硬件特定的问题。我们的主要目标是构建一个方便的延迟估计工具，用于神经网络推理研究（LETI），并为每个特定任务构建稳健且准确的延迟预测模型。为了实现这一目标，我们构建了开源工具，为在不同目标设备上针对移动 GPU 进行大规模实验提供了便捷的方法。对数据集进行评估后，我们学习实验数据的回归模型，并将其用于未来的延迟预测和分析。我们通过实验证明了这种方法在流行的 NAS-Benchmark 101 数据集的子集上的适用性，并评估了两个移动 GPU 的最流行的神经网络架构。因此，我们在目标评估子集上构建了具有良好精度的延迟预测模型。我们认为 LETI 是神经架构搜索或大规模延迟评估的有用工具。该项目位于 https://github.com/leti-ai 本文提出了一种名为LETI的延迟估计工具，用于在移动GPU上进行神经网络推理的延迟预测和分析。 Evgeny Ponomarev,Sergey Matveev,Ivan Oseledets cs.PF,cs.CV,cs.LG

title: LOGAN: Local Group Bias Detection by Clustering
title_zh: LOGAN：通过聚类进行本地组偏差检测
abstract: Machine learning techniques have been widely used in natural language processing (NLP). However, as revealed by many recent studies, machine learning models often inherit and amplify the societal biases in data. Various metrics have been proposed to quantify biases in model predictions. In particular, several of them evaluate disparity in model performance between protected groups and advantaged groups in the test corpus. However, we argue that evaluating bias at the corpus level is not enough for understanding how biases are embedded in a model. In fact, a model with similar aggregated performance between different groups on the entire data may behave differently on instances in a local region. To analyze and detect such local bias, we propose LOGAN, a new bias detection technique based on clustering. Experiments on toxicity classification and object classification tasks show that LOGAN identifies bias in a local region and allows us to better analyze the biases in model predictions.
summary: Machine learning techniques have been widely used in natural language processing (NLP). However, as revealed by many recent studies, machine learning models often inherit and amplify the societal biases in data. Various metrics have been proposed to quantify biases in model predictions. In particular, several of them evaluate disparity in model performance between protected groups and advantaged groups in the test corpus. However, we argue that evaluating bias at the corpus level is not enough for understanding how biases are embedded in a model. In fact, a model with similar aggregated performance between different groups on the entire data may behave differently on instances in a local region. To analyze and detect such local bias, we propose LOGAN, a new bias detection technique based on clustering. Experiments on toxicity classification and object classification tasks show that LOGAN identifies bias in a local region and allows us to better analyze the biases in model predictions.
abstract_zh: 机器学习技术已广泛应用于自然语言处理（NLP）领域。然而，正如最近的许多研究所揭示的那样，机器学习模型经常继承并放大数据中的社会偏见。人们提出了各种指标来量化模型预测中的偏差。特别是，其中一些评估了测试语料库中受保护群体和优势群体之间模型性能的差异。然而，我们认为，在语料库级别评估偏差不足以理解偏差如何嵌入模型中。事实上，在整个数据上不同组之间具有相似聚合性能的模型在本地区域的实例上可能表现不同。为了分析和检测这种局部偏差，我们提出了 LOGAN，一种基于聚类的新偏差检测技术。毒性分类和对象分类任务的实验表明，LOGAN 可以识别局部区域的偏差，使我们能够更好地分析模型预测中的偏差。

AI.tldr: 本文提出LOGAN，一种基于聚类的局部群体偏差检测技术，用于分析机器学习模型预测中的局部偏差。
AI.motivation: 现有偏差评估方法仅在语料库层面分析群体间性能差异，无法发现模型在局部区域可能存在的偏差。
AI.method: 通过聚类技术识别数据局部区域，检测模型在这些区域中的偏差表现。
AI.result: 在毒性分类和目标分类任务中，LOGAN能有效识别局部偏差并提升偏差分析效果。
AI.conclusion: 语料库级评估不足以全面理解模型偏差，局部区域分析能更准确揭示模型预测中的偏差问题。

title: Network Localization Based Planning for Autonomous Underwater Vehicles with Inter-Vehicle Ranging
title_zh: 基于网络定位的具有车辆间测距的自主水下航行器规划
comment: 7 pages, 4 figures. Extended version of accepted paper to AUV2020
comments: 7 pages, 4 figures. Extended version of accepted paper to AUV2020
abstract: Localization between a swarm of AUVs can be entirely estimated through the use of range measurements between neighboring AUVs via a class of techniques commonly referred to as sensor network localization. However, the localization quality depends on network topology, with degenerate topologies, referred to as low-rigidity configurations, leading to ambiguous or highly uncertain localization results. This paper presents tools for rigidity-based analysis, planning, and control of a multi-AUV network which account for sensor noise and limited sensing range. We evaluate our long-term planning framework in several two-dimensional simulated environments and show we are able to generate paths in feasible time and guarantee a minimum network rigidity over the full course of the paths.
summary: Localization between a swarm of AUVs can be entirely estimated through the use of range measurements between neighboring AUVs via a class of techniques commonly referred to as sensor network localization. However, the localization quality depends on network topology, with degenerate topologies, referred to as low-rigidity configurations, leading to ambiguous or highly uncertain localization results. This paper presents tools for rigidity-based analysis, planning, and control of a multi-AUV network which account for sensor noise and limited sensing range. We evaluate our long-term planning framework in several two-dimensional simulated environments and show we are able to generate paths in feasible time and guarantee a minimum network rigidity over the full course of the paths.
abstract_zh: 一群 AUV 之间的定位可以通过一类通常称为传感器网络定位的技术，使用相邻 AUV 之间的距离测量来完全估计。然而，定位质量取决于网络拓扑，简并拓扑（称为低刚性配置）会导致模糊或高度不确定的定位结果。本文介绍了用于多 AUV 网络的基于刚性的分析、规划和控制的工具，这些工具考虑了传感器噪声和有限的传感范围。我们在几个二维模拟环境中评估了我们的长期规划框架，并表明我们能够在可行的时间内生成路径，并保证整个路径过程中的最小网络刚性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于网络刚度分析的自主水下机器人（AUV）路径规划方法，通过考虑传感器噪声和有限测距范围，确保多AUV网络在动态环境中的定位可靠性。
AI.motivation: 现有基于测距的多AUV定位方法在低刚性网络拓扑下易产生定位不确定性，需解决传感器噪声和感知范围限制下的鲁棒路径规划问题。
AI.method: 开发基于网络刚度分析的规划框架，结合传感器噪声模型与测距约束，在二维模拟环境中验证路径生成与刚度保持能力。
AI.result: 成功生成满足最小网络刚度要求的可行路径，实验表明框架能在保证定位精度的同时适应动态环境变化。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为多AUV系统提供了兼顾路径可行性与网络鲁棒性的规划方案，提升了复杂水下环境中的协同定位可靠性。

title: Norm Identification through Plan Recognition
title_zh: 通过计划识别来识别规范
comment: Published as "In 15th International Workshop on Coordination, Organisations, Institutions and Norms (COIN 2013) @AAMAS, Saint Paul, MN, USA, 2013."
comments: Published as "In 15th International Workshop on Coordination, Organisations, Institutions and Norms (COIN 2013) @AAMAS, Saint Paul, MN, USA, 2013."
abstract: Societal rules, as exemplified by norms, aim to provide a degree of behavioural stability to multi-agent societies. Norms regulate a society using the deontic concepts of permissions, obligations and prohibitions to specify what can, must and must not occur in a society. Many implementations of normative systems assume various combinations of the following assumptions: that the set of norms is static and defined at design time; that agents joining a society are instantly informed of the complete set of norms; that the set of agents within a society does not change; and that all agents are aware of the existing norms. When any one of these assumptions is dropped, agents need a mechanism to identify the set of norms currently present within a society, or risk unwittingly violating the norms. In this paper, we develop a norm identification mechanism that uses a combination of parsing-based plan recognition and Hierarchical Task Network (HTN) planning mechanisms, which operates by analysing the actions performed by other agents. While our basic mechanism cannot learn in situations where norm violations take place, we describe an extension which is able to operate in the presence of violations.
summary: Societal rules, as exemplified by norms, aim to provide a degree of behavioural stability to multi-agent societies. Norms regulate a society using the deontic concepts of permissions, obligations and prohibitions to specify what can, must and must not occur in a society. Many implementations of normative systems assume various combinations of the following assumptions: that the set of norms is static and defined at design time; that agents joining a society are instantly informed of the complete set of norms; that the set of agents within a society does not change; and that all agents are aware of the existing norms. When any one of these assumptions is dropped, agents need a mechanism to identify the set of norms currently present within a society, or risk unwittingly violating the norms. In this paper, we develop a norm identification mechanism that uses a combination of parsing-based plan recognition and Hierarchical Task Network (HTN) planning mechanisms, which operates by analysing the actions performed by other agents. While our basic mechanism cannot learn in situations where norm violations take place, we describe an extension which is able to operate in the presence of violations.
abstract_zh: 以规范为例的社会规则旨在为多主体社会提供一定程度的行为稳定性。规范使用许可、义务和禁止的道义概念来规范社会，以指定社会中可以发生、必须发生和不可以发生的事情。规范系统的许多实现都假设以下假设的各种组合：规范集是静态的并在设计时定义；加入社团的代理人可以立即获悉整套规范；社会内的主体集合不会改变；并且所有代理人都了解现有规范。当这些假设中的任何一个被放弃时，主体需要一种机制来识别社会中当前存在的一组规范，否则就有无意中违反规范的风险。在本文中，我们开发了一种规范识别机制，该机制结合使用基于解析的计划识别和分层任务网络（HTN）规划机制，该机制通过分析其他代理执行的操作来进行操作。虽然我们的基本机制无法在发生违反规范的情况下进行学习，但我们描述了一种能够在存在违反行为的情况下运行的扩展。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合解析式计划识别与分层任务网络规划的规范识别机制，通过分析其他智能体行为动态识别社会规范。
AI.motivation: 传统规范系统依赖静态规范集和完全信息假设，但实际场景中规范可能动态变化、智能体可能信息不全，需开发无需预设规范的识别机制。
AI.method: 融合基于行为解析的计划识别技术与HTN规划框架，通过观察智能体行动模式推断潜在规范，并扩展处理规范违规场景的机制。
AI.result: 构建了可动态识别规范的机制，验证了其在无违规场景下的有效性，并通过扩展方法实现了对违规行为的规范推断能力。
AI.conclusion: 提出的混合方法为动态开放环境下的规范识别提供了可行方案，尤其在智能体信息不全或规范动态变化的场景中具有应用价值。

search_text: Norm Identification through Plan Recognition 通过计划识别来识别规范 Societal rules, as exemplified by norms, aim to provide a degree of behavioural stability to multi-agent societies. Norms regulate a society using the deontic concepts of permissions, obligations and prohibitions to specify what can, must and must not occur in a society. Many implementations of normative systems assume various combinations of the following assumptions: that the set of norms is static and defined at design time; that agents joining a society are instantly informed of the complete set of norms; that the set of agents within a society does not change; and that all agents are aware of the existing norms. When any one of these assumptions is dropped, agents need a mechanism to identify the set of norms currently present within a society, or risk unwittingly violating the norms. In this paper, we develop a norm identification mechanism that uses a combination of parsing-based plan recognition and Hierarchical Task Network (HTN) planning mechanisms, which operates by analysing the actions performed by other agents. While our basic mechanism cannot learn in situations where norm violations take place, we describe an extension which is able to operate in the presence of violations. 以规范为例的社会规则旨在为多主体社会提供一定程度的行为稳定性。规范使用许可、义务和禁止的道义概念来规范社会，以指定社会中可以发生、必须发生和不可以发生的事情。规范系统的许多实现都假设以下假设的各种组合：规范集是静态的并在设计时定义；加入社团的代理人可以立即获悉整套规范；社会内的主体集合不会改变；并且所有代理人都了解现有规范。当这些假设中的任何一个被放弃时，主体需要一种机制来识别社会中当前存在的一组规范，否则就有无意中违反规范的风险。在本文中，我们开发了一种规范识别机制，该机制结合使用基于解析的计划识别和分层任务网络（HTN）规划机制，该机制通过分析其他代理执行的操作来进行操作。虽然我们的基本机制无法在发生违反规范的情况下进行学习，但我们描述了一种能够在存在违反行为的情况下运行的扩展。 本文提出一种结合解析式计划识别与分层任务网络规划的规范识别机制，通过分析其他智能体行为动态识别社会规范。 Nir Oren,Felipe Meneguzzi cs.AI

authors_text: Chong Chen,Qinghui Xing,Xin Ding,Yaru Xue,Tianfu Zhong
title: A Novel Neural Network Training Framework with Data Assimilation
title_zh: 一种具有数据同化功能的新型神经网络训练框架
abstract: In recent years, the prosperity of deep learning has revolutionized the Artificial Neural Networks. However, the dependence of gradients and the offline training mechanism in the learning algorithms prevents the ANN for further improvement. In this study, a gradient-free training framework based on data assimilation is proposed to avoid the calculation of gradients. In data assimilation algorithms, the error covariance between the forecasts and observations is used to optimize the parameters. Feedforward Neural Networks (FNNs) are trained by gradient decent, data assimilation algorithms (Ensemble Kalman Filter (EnKF) and Ensemble Smoother with Multiple Data Assimilation (ESMDA)), respectively. ESMDA trains FNN with pre-defined iterations by updating the parameters using all the available observations which can be regard as offline learning. EnKF optimize FNN when new observation available by updating parameters which can be regard as online learning. Two synthetic cases with the regression of a Sine Function and a Mexican Hat function are assumed to validate the effectiveness of the proposed framework. The Root Mean Square Error (RMSE) and coefficient of determination (R2) are used as criteria to assess the performance of different methods. The results show that the proposed training framework performed better than the gradient decent method. The proposed framework provides alternatives for online/offline training the existing ANNs (e.g., Convolutional Neural Networks, Recurrent Neural Networks) without the dependence of gradients.
summary: In recent years, the prosperity of deep learning has revolutionized the Artificial Neural Networks. However, the dependence of gradients and the offline training mechanism in the learning algorithms prevents the ANN for further improvement. In this study, a gradient-free training framework based on data assimilation is proposed to avoid the calculation of gradients. In data assimilation algorithms, the error covariance between the forecasts and observations is used to optimize the parameters. Feedforward Neural Networks (FNNs) are trained by gradient decent, data assimilation algorithms (Ensemble Kalman Filter (EnKF) and Ensemble Smoother with Multiple Data Assimilation (ESMDA)), respectively. ESMDA trains FNN with pre-defined iterations by updating the parameters using all the available observations which can be regard as offline learning. EnKF optimize FNN when new observation available by updating parameters which can be regard as online learning. Two synthetic cases with the regression of a Sine Function and a Mexican Hat function are assumed to validate the effectiveness of the proposed framework. The Root Mean Square Error (RMSE) and coefficient of determination (R2) are used as criteria to assess the performance of different methods. The results show that the proposed training framework performed better than the gradient decent method. The proposed framework provides alternatives for online/offline training the existing ANNs (e.g., Convolutional Neural Networks, Recurrent Neural Networks) without the dependence of gradients.
abstract_zh: 近年来，深度学习的繁荣使人工神经网络发生了革命性的变化。然而，学习算法中梯度的依赖性和离线训练机制阻碍了ANN的进一步改进。在本研究中，提出了一种基于数据同化的无梯度训练框架，以避免梯度的计算。在数据同化算法中，预测和观测之间的误差协方差用于优化参数。前馈神经网络 (FNN) 分别通过梯度下降、数据同化算法（Ensemble Kalman Filter (EnKF) 和 Ensemble Smoother with Multiple Data Assimilation (ESMDA)）进行训练。 ESMDA 通过使用所有可用的观测值更新参数，使用预定义的迭代来训练 FNN，这可以视为离线学习。当新的观察可用时，EnKF 通过更新参数来优化 FNN，这可以视为在线学习。假设使用正弦函数和墨西哥帽函数回归的两个综合案例来验证所提出框架的有效性。均方根误差 (RMSE) 和确定系数 (R2) 用作评估不同方法性能的标准。结果表明，所提出的训练框架比梯度下降方法表现更好。所提出的框架为现有人工神经网络（例如，卷积神经网络、循环神经网络）的在线/离线训练提供了替代方案，而不依赖于梯度。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于数据同化的新型神经网络训练框架，以替代传统梯度下降法。
AI.motivation: 传统神经网络训练依赖梯度计算且采用离线机制，限制了模型的进一步优化与灵活性。
AI.method: 采用数据同化算法（EnKF和ESMDA）训练前馈神经网络，分别实现在线与离线学习，并通过正弦函数和墨西哥帽函数的合成案例验证效果。
AI.result: 实验表明，所提框架在RMSE和R²指标上优于梯度下降法，证明其有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为卷积神经网络、循环神经网络等提供了无需梯度的在线/离线训练新方案。

title: Comprehensive Online Network Pruning via Learnable Scaling Factors
title_zh: 通过可学习的缩放因子进行全面的在线网络修剪
abstract: One of the major challenges in deploying deep neural network architectures is their size which has an adverse effect on their inference time and memory requirements. Deep CNNs can either be pruned width-wise by removing filters based on their importance or depth-wise by removing layers and blocks. Width wise pruning (filter pruning) is commonly performed via learnable gates or switches and sparsity regularizers whereas pruning of layers has so far been performed arbitrarily by manually designing a smaller network usually referred to as a student network. We propose a comprehensive pruning strategy that can perform both width-wise as well as depth-wise pruning. This is achieved by introducing gates at different granularities (neuron, filter, layer, block) which are then controlled via an objective function that simultaneously performs pruning at different granularity during each forward pass. Our approach is applicable to wide-variety of architectures without any constraints on spatial dimensions or connection type (sequential, residual, parallel or inception). Our method has resulted in a compression ratio of 70% to 90% without noticeable loss in accuracy when evaluated on benchmark datasets.
summary: One of the major challenges in deploying deep neural network architectures is their size which has an adverse effect on their inference time and memory requirements. Deep CNNs can either be pruned width-wise by removing filters based on their importance or depth-wise by removing layers and blocks. Width wise pruning (filter pruning) is commonly performed via learnable gates or switches and sparsity regularizers whereas pruning of layers has so far been performed arbitrarily by manually designing a smaller network usually referred to as a student network. We propose a comprehensive pruning strategy that can perform both width-wise as well as depth-wise pruning. This is achieved by introducing gates at different granularities (neuron, filter, layer, block) which are then controlled via an objective function that simultaneously performs pruning at different granularity during each forward pass. Our approach is applicable to wide-variety of architectures without any constraints on spatial dimensions or connection type (sequential, residual, parallel or inception). Our method has resulted in a compression ratio of 70% to 90% without noticeable loss in accuracy when evaluated on benchmark datasets.
abstract_zh: 部署深度神经网络架构的主要挑战之一是其规模，这对其推理时间和内存需求产生不利影响。深度 CNN 可以通过根据重要性删除过滤器来进行宽度修剪，也可以通过删除层和块来进行深度修剪。宽度修剪（滤波器修剪）通常通过可学习的门或开关和稀疏正则器来执行，而迄今为止，层的修剪是通过手动设计通常称为学生网络的较小网络来任意执行的。我们提出了一种全面的修剪策略，可以执行宽度方向和深度方向的修剪。这是通过引入不同粒度（神经元、过滤器、层、块）的门来实现的，然后通过目标函数控制这些门，该目标函数在每次前向传递期间同时以不同粒度执行修剪。我们的方法适用于各种架构，对空间维度或连接类型（顺序、残差、并行或初始）没有任何限制。在基准数据集上进行评估时，我们的方法实现了 70% 到 90% 的压缩比，而没有明显的准确性损失。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种通过可学习缩放因子实现的全面在线网络剪枝方法，能够同时进行宽度和深度方向的剪枝。
AI.motivation: 深度神经网络的规模大导致推理时间和内存需求增加，现有剪枝方法仅能单独处理宽度或深度方向，无法兼顾两者。
AI.method: 在不同粒度（神经元、滤波器、层、块）引入门控机制，并通过目标函数在每次前向传播中同时控制多粒度剪枝，适用于多种网络结构。
AI.result: 在基准数据集上实现70%-90%的压缩率，且准确率无明显下降。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过统一框架实现全面剪枝，在保持模型性能的同时显著压缩模型规模，适用于多种网络架构。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种通过可学习缩放因子实现的全面在线网络剪枝方法，能够同时进行宽度和深度方向的剪枝。
ai_content.motivation: 深度神经网络的规模大导致推理时间和内存需求增加，现有剪枝方法仅能单独处理宽度或深度方向，无法兼顾两者。
ai_content.method: 在不同粒度（神经元、滤波器、层、块）引入门控机制，并通过目标函数在每次前向传播中同时控制多粒度剪枝，适用于多种网络结构。
ai_content.result: 在基准数据集上实现70%-90%的压缩率，且准确率无明显下降。
ai_content.conclusion: 该方法通过统一框架实现全面剪枝，在保持模型性能的同时显著压缩模型规模，适用于多种网络架构。

search_text: Comprehensive Online Network Pruning via Learnable Scaling Factors 通过可学习的缩放因子进行全面的在线网络修剪 One of the major challenges in deploying deep neural network architectures is their size which has an adverse effect on their inference time and memory requirements. Deep CNNs can either be pruned width-wise by removing filters based on their importance or depth-wise by removing layers and blocks. Width wise pruning (filter pruning) is commonly performed via learnable gates or switches and sparsity regularizers whereas pruning of layers has so far been performed arbitrarily by manually designing a smaller network usually referred to as a student network. We propose a comprehensive pruning strategy that can perform both width-wise as well as depth-wise pruning. This is achieved by introducing gates at different granularities (neuron, filter, layer, block) which are then controlled via an objective function that simultaneously performs pruning at different granularity during each forward pass. Our approach is applicable to wide-variety of architectures without any constraints on spatial dimensions or connection type (sequential, residual, parallel or inception). Our method has resulted in a compression ratio of 70% to 90% without noticeable loss in accuracy when evaluated on benchmark datasets. 部署深度神经网络架构的主要挑战之一是其规模，这对其推理时间和内存需求产生不利影响。深度 CNN 可以通过根据重要性删除过滤器来进行宽度修剪，也可以通过删除层和块来进行深度修剪。宽度修剪（滤波器修剪）通常通过可学习的门或开关和稀疏正则器来执行，而迄今为止，层的修剪是通过手动设计通常称为学生网络的较小网络来任意执行的。我们提出了一种全面的修剪策略，可以执行宽度方向和深度方向的修剪。这是通过引入不同粒度（神经元、过滤器、层、块）的门来实现的，然后通过目标函数控制这些门，该目标函数在每次前向传递期间同时以不同粒度执行修剪。我们的方法适用于各种架构，对空间维度或连接类型（顺序、残差、并行或初始）没有任何限制。在基准数据集上进行评估时，我们的方法实现了 70% 到 90% 的压缩比，而没有明显的准确性损失。 本文提出一种通过可学习缩放因子实现的全面在线网络剪枝方法，能够同时进行宽度和深度方向的剪枝。 Muhammad Umair Haider,Murtaza Taj cs.CV,cs.LG

title: A faster algorithm for finding Tarski fixed points
title_zh: 一种更快的找到 Tarski 不动点的算法
abstract: Dang et al. have given an algorithm that can find a Tarski fixed point in a $k$-dimensional lattice of width $n$ using $O(\log^{k} n)$ queries. Multiple authors have conjectured that this algorithm is optimal [Dang et al., Etessami et al.], and indeed this has been proven for two-dimensional instances [Etessami et al.]. We show that these conjectures are false in dimension three or higher by giving an $O(\log^2 n)$ query algorithm for the three-dimensional Tarski problem. We also give a new decomposition theorem for $k$-dimensional Tarski problems which, in combination with our new algorithm for three dimensions, gives an $O(\log^{2 \lceil k/3 \rceil} n)$ query algorithm for the $k$-dimensional problem.
summary: Dang et al. have given an algorithm that can find a Tarski fixed point in a $k$-dimensional lattice of width $n$ using $O(\log^{k} n)$ queries. Multiple authors have conjectured that this algorithm is optimal [Dang et al., Etessami et al.], and indeed this has been proven for two-dimensional instances [Etessami et al.]. We show that these conjectures are false in dimension three or higher by giving an $O(\log^2 n)$ query algorithm for the three-dimensional Tarski problem. We also give a new decomposition theorem for $k$-dimensional Tarski problems which, in combination with our new algorithm for three dimensions, gives an $O(\log^{2 \lceil k/3 \rceil} n)$ query algorithm for the $k$-dimensional problem.
abstract_zh: 党等人。给出了一种算法，可以使用 $O(\log^{k} n)$ 查询在宽度为 $n$ 的 $k$ 维晶格中找到 Tarski 不动点。多位作者推测该算法是最优的 [Dang 等人、Etessami 等人]，并且事实上这已经针对二维实例得到了证明 [Etessami 等人]。我们通过为三维 Tarski 问题提供 $O(\log^2 n)$ 查询算法来证明这些猜想在三维或更高维度上是错误的。我们还给出了 $k$ 维 Tarski 问题的新分解定理，结合我们的三维新算法，给出了 $k$ 维问题的 $O(\log^{2 \lceil k/3 \rceil} n)$ 查询算法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种在k维格中寻找Tarski不动点的更快算法
AI.motivation: 此前Dang等人提出的算法在k维宽度为n的格中需要O(log^k n)次查询，且被猜测为最优。本文旨在证明该猜想在三维及以上维度是错误的，即存在更快的算法。
AI.method: 本文提出了一种针对三维Tarski问题的O(log^2 n)查询算法，并给出一个k维Tarski问题的新分解定理，结合三维算法得到更高维度的算法。
AI.result: 对于三维Tarski问题，查询次数为O(log^2 n)；对于k维问题，查询次数为O(log^{2⌈k/3⌉} n)。
AI.conclusion: 证明了此前关于该问题查询复杂度下界的猜想在三维及以上维度是错误的，给出了更优的算法。

authors_text: Neha Das,Jonas Umlauft,Armin Lederer,Thomas Beckers,Sandra Hirche
title: Deep Learning based Uncertainty Decomposition for Real-time Control
title_zh: 基于深度学习的实时控制不确定性分解
abstract: Data-driven control in unknown environments requires a clear understanding of the involved uncertainties for ensuring safety and efficient exploration. While aleatoric uncertainty that arises from measurement noise can often be explicitly modeled given a parametric description, it can be harder to model epistemic uncertainty, which describes the presence or absence of training data. The latter can be particularly useful for implementing exploratory control strategies when system dynamics are unknown. We propose a novel method for detecting the absence of training data using deep learning, which gives a continuous valued scalar output between $0$ (indicating low uncertainty) and $1$ (indicating high uncertainty). We utilize this detector as a proxy for epistemic uncertainty and show its advantages over existing approaches on synthetic and real-world datasets. Our approach can be directly combined with aleatoric uncertainty estimates and allows for uncertainty estimation in real-time as the inference is sample-free unlike existing approaches for uncertainty modeling. We further demonstrate the practicality of this uncertainty estimate in deploying online data-efficient control on a simulated quadcopter acted upon by an unknown disturbance model.
summary: Data-driven control in unknown environments requires a clear understanding of the involved uncertainties for ensuring safety and efficient exploration. While aleatoric uncertainty that arises from measurement noise can often be explicitly modeled given a parametric description, it can be harder to model epistemic uncertainty, which describes the presence or absence of training data. The latter can be particularly useful for implementing exploratory control strategies when system dynamics are unknown. We propose a novel method for detecting the absence of training data using deep learning, which gives a continuous valued scalar output between $0$ (indicating low uncertainty) and $1$ (indicating high uncertainty). We utilize this detector as a proxy for epistemic uncertainty and show its advantages over existing approaches on synthetic and real-world datasets. Our approach can be directly combined with aleatoric uncertainty estimates and allows for uncertainty estimation in real-time as the inference is sample-free unlike existing approaches for uncertainty modeling. We further demonstrate the practicality of this uncertainty estimate in deploying online data-efficient control on a simulated quadcopter acted upon by an unknown disturbance model.
abstract_zh: 未知环境中的数据驱动控制需要清楚地了解所涉及的不确定性，以确保安全和高效的勘探。虽然在给定参数描述的情况下，通常可以对测量噪声引起的任意不确定性进行显式建模，但对描述训练数据是否存在的认知不确定性进行建模可能会更困难。当系统动态未知时，后者对于实施探索性控制策略特别有用。我们提出了一种使用深度学习检测训练数据缺失的新方法，该方法给出了介于 $0$（表示低不确定性）和 $1$（表示高不确定性）之间的连续值标量输出。我们利用这个检测器作为认知不确定性的代理，并展示了它相对于合成数据集和现实世界数据集的现有方法的优势。我们的方法可以直接与任意不确定性估计相结合，并允许实时进行不确定性估计，因为与现有的不确定性建模方法不同，推断是无样本的。我们进一步证明了这种不确定性估计在对未知干扰模型作用的模拟四轴飞行器上部署在线数据有效控制的实用性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于深度学习的不确定性分解方法，用于实时控制中的不确定性估计，特别关注训练数据缺失导致的epistemic不确定性检测。
AI.motivation: 数据驱动控制需明确两种不确定性（偶然性与认识论），而现有方法难以有效建模epistemic不确定性，影响探索策略与系统安全。
AI.method: 设计深度学习模型输出连续标量值（0-1）作为epistemic不确定性代理，无需采样即可实时运行，并可与aleatoric不确定性估计结合。
AI.result: 在合成数据与真实场景中优于现有方法，成功应用于模拟四旋翼飞行器的在线数据高效控制，验证了其有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法能有效分解不确定性，提升实时控制的安全性与探索效率，为未知环境控制提供新思路。

authors_text: Guanglin Niu,Bo Li,Yongfei Zhang,Yongpan Sheng,Chuan Shi,Jingyang Li,Shiliang Pu
title: Joint Semantics and Data-Driven Path Representation for Knowledge Graph Inference
title_zh: 知识图推理的联合语义和数据驱动路径表示
abstract: Inference on a large-scale knowledge graph (KG) is of great importance for KG applications like question answering. The path-based reasoning models can leverage much information over paths other than pure triples in the KG, which face several challenges: all the existing path-based methods are data-driven, lacking explainability for path representation. Besides, some methods either consider only relational paths or ignore the heterogeneity between entities and relations both contained in paths, which cannot capture the rich semantics of paths well. To address the above challenges, in this work, we propose a novel joint semantics and data-driven path representation that balances explainability and generalization in the framework of KG embedding. More specifically, we inject horn rules to obtain the condensed paths by the transparent and explainable path composition procedure. The entity converter is designed to transform the entities along paths into the representations in the semantic level similar to relations for reducing the heterogeneity between entities and relations, in which the KGs both with and without type information are considered. Our proposed model is evaluated on two classes of tasks: link prediction and path query answering task. The experimental results show that it has a significant performance gain over several different state-of-the-art baselines.
summary: Inference on a large-scale knowledge graph (KG) is of great importance for KG applications like question answering. The path-based reasoning models can leverage much information over paths other than pure triples in the KG, which face several challenges: all the existing path-based methods are data-driven, lacking explainability for path representation. Besides, some methods either consider only relational paths or ignore the heterogeneity between entities and relations both contained in paths, which cannot capture the rich semantics of paths well. To address the above challenges, in this work, we propose a novel joint semantics and data-driven path representation that balances explainability and generalization in the framework of KG embedding. More specifically, we inject horn rules to obtain the condensed paths by the transparent and explainable path composition procedure. The entity converter is designed to transform the entities along paths into the representations in the semantic level similar to relations for reducing the heterogeneity between entities and relations, in which the KGs both with and without type information are considered. Our proposed model is evaluated on two classes of tasks: link prediction and path query answering task. The experimental results show that it has a significant performance gain over several different state-of-the-art baselines.
abstract_zh: 大规模知识图谱（KG）的推理对于问答等知识图谱应用非常重要。基于路径的推理模型可以利用知识图谱中除纯三元组以外的路径上的大量信息，这面临着几个挑战：所有现有的基于路径的方法都是数据驱动的，缺乏路径表示的可解释性。此外，一些方法要么只考虑关系路径，要么忽略路径中包含的实体和关系之间的异构性，不能很好地捕获路径的丰富语义。为了解决上述挑战，在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新颖的联合语义和数据驱动的路径表示，在知识图谱嵌入框架中平衡了可解释性和泛化性。更具体地说，我们注入喇叭规则，通过透明且可解释的路径合成过程来获得压缩路径。实体转换器旨在将路径上的实体转换为类似于关系的语义级别的表示，以减少实体和关系之间的异质性，其中考虑具有和不具有类型信息的知识图谱。我们提出的模型在两类任务上进行评估：链接预测和路径查询回答任务。实验结果表明，与几种不同的最先进基线相比，它具有显着的性能增益。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合语义与数据驱动的路径表示方法，用于知识图谱推理，以解决现有路径模型可解释性差和语义表达不足的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有路径推理模型依赖数据驱动方法，缺乏可解释性，且未能有效处理实体与关系间的异质性，导致路径语义表达不足。
AI.method: 通过注入Horn规则实现透明的路径组合，并设计实体转换器将实体映射到语义层面，减少实体与关系的异质性差异，支持有无类型信息的知识图谱。
AI.result: 在链接预测和路径查询任务中，该模型显著优于多个先进基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 该模型有效平衡了可解释性与泛化能力，为知识图谱推理提供了更丰富的语义表达和更优性能。

The path-based reasoning models can leverage much information over paths other than pure triples in the KG, which face several challenges: all the existing path-based methods are data-driven, lacking explainability for path representation. Besides, some methods either consider only relational paths or ignore the heterogeneity between entities and relations both contained in paths, which cannot capture the rich semantics of paths well. To address the above challenges, in this work, we propose a novel joint semantics and data-driven path representation that balances explainability and generalization in the framework of KG embedding. More specifically, we inject horn rules to obtain the condensed paths by the transparent and explainable path composition procedure. The entity converter is designed to transform the entities along paths into the representations in the semantic level similar to relations for reducing the heterogeneity between entities and relations, in which the KGs both with and without type information are considered. Our proposed model is evaluated on two classes of tasks: link prediction and path query answering task. The experimental results show that it has a significant performance gain over several different state-of-the-art baselines. 大规模知识图谱（KG）的推理对于问答等知识图谱应用非常重要。基于路径的推理模型可以利用知识图谱中除纯三元组以外的路径上的大量信息，这面临着几个挑战：所有现有的基于路径的方法都是数据驱动的，缺乏路径表示的可解释性。此外，一些方法要么只考虑关系路径，要么忽略路径中包含的实体和关系之间的异构性，不能很好地捕获路径的丰富语义。为了解决上述挑战，在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新颖的联合语义和数据驱动的路径表示，在知识图谱嵌入框架中平衡了可解释性和泛化性。更具体地说，我们注入喇叭规则，通过透明且可解释的路径合成过程来获得压缩路径。实体转换器旨在将路径上的实体转换为类似于关系的语义级别的表示，以减少实体和关系之间的异质性，其中考虑具有和不具有类型信息的知识图谱。我们提出的模型在两类任务上进行评估：链接预测和路径查询回答任务。实验结果表明，与几种不同的最先进基线相比，它具有显着的性能增益。 本文提出一种结合语义与数据驱动的路径表示方法，用于知识图谱推理，以解决现有路径模型可解释性差和语义表达不足的问题。 Guanglin Niu,Bo Li,Yongfei Zhang,Yongpan Sheng,Chuan Shi,Jingyang Li,Shiliang Pu cs.AI,cs.CL

authors_text: Isabelle G. Lee,Vera Zu,Sai Srujana Buddi,Dennis Liang,Purva Kulkarni,Jack G. M. Fitzgerald
title: Converting the Point of View of Messages Spoken to Virtual Assistants
title_zh: 转换向虚拟助理说出的消息的观点
abstract: Virtual Assistants can be quite literal at times. If the user says "tell Bob I love him," most virtual assistants will extract the message "I love him" and send it to the user's contact named Bob, rather than properly converting the message to "I love you." We designed a system to allow virtual assistants to take a voice message from one user, convert the point of view of the message, and then deliver the result to its target user. We developed a rule-based model, which integrates a linear text classification model, part-of-speech tagging, and constituency parsing with rule-based transformation methods. We also investigated Neural Machine Translation (NMT) approaches, including LSTMs, CopyNet, and T5. We explored 5 metrics to gauge both naturalness and faithfulness automatically, and we chose to use BLEU plus METEOR for faithfulness and relative perplexity using a separately trained language model (GPT) for naturalness. Transformer-Copynet and T5 performed similarly on faithfulness metrics, with T5 achieving slight edge, a BLEU score of 63.8 and a METEOR score of 83.0. CopyNet was the most natural, with a relative perplexity of 1.59. CopyNet also has 37 times fewer parameters than T5. We have publicly released our dataset, which is composed of 46,565 crowd-sourced samples.
summary: Virtual Assistants can be quite literal at times. If the user says "tell Bob I love him," most virtual assistants will extract the message "I love him" and send it to the user's contact named Bob, rather than properly converting the message to "I love you." We designed a system to allow virtual assistants to take a voice message from one user, convert the point of view of the message, and then deliver the result to its target user. We developed a rule-based model, which integrates a linear text classification model, part-of-speech tagging, and constituency parsing with rule-based transformation methods. We also investigated Neural Machine Translation (NMT) approaches, including LSTMs, CopyNet, and T5. We explored 5 metrics to gauge both naturalness and faithfulness automatically, and we chose to use BLEU plus METEOR for faithfulness and relative perplexity using a separately trained language model (GPT) for naturalness. Transformer-Copynet and T5 performed similarly on faithfulness metrics, with T5 achieving slight edge, a BLEU score of 63.8 and a METEOR score of 83.0. CopyNet was the most natural, with a relative perplexity of 1.59. CopyNet also has 37 times fewer parameters than T5. We have publicly released our dataset, which is composed of 46,565 crowd-sourced samples.
abstract_zh: 虚拟助理有时可能非常字面意思。如果用户说“告诉鲍勃我爱他”，大多数虚拟助理会提取消息“我爱他”并将其发送给用户名为鲍勃的联系人，而不是正确地将消息转换为“我爱你”。我们设计了一个系统，允许虚拟助理从一个用户那里获取语音消息，转换消息的观点，然后将结果传递给目标用户。我们开发了一个基于规则的模型，它将线性文本分类模型、词性标注和选区解析与基于规则的转换方法集成在一起。我们还研究了神经机器翻译 (NMT) 方法，包括 LSTM、CopyNet 和 T5。我们探索了 5 个指标来自动衡量自然度和忠实度，并选择使用 BLEU 和 METEOR 来衡量忠实度，并使用单独训练的语言模型 (GPT) 来衡量自然度。 Transformer-Copynet 和 T5 在忠实度指标上表现相似，其中 T5 略有优势，BLEU 得分为 63.8，METEOR 得分为 83.0。 CopyNet 是最自然的，相对复杂度为 1.59。 CopyNet 的参数也比 T5 少 37 倍。我们公开发布了我们的数据集，该数据集由 46,565 个众包样本组成。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种系统，将用户对虚拟助手的语音消息进行视角转换后发送给目标用户，解决虚拟助手过于字面理解导致的语义错误问题。
AI.motivation: 虚拟助手常因过于字面理解用户指令（如将‘告诉Bob我爱你’直接发送为‘I love him’）导致语义偏差，需开发视角转换系统以提升交互准确性。
AI.method: 融合基于规则的模型（含文本分类、词性标注、句法分析）与神经网络方法（LSTM、CopyNet、T5），采用BLEU+METEOR评估忠实度，相对困惑度评估自然度。
AI.result: T5在忠实度指标上略胜（BLEU 63.8，METEOR 83.0），但CopyNet自然度更高（相对困惑度1.59）且参数量仅为T5的1/37，数据集已公开。
AI.conclusion: CopyNet在效率与自然度上表现更优，T5在忠实度上稍强，视角转换系统可有效提升虚拟助手的语义理解能力。

ai_content.result: T5在忠实度指标上略胜（BLEU 63.8，METEOR 83.0），但CopyNet自然度更高（相对困惑度1.59）且参数量仅为T5的1/37，数据集已公开。

authors_text: Eyal Ben-David,Orgad Keller,Eric Malmi,Idan Szpektor,Roi Reichart
title: Semantically Driven Sentence Fusion: Modeling and Evaluation
title_zh: 语义驱动的句子融合：建模与评估
comment: This paper was accepted to Findings of EMNLP 2020
comments: This paper was accepted to Findings of EMNLP 2020
abstract: Sentence fusion is the task of joining related sentences into coherent text. Current training and evaluation schemes for this task are based on single reference ground-truths and do not account for valid fusion variants. We show that this hinders models from robustly capturing the semantic relationship between input sentences. To alleviate this, we present an approach in which ground-truth solutions are automatically expanded into multiple references via curated equivalence classes of connective phrases. We apply this method to a large-scale dataset and use the augmented dataset for both model training and evaluation. To improve the learning of semantic representation using multiple references, we enrich the model with auxiliary discourse classification tasks under a multi-tasking framework. Our experiments highlight the improvements of our approach over state-of-the-art models.
summary: Sentence fusion is the task of joining related sentences into coherent text. Current training and evaluation schemes for this task are based on single reference ground-truths and do not account for valid fusion variants. We show that this hinders models from robustly capturing the semantic relationship between input sentences. To alleviate this, we present an approach in which ground-truth solutions are automatically expanded into multiple references via curated equivalence classes of connective phrases. We apply this method to a large-scale dataset and use the augmented dataset for both model training and evaluation. To improve the learning of semantic representation using multiple references, we enrich the model with auxiliary discourse classification tasks under a multi-tasking framework. Our experiments highlight the improvements of our approach over state-of-the-art models.
abstract_zh: 句子融合是将相关句子连接成连贯文本的任务。该任务当前的训练和评估方案基于单一参考基准事实，并且不考虑有效的融合变体。我们表明，这阻碍了模型稳健地捕获输入句子之间的语义关系。为了缓解这个问题，我们提出了一种方法，通过精心设计的连接短语的等价类，将真实解决方案自动扩展为多个引用。我们将此方法应用于大规模数据集，并使用增强数据集进行模型训练和评估。为了提高使用多个参考文献的语义表示的学习，我们在多任务框架下通过辅助话语分类任务丰富了模型。我们的实验强调了我们的方法相对于最先进模型的改进。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于语义的句子融合方法，通过扩展多参考答案和多任务学习提升模型效果。
AI.motivation: 现有句子融合任务依赖单一参考答案，无法涵盖有效融合变体，导致模型难以准确捕捉语义关系。
AI.method: 通过连接词等价类自动扩展地面真实解为多参考，结合多任务框架增加话语分类辅助任务。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在大规模数据集上优于现有最先进模型。
AI.conclusion: 多参考生成与多任务学习结合能有效提升句子融合模型的语义理解能力，为该任务提供新方向。
