search_text: Semantically Driven Sentence Fusion: Modeling and Evaluation 语义驱动的句子融合：建模与评估 Sentence fusion is the task of joining related sentences into coherent text. Current training and evaluation schemes for this task are based on single reference ground-truths and do not account for valid fusion variants. We show that this hinders models from robustly capturing the semantic relationship between input sentences. To alleviate this, we present an approach in which ground-truth solutions are automatically expanded into multiple references via curated equivalence classes of connective phrases. We apply this method to a large-scale dataset and use the augmented dataset for both model training and evaluation. To improve the learning of semantic representation using multiple references, we enrich the model with auxiliary discourse classification tasks under a multi-tasking framework. Our experiments highlight the improvements of our approach over state-of-the-art models. 句子融合是将相关句子连接成连贯文本的任务。该任务当前的训练和评估方案基于单一参考基准事实，并且不考虑有效的融合变体。我们表明，这阻碍了模型稳健地捕获输入句子之间的语义关系。为了缓解这个问题，我们提出了一种方法，通过精心设计的连接短语的等价类，将真实解决方案自动扩展为多个引用。我们将此方法应用于大规模数据集，并使用增强数据集进行模型训练和评估。为了提高使用多个参考文献的语义表示的学习，我们在多任务框架下通过辅助话语分类任务丰富了模型。我们的实验强调了我们的方法相对于最先进模型的改进。 本文提出一种基于语义的句子融合方法，通过扩展多参考答案和多任务学习提升模型效果。 Eyal Ben-David,Orgad Keller,Eric Malmi,Idan Szpektor,Roi Reichart cs.CL,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Carel van Niekerk,Michael Heck,Christian Geishauser,Hsien-Chin Lin,Nurul Lubis,Marco Moresi,Milica Gašić
title: Knowing What You Know: Calibrating Dialogue Belief State Distributions via Ensembles
title_zh: 知道你所知道的：通过集成校准对话信念状态分布
comment: 7 pages, 9 figures, to be published in Findings of EMNLP 2020, code available at: https://gitlab.cs.uni-duesseldorf.de/general/dsml/calibrating-dialogue-belief-state-distributions
comments: 7 pages, 9 figures, to be published in Findings of EMNLP 2020, code available at: https://gitlab.cs.uni-duesseldorf.de/general/dsml/calibrating-dialogue-belief-state-distributions
abstract: The ability to accurately track what happens during a conversation is essential for the performance of a dialogue system. Current state-of-the-art multi-domain dialogue state trackers achieve just over 55% accuracy on the current go-to benchmark, which means that in almost every second dialogue turn they place full confidence in an incorrect dialogue state. Belief trackers, on the other hand, maintain a distribution over possible dialogue states. However, they lack in performance compared to dialogue state trackers, and do not produce well calibrated distributions. In this work we present state-of-the-art performance in calibration for multi-domain dialogue belief trackers using a calibrated ensemble of models. Our resulting dialogue belief tracker also outperforms previous dialogue belief tracking models in terms of accuracy.
summary: The ability to accurately track what happens during a conversation is essential for the performance of a dialogue system. Current state-of-the-art multi-domain dialogue state trackers achieve just over 55% accuracy on the current go-to benchmark, which means that in almost every second dialogue turn they place full confidence in an incorrect dialogue state. Belief trackers, on the other hand, maintain a distribution over possible dialogue states. However, they lack in performance compared to dialogue state trackers, and do not produce well calibrated distributions. In this work we present state-of-the-art performance in calibration for multi-domain dialogue belief trackers using a calibrated ensemble of models. Our resulting dialogue belief tracker also outperforms previous dialogue belief tracking models in terms of accuracy.
abstract_zh: 准确跟踪对话过程中发生的情况的能力对于对话系统的性能至关重要。目前最先进的多域对话状态跟踪器在当前首选基准上的准确度刚刚超过 55%，这意味着几乎在每一个对话回合中，它们都会对不正确的对话状态充满信心。另一方面，信念跟踪器维持可能的对话状态的分布。然而，与对话状态跟踪器相比，它们的性能较差，并且不能产生经过良好校准的分布。在这项工作中，我们使用校准的模型集合来展示多域对话信念跟踪器的最先进的校准性能。我们得到的对话信念跟踪器在准确性方面也优于以前的对话信念跟踪模型。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过集成模型校准多领域对话系统的信念状态分布，以提高对话状态跟踪的准确性和分布校准性。
AI.motivation: 现有对话状态跟踪器准确率不足55%，而信念跟踪器虽维护状态分布但校准效果差，导致置信度不可靠。
AI.method: 采用校准的模型集成方法，结合多个模型预测结果优化信念状态分布的校准。
AI.result: 在多领域对话任务中，校准效果达到SOTA水平，且准确率超越先前的信念跟踪模型。
AI.conclusion: 集成校准方法能有效提升对话信念状态跟踪的准确性与分布可靠性，为对话系统提供更稳健的解决方案。

title: The Approximation Ratio of the 2-Opt Heuristic for the Euclidean Traveling Salesman Problem
title_zh: 欧几里德旅行商问题的2-Opt启发式逼近率
comment: revised version, to appear in: 38th International Symposium on Theoretical Aspects of Computer Science (STACS 2021)
comments: revised version, to appear in: 38th International Symposium on Theoretical Aspects of Computer Science (STACS 2021)
abstract: The 2-Opt heuristic is a simple improvement heuristic for the Traveling Salesman Problem. It starts with an arbitrary tour and then repeatedly replaces two edges of the tour by two other edges, as long as this yields a shorter tour. We will prove that for Euclidean Traveling Salesman Problems with $n$ cities the approximation ratio of the 2-Opt heuristic is $Θ(\log n/ \log \log n)$. This improves the upper bound of $O(\log n$) given by Chandra, Karloff, and Tovey [3] in 1999.
summary: The 2-Opt heuristic is a simple improvement heuristic for the Traveling Salesman Problem. It starts with an arbitrary tour and then repeatedly replaces two edges of the tour by two other edges, as long as this yields a shorter tour. We will prove that for Euclidean Traveling Salesman Problems with $n$ cities the approximation ratio of the 2-Opt heuristic is $Θ(\log n/ \log \log n)$. This improves the upper bound of $O(\log n$) given by Chandra, Karloff, and Tovey [3] in 1999.
abstract_zh: 2-Opt 启发式是旅行商问题的简单改进启发式。它以任意游览开始，然后反复用另外两条边替换该游览的两条边，只要这会产生更短的游览。我们将证明，对于 $n$ 个城市的欧几里得旅行商问题，2-Opt 启发式的近似率为 $θ(\log n/ \log \log n)$。这改进了 Chandra、Karloff 和 Tovey [3] 在 1999 年给出的 $O(\log n$) 上限。

AI.tldr: 分析2-Opt启发式算法在欧几里得旅行商问题中的近似比，并证明其近似比为Θ(log n / log log n)，改进了之前的上界。
AI.motivation: 改进现有对2-Opt启发式算法近似比的上界，从O(log n)提升到更精确的Θ(log n / log log n)。
AI.method: 通过数学分析和复杂度理论，推导出2-Opt启发式算法在欧几里得TSP中的近似比下界和上界。
AI.result: 证明了2-Opt启发式算法在欧几里得TSP中的近似比为Θ(log n / log log n)，优于之前O(log n)的上界。
AI.conclusion: 该结果为2-Opt启发式算法在欧几里得TSP中的性能提供了更精确的理论分析，推动了相关算法研究的进展。

title: Finding the Evidence: Localization-aware Answer Prediction for Text Visual Question Answering
title_zh: 寻找证据：文本视觉问答的本地化感知答案预测
abstract: Image text carries essential information to understand the scene and perform reasoning. Text-based visual question answering (text VQA) task focuses on visual questions that require reading text in images. Existing text VQA systems generate an answer by selecting from optical character recognition (OCR) texts or a fixed vocabulary. Positional information of text is underused and there is a lack of evidence for the generated answer. As such, this paper proposes a localization-aware answer prediction network (LaAP-Net) to address this challenge. Our LaAP-Net not only generates the answer to the question but also predicts a bounding box as evidence of the generated answer. Moreover, a context-enriched OCR representation (COR) for multimodal fusion is proposed to facilitate the localization task. Our proposed LaAP-Net outperforms existing approaches on three benchmark datasets for the text VQA task by a noticeable margin.
summary: Image text carries essential information to understand the scene and perform reasoning. Text-based visual question answering (text VQA) task focuses on visual questions that require reading text in images. Existing text VQA systems generate an answer by selecting from optical character recognition (OCR) texts or a fixed vocabulary. Positional information of text is underused and there is a lack of evidence for the generated answer. As such, this paper proposes a localization-aware answer prediction network (LaAP-Net) to address this challenge. Our LaAP-Net not only generates the answer to the question but also predicts a bounding box as evidence of the generated answer. Moreover, a context-enriched OCR representation (COR) for multimodal fusion is proposed to facilitate the localization task. Our proposed LaAP-Net outperforms existing approaches on three benchmark datasets for the text VQA task by a noticeable margin.
abstract_zh: 图像文本携带了理解场景和进行推理的必要信息。基于文本的视觉问答（文本VQA）任务专注于需要阅读图像中文本的视觉问题。现有的文本 VQA 系统通过从光学字符识别 (OCR) 文本或固定词汇中进行选择来生成答案。文本的位置信息未得到充分利用，并且生成的答案缺乏证据。因此，本文提出了一种本地化感知答案预测网络（LaAP-Net）来应对这一挑战。我们的 LaAP-Net 不仅生成问题的答案，还预测边界框作为生成答案的证据。此外，提出了一种用于多模态融合的上下文丰富的 OCR 表示（COR），以促进定位任务。我们提出的 LaAP-Net 在文本 VQA 任务的三个基准数据集上明显优于现有方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种定位感知的答案预测网络（LaAP-Net），用于文本视觉问答任务，通过生成答案并预测对应证据的边界框，提升答案的可解释性。
AI.motivation: 现有文本视觉问答系统在生成答案时未充分利用文本的位置信息，导致答案缺乏直接证据支持，影响可解释性和准确性。
AI.method: 提出LaAP-Net网络，联合生成答案与对应证据的边界框；设计上下文增强的OCR表示（COR）方法，提升多模态特征融合效果。
AI.result: 在三个文本VQA基准数据集上，LaAP-Net显著优于现有方法，验证了定位感知预测与COR表示的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 通过结合答案生成与证据定位，LaAP-Net有效解决了文本VQA中答案缺乏位置证据的问题，为可解释性问答系统提供了新思路。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种定位感知的答案预测网络（LaAP-Net），用于文本视觉问答任务，通过生成答案并预测对应证据的边界框，提升答案的可解释性。
ai_content.motivation: 现有文本视觉问答系统在生成答案时未充分利用文本的位置信息，导致答案缺乏直接证据支持，影响可解释性和准确性。
ai_content.method: 提出LaAP-Net网络，联合生成答案与对应证据的边界框；设计上下文增强的OCR表示（COR）方法，提升多模态特征融合效果。
ai_content.result: 在三个文本VQA基准数据集上，LaAP-Net显著优于现有方法，验证了定位感知预测与COR表示的有效性。
ai_content.conclusion: 通过结合答案生成与证据定位，LaAP-Net有效解决了文本VQA中答案缺乏位置证据的问题，为可解释性问答系统提供了新思路。

search_text: Finding the Evidence: Localization-aware Answer Prediction for Text Visual Question Answering 寻找证据：文本视觉问答的本地化感知答案预测 Image text carries essential information to understand the scene and perform reasoning. Text-based visual question answering (text VQA) task focuses on visual questions that require reading text in images. Existing text VQA systems generate an answer by selecting from optical character recognition (OCR) texts or a fixed vocabulary. Positional information of text is underused and there is a lack of evidence for the generated answer. As such, this paper proposes a localization-aware answer prediction network (LaAP-Net) to address this challenge. Our LaAP-Net not only generates the answer to the question but also predicts a bounding box as evidence of the generated answer. Moreover, a context-enriched OCR representation (COR) for multimodal fusion is proposed to facilitate the localization task. Our proposed LaAP-Net outperforms existing approaches on three benchmark datasets for the text VQA task by a noticeable margin. 图像文本携带了理解场景和进行推理的必要信息。基于文本的视觉问答（文本VQA）任务专注于需要阅读图像中文本的视觉问题。现有的文本 VQA 系统通过从光学字符识别 (OCR) 文本或固定词汇中进行选择来生成答案。文本的位置信息未得到充分利用，并且生成的答案缺乏证据。因此，本文提出了一种本地化感知答案预测网络（LaAP-Net）来应对这一挑战。我们的 LaAP-Net 不仅生成问题的答案，还预测边界框作为生成答案的证据。此外，提出了一种用于多模态融合的上下文丰富的 OCR 表示（COR），以促进定位任务。我们提出的 LaAP-Net 在文本 VQA 任务的三个基准数据集上明显优于现有方法。 本文提出一种定位感知的答案预测网络（LaAP-Net），用于文本视觉问答任务，通过生成答案并预测对应证据的边界框，提升答案的可解释性。 Wei Han,Hantao Huang,Tao Han cs.CV,cs.CL

title: Comprehending finger flexor tendon pulley system using a computational analysis
title_zh: 使用计算分析理解手指屈肌腱滑轮系统
comment: 13 pages, 16 figures. Submitted to Journal of Biomechanics
comments: 13 pages, 16 figures. Submitted to Journal of Biomechanics
abstract: Existing prosthetic/orthotic designs are rarely based on kinetostatics of a biological finger, especially its tendon-pulley system (TPS) which helps render a set of extraordinary functionalities. Studies on computational models or cadaver experiments do exist. However, they provide little information on TPS configurations that lead to lower tendon tension, bowstringing, and pulley stresses, all of which a biological finger may be employing after all. A priori knowledge of such configurations and associated trade-offs is helpful not only from the design viewpoint of, say, an exoskeleton but also for surgical reconstruction procedures. We present a parametric study to determine optimal TPS configurations for the flexor mechanism. A compliant, flexure-based computational model is developed and simulated using the pseudo rigid body method, with various combinations of pulley/tendon attachment point locations, pulley heights, and widths. Deductions are drawn from the data collected to recommend the most suitable configuration. Many aspects of the biological TPS configuration are explained through the presented analysis. We reckon that the analytical approach herein will be useful in arriving at customized (optimized) hand exoskeletal designs.
summary: Existing prosthetic/orthotic designs are rarely based on kinetostatics of a biological finger, especially its tendon-pulley system (TPS) which helps render a set of extraordinary functionalities. Studies on computational models or cadaver experiments do exist. However, they provide little information on TPS configurations that lead to lower tendon tension, bowstringing, and pulley stresses, all of which a biological finger may be employing after all. A priori knowledge of such configurations and associated trade-offs is helpful not only from the design viewpoint of, say, an exoskeleton but also for surgical reconstruction procedures. We present a parametric study to determine optimal TPS configurations for the flexor mechanism. A compliant, flexure-based computational model is developed and simulated using the pseudo rigid body method, with various combinations of pulley/tendon attachment point locations, pulley heights, and widths. Deductions are drawn from the data collected to recommend the most suitable configuration. Many aspects of the biological TPS configuration are explained through the presented analysis. We reckon that the analytical approach herein will be useful in arriving at customized (optimized) hand exoskeletal designs.
abstract_zh: 现有的假肢/矫形器设计很少基于生物手指的动力学，尤其是其腱滑轮系统（TPS），它有助于呈现一系列非凡的功能。对计算模型或尸体实验的研究确实存在。然而，他们提供的关于 TPS 配置的信息很少，这些配置会导致较低的肌腱张力、弓弦和滑轮应力，而所有这些毕竟是生物手指可能使用的。对此类配置和相关权衡的先验知识不仅从外骨骼的设计角度来看很有帮助，而且对于外科重建手术也很有帮助。我们提出了一项参数研究来确定屈肌机构的最佳 TPS 配置。使用伪刚体方法开发和模拟顺应的基于弯曲的计算模型，具有滑轮/腱附着点位置、滑轮高度和宽度的各种组合。根据收集的数据进行扣除，以推荐最合适的配置。通过所提出的分析解释了生物 TPS 配置的许多方面。我们认为本文的分析方法将有助于实现定制（优化）的手部外骨骼设计。

AI.tldr: 本文通过计算分析研究生物手指屈肌腱滑轮系统（TPS）的最优配置，以降低肌腱张力和滑轮应力。
AI.motivation: 现有假肢/矫形器设计未充分基于生物手指的运动静力学特性，尤其缺乏对TPS配置的系统研究，而优化TPS对设计外骨骼和手术重建具有重要意义。
AI.method: 建立基于柔顺机构的计算模型，采用伪刚体方法模拟不同滑轮/肌腱附着点位置、滑轮高度和宽度的组合参数，进行参数化研究。
AI.result: 通过数据分析揭示了生物TPS配置的力学特性，推荐了可降低肌腱滑弦效应和滑轮应力的最优配置方案。
AI.conclusion: 该分析方法为定制化手部外骨骼设计提供了理论依据，有助于优化康复辅助设备和手术方案。

authors_text: Xiaoyu Kou,Yankai Lin,Shaobo Liu,Peng Li,Jie Zhou,Yan Zhang
title: Disentangle-based Continual Graph Representation Learning
title_zh: 基于解缠结的连续图表示学习
abstract: Graph embedding (GE) methods embed nodes (and/or edges) in graph into a low-dimensional semantic space, and have shown its effectiveness in modeling multi-relational data. However, existing GE models are not practical in real-world applications since it overlooked the streaming nature of incoming data. To address this issue, we study the problem of continual graph representation learning which aims to continually train a GE model on new data to learn incessantly emerging multi-relational data while avoiding catastrophically forgetting old learned knowledge. Moreover, we propose a disentangle-based continual graph representation learning (DiCGRL) framework inspired by the human's ability to learn procedural knowledge. The experimental results show that DiCGRL could effectively alleviate the catastrophic forgetting problem and outperform state-of-the-art continual learning models.
summary: Graph embedding (GE) methods embed nodes (and/or edges) in graph into a low-dimensional semantic space, and have shown its effectiveness in modeling multi-relational data. However, existing GE models are not practical in real-world applications since it overlooked the streaming nature of incoming data. To address this issue, we study the problem of continual graph representation learning which aims to continually train a GE model on new data to learn incessantly emerging multi-relational data while avoiding catastrophically forgetting old learned knowledge. Moreover, we propose a disentangle-based continual graph representation learning (DiCGRL) framework inspired by the human's ability to learn procedural knowledge. The experimental results show that DiCGRL could effectively alleviate the catastrophic forgetting problem and outperform state-of-the-art continual learning models.
abstract_zh: 图嵌入（GE）方法将图中的节点（和/或边）嵌入到低维语义空间中，并已显示出其在建模多关系数据方面的有效性。然而，现有的 GE 模型在实际应用中并不实用，因为它忽略了传入数据的流式传输性质。为了解决这个问题，我们研究了持续图表示学习的问题，其目的是不断地在新数据上训练 GE 模型，以学习不断出现的多关系数据，同时避免灾难性地忘记旧学过的知识。此外，受人类学习程序知识能力的启发，我们提出了一种基于解缠结的连续图表示学习（DiCGRL）框架。实验结果表明，DiCGRL 可以有效缓解灾难性遗忘问题，并且优于最先进的持续学习模型。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于解耦的持续图表示学习框架（DiCGRL），旨在解决图嵌入模型在流数据场景下持续学习时的灾难性遗忘问题。
AI.motivation: 现有图嵌入方法无法处理现实场景中持续流入的多关系数据，容易在学习新知识时遗忘旧知识，导致实际应用效果下降。
AI.method: 受人类学习程序性知识能力的启发，设计DiCGRL框架通过解耦机制分离不同任务的知识表示，实现新旧知识的持续学习与保留。
AI.result: 实验表明DiCGRL能有效缓解灾难性遗忘问题，在持续学习任务中优于现有最先进的持续学习模型。
AI.conclusion: DiCGRL框架为持续图表示学习提供了有效解决方案，通过解耦机制平衡新旧知识学习，具有重要的实际应用价值。

The experimental results show that DiCGRL could effectively alleviate the catastrophic forgetting problem and outperform state-of-the-art continual learning models. 图嵌入（GE）方法将图中的节点（和/或边）嵌入到低维语义空间中，并已显示出其在建模多关系数据方面的有效性。然而，现有的 GE 模型在实际应用中并不实用，因为它忽略了传入数据的流式传输性质。为了解决这个问题，我们研究了持续图表示学习的问题，其目的是不断地在新数据上训练 GE 模型，以学习不断出现的多关系数据，同时避免灾难性地忘记旧学过的知识。此外，受人类学习程序知识能力的启发，我们提出了一种基于解缠结的连续图表示学习（DiCGRL）框架。实验结果表明，DiCGRL 可以有效缓解灾难性遗忘问题，并且优于最先进的持续学习模型。 本文提出了一种基于解耦的持续图表示学习框架（DiCGRL），旨在解决图嵌入模型在流数据场景下持续学习时的灾难性遗忘问题。 Xiaoyu Kou,Yankai Lin,Shaobo Liu,Peng Li,Jie Zhou,Yan Zhang cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.SI

authors_text: Gian-Luca Savino,Niklas Emanuel,Steven Kowalzik,Felix A. Kroll,Marvin C. Lange,Matthis Laudan,Rieke Leder,Zhanhua Liang,Dayana Markhabayeva,Martin Schmeißer,Nicolai Schütz,Carolin Stellmacher,Zihe Xu,Kerstin Bub,Thorsten Kluss,Jaime Maldonado,Ernst Kruijff,Johannes Schöning
title: Comparing Pedestrian Navigation Methods in Virtual Reality and Real Life
title_zh: 虚拟现实和现实生活中的行人导航方法比较
abstract: Mobile navigation apps are among the most used mobile applications and are often used as a baseline to evaluate new mobile navigation technologies in field studies. As field studies often introduce external factors that are hard to control for, we investigate how pedestrian navigation methods can be evaluated in virtual reality (VR). We present a study comparing navigation methods in real life (RL) and VR to evaluate if VR environments are a viable alternative to RL environments when it comes to testing these. In a series of studies, participants navigated a real and a virtual environment using a paper map and a navigation app on a smartphone. We measured the differences in navigation performance, task load and spatial knowledge acquisition between RL and VR. From these we formulate guidelines for the improvement of pedestrian navigation systems in VR like improved legibility for small screen devices. We furthermore discuss appropriate low-cost and low-space VR-locomotion techniques and discuss more controllable locomotion techniques.
summary: Mobile navigation apps are among the most used mobile applications and are often used as a baseline to evaluate new mobile navigation technologies in field studies. As field studies often introduce external factors that are hard to control for, we investigate how pedestrian navigation methods can be evaluated in virtual reality (VR). We present a study comparing navigation methods in real life (RL) and VR to evaluate if VR environments are a viable alternative to RL environments when it comes to testing these. In a series of studies, participants navigated a real and a virtual environment using a paper map and a navigation app on a smartphone. We measured the differences in navigation performance, task load and spatial knowledge acquisition between RL and VR. From these we formulate guidelines for the improvement of pedestrian navigation systems in VR like improved legibility for small screen devices. We furthermore discuss appropriate low-cost and low-space VR-locomotion techniques and discuss more controllable locomotion techniques.
abstract_zh: 移动导航应用程序是最常用的移动应用程序之一，通常用作现场研究中评估新移动导航技术的基线。由于现场研究经常引入难以控制的外部因素，我们研究了如何在虚拟现实（VR）中评估行人导航方法。我们提出了一项研究，比较现实生活 (RL) 和 VR 中的导航方法，以评估在测试这些环境时 VR 环境是否是 RL 环境的可行替代方案。在一系列研究中，参与者使用纸质地图和智能手机上的导航应用程序在真实和虚拟环境中导航。我们测量了 RL 和 VR 之间导航性能、任务负载和空间知识获取的差异。根据这些，我们制定了改进 VR 行人导航系统的指南，例如提高小屏幕设备的易读性。我们还讨论了合适的低成本和低空间 VR 运动技术，并讨论了更可控的运动技术。

AI.tldr: 本文比较了虚拟现实（VR）和现实生活中行人导航方法的差异，评估VR作为测试环境的可行性。
AI.motivation: 现实环境中的实地研究受外部因素影响较大，难以控制变量，因此需探索VR作为替代测试环境的可行性。
AI.method: 通过实验让参与者在现实和虚拟环境中使用纸质地图和智能手机导航应用完成导航任务，测量导航性能、任务负荷及空间知识获取差异。
AI.result: 发现VR与现实环境在导航表现和认知负荷上存在差异，并提出改进VR导航系统的设计指南，如提升小屏幕可读性及低成本移动技术。
AI.conclusion: VR可作为行人导航研究的有效替代方案，但需优化界面设计和运动控制技术以提高可用性。

title: Arbitrary Style Transfer using Graph Instance Normalization
title_zh: 使用图实例标准化的任意样式迁移
abstract: Style transfer is the image synthesis task, which applies a style of one image to another while preserving the content. In statistical methods, the adaptive instance normalization (AdaIN) whitens the source images and applies the style of target images through normalizing the mean and variance of features. However, computing feature statistics for each instance would neglect the inherent relationship between features, so it is hard to learn global styles while fitting to the individual training dataset. In this paper, we present a novel learnable normalization technique for style transfer using graph convolutional networks, termed Graph Instance Normalization (GrIN). This algorithm makes the style transfer approach more robust by taking into account similar information shared between instances. Besides, this simple module is also applicable to other tasks like image-to-image translation or domain adaptation.
summary: Style transfer is the image synthesis task, which applies a style of one image to another while preserving the content. In statistical methods, the adaptive instance normalization (AdaIN) whitens the source images and applies the style of target images through normalizing the mean and variance of features. However, computing feature statistics for each instance would neglect the inherent relationship between features, so it is hard to learn global styles while fitting to the individual training dataset. In this paper, we present a novel learnable normalization technique for style transfer using graph convolutional networks, termed Graph Instance Normalization (GrIN). This algorithm makes the style transfer approach more robust by taking into account similar information shared between instances. Besides, this simple module is also applicable to other tasks like image-to-image translation or domain adaptation.
abstract_zh: 风格迁移是图像合成任务，它将一幅图像的风格应用到另一幅图像，同时保留内容。在统计方法中，自适应实例归一化（AdaIN）通过归一化特征的均值和方差来美白源图像并应用目标图像的风格。然而，计算每个实例的特征统计数据会忽略特征之间的内在关系，因此很难在拟合单个训练数据集的同时学习全局样式。在本文中，我们提出了一种使用图卷积网络进行风格迁移的新型可学习标准化技术，称为图实例标准化（GrIN）。该算法通过考虑实例之间共享的相似信息，使风格迁移方法更加稳健。此外，这个简单的模块还适用于其他任务，例如图像到图像转换或域适应。

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于图卷积网络的归一化方法GrIN，用于改进图像样式迁移任务。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在处理全局样式学习时存在不足，难以捕捉特征间的内在关系。
AI.method: 设计图实例归一化（GrIN）模块，通过图卷积网络建模实例间相似性以增强样式迁移鲁棒性。
AI.result: GrIN在样式迁移任务中表现更稳健，并适用于其他相关任务如图像到图像转换。
AI.conclusion: GrIN通过建模实例间关系有效解决了传统方法的局限性，为样式迁移提供新思路。

authors_text: Sekitoshi Kanai,Masanori Yamada,Shin'ya Yamaguchi,Hiroshi Takahashi,Yasutoshi Ida
title: Constraining Logits by Bounded Function for Adversarial Robustness
title_zh: 通过有界函数约束 Logits 以实现对抗鲁棒性
abstract: We propose a method for improving adversarial robustness by addition of a new bounded function just before softmax. Recent studies hypothesize that small logits (inputs of softmax) by logit regularization can improve adversarial robustness of deep learning. Following this hypothesis, we analyze norms of logit vectors at the optimal point under the assumption of universal approximation and explore new methods for constraining logits by addition of a bounded function before softmax. We theoretically and empirically reveal that small logits by addition of a common activation function, e.g., hyperbolic tangent, do not improve adversarial robustness since input vectors of the function (pre-logit vectors) can have large norms. From the theoretical findings, we develop the new bounded function. The addition of our function improves adversarial robustness because it makes logit and pre-logit vectors have small norms. Since our method only adds one activation function before softmax, it is easy to combine our method with adversarial training. Our experiments demonstrate that our method is comparable to logit regularization methods in terms of accuracies on adversarially perturbed datasets without adversarial training. Furthermore, it is superior or comparable to logit regularization methods and a recent defense method (TRADES) when using adversarial training.
summary: We propose a method for improving adversarial robustness by addition of a new bounded function just before softmax. Recent studies hypothesize that small logits (inputs of softmax) by logit regularization can improve adversarial robustness of deep learning. Following this hypothesis, we analyze norms of logit vectors at the optimal point under the assumption of universal approximation and explore new methods for constraining logits by addition of a bounded function before softmax. We theoretically and empirically reveal that small logits by addition of a common activation function, e.g., hyperbolic tangent, do not improve adversarial robustness since input vectors of the function (pre-logit vectors) can have large norms. From the theoretical findings, we develop the new bounded function. The addition of our function improves adversarial robustness because it makes logit and pre-logit vectors have small norms. Since our method only adds one activation function before softmax, it is easy to combine our method with adversarial training. Our experiments demonstrate that our method is comparable to logit regularization methods in terms of accuracies on adversarially perturbed datasets without adversarial training. Furthermore, it is superior or comparable to logit regularization methods and a recent defense method (TRADES) when using adversarial training.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种通过在 softmax 之前添加新的有界函数来提高对抗鲁棒性的方法。最近的研究假设，通过 logit 正则化得到的小 logits（softmax 的输入）可以提高深度学习的对抗鲁棒性。根据这一假设，我们在通用逼近的假设下分析了最优点处的 logit 向量的范数，并探索了通过在 softmax 之前添加有界函数来约束 logit 的新方法。我们从理论上和经验上表明，通过添加通用激活函数（例如双曲正切）来获得小 logits 不会提高对抗鲁棒性，因为函数的输入向量（前 logit 向量）可能具有较大的范数。根据理论发现，我们开发了新的有界函数。我们函数的添加提高了对抗鲁棒性，因为它使 logit 和 pre-logit 向量具有较小的范数。由于我们的方法只在 softmax 之前添加了一个激活函数，因此很容易将我们的方法与对抗训练结合起来。我们的实验表明，我们的方法在没有对抗性训练的对抗性扰动数据集上的准确性方面与 Logit 正则化方法相当。此外，在使用对抗性训练时，它优于或优于 logit 正则化方法和最近的防御方法（TRADES）。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过在softmax前添加有界函数来约束logits，以提升深度学习模型的对抗鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有研究认为logit正则化可提升对抗鲁棒性，但常见激活函数（如双曲正切）无法有效限制logit向量的范数，因预logit向量可能具有大范数。
AI.method: 设计一种新的有界函数，在softmax前约束logit和预logit向量的范数，使其保持较小值，且仅需添加一个激活函数，易于与对抗训练结合。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在无需对抗训练时与logit正则化方法精度相当，结合对抗训练时优于logit正则化及TRADES等最新防御方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过约束logit和预logit范数，新方法有效提升对抗鲁棒性，且具有简单易用性，可与对抗训练有效结合。

ai_content.motivation: 现有研究认为logit正则化可提升对抗鲁棒性，但常见激活函数（如双曲正切）无法有效限制logit向量的范数，因预logit向量可能具有大范数。

ai_content.result: 实验表明，该方法在无需对抗训练时与logit正则化方法精度相当，结合对抗训练时优于logit正则化及TRADES等最新防御方法。
ai_content.conclusion: 通过约束logit和预logit范数，新方法有效提升对抗鲁棒性，且具有简单易用性，可与对抗训练有效结合。

ai_content_json.method: 设计一种新的有界函数，在softmax前约束logit和预logit向量的范数，使其保持较小值，且仅需添加一个激活函数，易于与对抗训练结合。
ai_content_json.result: 实验表明，该方法在无需对抗训练时与logit正则化方法精度相当，结合对抗训练时优于logit正则化及TRADES等最新防御方法。
ai_content_json.conclusion: 通过约束logit和预logit范数，新方法有效提升对抗鲁棒性，且具有简单易用性，可与对抗训练有效结合。

search_text: Constraining Logits by Bounded Function for Adversarial Robustness 通过有界函数约束 Logits 以实现对抗鲁棒性 We propose a method for improving adversarial robustness by addition of a new bounded function just before softmax. Recent studies hypothesize that small logits (inputs of softmax) by logit regularization can improve adversarial robustness of deep learning. Following this hypothesis, we analyze norms of logit vectors at the optimal point under the assumption of universal approximation and explore new methods for constraining logits by addition of a bounded function before softmax. We theoretically and empirically reveal that small logits by addition of a common activation function, e.g., hyperbolic tangent, do not improve adversarial robustness since input vectors of the function (pre-logit vectors) can have large norms. From the theoretical findings, we develop the new bounded function. The addition of our function improves adversarial robustness because it makes logit and pre-logit vectors have small norms. Since our method only adds one activation function before softmax, it is easy to combine our method with adversarial training. Our experiments demonstrate that our method is comparable to logit regularization methods in terms of accuracies on adversarially perturbed datasets without adversarial training. Furthermore, it is superior or comparable to logit regularization methods and a recent defense method (TRADES) when using adversarial training. 我们提出了一种通过在 softmax 之前添加新的有界函数来提高对抗鲁棒性的方法。最近的研究假设，通过 logit 正则化得到的小 logits（softmax 的输入）可以提高深度学习的对抗鲁棒性。根据这一假设，我们在通用逼近的假设下分析了最优点处的 logit 向量的范数，并探索了通过在 softmax 之前添加有界函数来约束 logit 的新方法。我们从理论上和经验上表明，通过添加通用激活函数（例如双曲正切）来获得小 logits 不会提高对抗鲁棒性，因为函数的输入向量（前 logit 向量）可能具有较大的范数。根据理论发现，我们开发了新的有界函数。我们函数的添加提高了对抗鲁棒性，因为它使 logit 和 pre-logit 向量具有较小的范数。由于我们的方法只在 softmax 之前添加了一个激活函数，因此很容易将我们的方法与对抗训练结合起来。我们的实验表明，我们的方法在没有对抗性训练的对抗性扰动数据集上的准确性方面与 Logit 正则化方法相当。此外，在使用对抗性训练时，它优于或优于 logit 正则化方法和最近的防御方法（TRADES）。 本文提出通过在softmax前添加有界函数来约束logits，以提升深度学习模型的对抗鲁棒性。 Sekitoshi Kanai,Masanori Yamada,Shin'ya Yamaguchi,Hiroshi Takahashi,Yasutoshi Ida stat.ML,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Sumegh Roychowdhury,Sumedh A. Sontakke,Nikaash Puri,Mausoom Sarkar,Milan Aggarwal,Pinkesh Badjatiya,Balaji Krishnamurthy,Laurent Itti
title: SHERLock: Self-Supervised Hierarchical Event Representation Learning
title_zh: SHERLock：自监督分层事件表示学习
abstract: Temporal event representations are an essential aspect of learning among humans. They allow for succinct encoding of the experiences we have through a variety of sensory inputs. Also, they are believed to be arranged hierarchically, allowing for an efficient representation of complex long-horizon experiences. Additionally, these representations are acquired in a self-supervised manner. Analogously, here we propose a model that learns temporal representations from long-horizon visual demonstration data and associated textual descriptions, without explicit temporal supervision. Our method produces a hierarchy of representations that align more closely with ground-truth human-annotated events (+15.3) than state-of-the-art unsupervised baselines. Our results are comparable to heavily-supervised baselines in complex visual domains such as Chess Openings, YouCook2 and TutorialVQA datasets. Finally, we perform ablation studies illustrating the robustness of our approach. We release our code and demo visualizations in the Supplementary Material.
summary: Temporal event representations are an essential aspect of learning among humans. They allow for succinct encoding of the experiences we have through a variety of sensory inputs. Also, they are believed to be arranged hierarchically, allowing for an efficient representation of complex long-horizon experiences. Additionally, these representations are acquired in a self-supervised manner. Analogously, here we propose a model that learns temporal representations from long-horizon visual demonstration data and associated textual descriptions, without explicit temporal supervision. Our method produces a hierarchy of representations that align more closely with ground-truth human-annotated events (+15.3) than state-of-the-art unsupervised baselines. Our results are comparable to heavily-supervised baselines in complex visual domains such as Chess Openings, YouCook2 and TutorialVQA datasets. Finally, we perform ablation studies illustrating the robustness of our approach. We release our code and demo visualizations in the Supplementary Material.
abstract_zh: 时间事件表示是人类学习的一个重要方面。它们允许对我们通过各种感官输入获得的体验进行简洁编码。此外，它们被认为是分层排列的，可以有效地表示复杂的长期体验。此外，这些表征是通过自我监督的方式获得的。类似地，我们在这里提出了一个模型，可以从长视野视觉演示数据和相关文本描述中学习时间表示，而无需明确的时间监督。我们的方法产生了一个表示层次结构，与最先进的无监督基线相比，它与真实的人类注释事件 (+15.3) 更接近。我们的结果与复杂视觉领域（例如 Chess Openings、YouCook2 和 TutorialVQA 数据集）中严格监督的基线相当。最后，我们进行消融研究，说明我们方法的稳健性。我们在补充材料中发布了代码和演示可视化。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种自监督层次化事件表示学习模型SHERLock，通过视觉演示数据和文本描述学习时间表示，无需显式时间监督。
AI.motivation: 人类通过分层时间事件表示高效处理复杂长期经验，但现有无监督方法难以达到人类标注精度，需开发更有效的自监督学习框架。
AI.method: 构建分层表示结构，利用视觉-文本对进行自监督训练，通过层次化编码器捕捉长期依赖关系并对齐事件边界。
AI.result: 在Chess Openings、YouCook2等数据集上，SHERLock较无监督基线提升15.3%，性能接近有监督方法，消融实验验证方法鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: SHERLock证明了自监督层次化学习在复杂视觉任务中的有效性，为少样本时间理解提供新思路。

authors_text: Qianwei Zhou,Yuhang Chen,Baoqing Li,Xiaoxin Li,Chen Zhou,Jingchang Huang,Haigen Hu
title: Training Deep Neural Networks for Wireless Sensor Networks Using Loosely and Weakly Labeled Images
title_zh: 使用松散和弱标记图像训练无线传感器网络的深度神经网络
abstract: Although deep learning has achieved remarkable successes over the past years, few reports have been published about applying deep neural networks to Wireless Sensor Networks (WSNs) for image targets recognition where data, energy, computation resources are limited. In this work, a Cost-Effective Domain Generalization (CEDG) algorithm has been proposed to train an efficient network with minimum labor requirements. CEDG transfers networks from a publicly available source domain to an application-specific target domain through an automatically allocated synthetic domain. The target domain is isolated from parameters tuning and used for model selection and testing only. The target domain is significantly different from the source domain because it has new target categories and is consisted of low-quality images that are out of focus, low in resolution, low in illumination, low in photographing angle. The trained network has about 7M (ResNet-20 is about 41M) multiplications per prediction that is small enough to allow a digital signal processor chip to do real-time recognitions in our WSN. The category-level averaged error on the unseen and unbalanced target domain has been decreased by 41.12%.
summary: Although deep learning has achieved remarkable successes over the past years, few reports have been published about applying deep neural networks to Wireless Sensor Networks (WSNs) for image targets recognition where data, energy, computation resources are limited. In this work, a Cost-Effective Domain Generalization (CEDG) algorithm has been proposed to train an efficient network with minimum labor requirements. CEDG transfers networks from a publicly available source domain to an application-specific target domain through an automatically allocated synthetic domain. The target domain is isolated from parameters tuning and used for model selection and testing only. The target domain is significantly different from the source domain because it has new target categories and is consisted of low-quality images that are out of focus, low in resolution, low in illumination, low in photographing angle. The trained network has about 7M (ResNet-20 is about 41M) multiplications per prediction that is small enough to allow a digital signal processor chip to do real-time recognitions in our WSN. The category-level averaged error on the unseen and unbalanced target domain has been decreased by 41.12%.
abstract_zh: 尽管深度学习在过去几年中取得了显着的成功，但关于将深度神经网络应用于无线传感器网络（WSN）以进行数据、能量、计算资源有限的图像目标识别的报道却很少。在这项工作中，提出了一种成本有效的域泛化（CEDG）算法，以最少的劳动力需求来训练高效的网络。 CEDG 通过自动分配的合成域将网络从公开可用的源域转移到特定于应用程序的目标域。目标域与参数调整隔离，仅用于模型选择和测试。目标域与源域显着不同，因为它具有新的目标类别，并且由失焦、低分辨率、低照度、低拍摄角度的低质量图像组成。经过训练的网络每次预测约有 7M（ResNet-20 约为 41M）乘法，该乘法小到足以允许数字信号处理器芯片在我们的 WSN 中进行实时识别。在不可见和不平衡目标域上的类别级平均误差降低了 41.12%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为CEDG的算法，用于在资源受限的无线传感器网络（WSN）中训练高效的深度神经网络，以实现图像目标识别。
AI.motivation: 尽管深度学习取得显著进展，但针对WSN中数据、能源和计算资源有限的图像识别任务，现有研究较少，且需解决目标域与源域差异大、标注成本高的问题。
AI.method: 通过自动分配的合成领域，将网络从公开的源域迁移至应用特定的目标域。目标域独立于参数调优，仅用于模型选择和测试，且包含低质量图像和新类别。
AI.result: 训练后的网络每预测仅需7M次乘法运算，可在DSP芯片上实现实时识别，目标域的类别级平均错误率降低41.12%。
AI.conclusion: CEDG算法有效解决了WSN中图像识别的资源限制和领域差异问题，为低成本、高效能的部署提供了可行方案。

The target domain is significantly different from the source domain because it has new target categories and is consisted of low-quality images that are out of focus, low in resolution, low in illumination, low in photographing angle. The trained network has about 7M (ResNet-20 is about 41M) multiplications per prediction that is small enough to allow a digital signal processor chip to do real-time recognitions in our WSN. The category-level averaged error on the unseen and unbalanced target domain has been decreased by 41.12%. 尽管深度学习在过去几年中取得了显着的成功，但关于将深度神经网络应用于无线传感器网络（WSN）以进行数据、能量、计算资源有限的图像目标识别的报道却很少。在这项工作中，提出了一种成本有效的域泛化（CEDG）算法，以最少的劳动力需求来训练高效的网络。 CEDG 通过自动分配的合成域将网络从公开可用的源域转移到特定于应用程序的目标域。目标域与参数调整隔离，仅用于模型选择和测试。目标域与源域显着不同，因为它具有新的目标类别，并且由失焦、低分辨率、低照度、低拍摄角度的低质量图像组成。经过训练的网络每次预测约有 7M（ResNet-20 约为 41M）乘法，该乘法小到足以允许数字信号处理器芯片在我们的 WSN 中进行实时识别。在不可见和不平衡目标域上的类别级平均误差降低了 41.12%。 本文提出了一种名为CEDG的算法，用于在资源受限的无线传感器网络（WSN）中训练高效的深度神经网络，以实现图像目标识别。 Qianwei Zhou,Yuhang Chen,Baoqing Li,Xiaoxin Li,Chen Zhou,Jingchang Huang,Haigen Hu cs.CV

title: Astraea: Grammar-based Fairness Testing
title_zh: Astraea：基于语法的公平性测试
abstract: Software often produces biased outputs. In particular, machine learning (ML) based software are known to produce erroneous predictions when processing discriminatory inputs. Such unfair program behavior can be caused by societal bias. In the last few years, Amazon, Microsoft and Google have provided software services that produce unfair outputs, mostly due to societal bias (e.g. gender or race). In such events, developers are saddled with the task of conducting fairness testing. Fairness testing is challenging; developers are tasked with generating discriminatory inputs that reveal and explain biases. We propose a grammar-based fairness testing approach (called ASTRAEA) which leverages context-free grammars to generate discriminatory inputs that reveal fairness violations in software systems. Using probabilistic grammars, ASTRAEA also provides fault diagnosis by isolating the cause of observed software bias. ASTRAEA's diagnoses facilitate the improvement of ML fairness. ASTRAEA was evaluated on 18 software systems that provide three major natural language processing (NLP) services. In our evaluation, ASTRAEA generated fairness violations with a rate of ~18%. ASTRAEA generated over 573K discriminatory test cases and found over 102K fairness violations. Furthermore, ASTRAEA improves software fairness by ~76%, via model-retraining.
summary: Software often produces biased outputs. In particular, machine learning (ML) based software are known to produce erroneous predictions when processing discriminatory inputs. Such unfair program behavior can be caused by societal bias. In the last few years, Amazon, Microsoft and Google have provided software services that produce unfair outputs, mostly due to societal bias (e.g. gender or race). In such events, developers are saddled with the task of conducting fairness testing. Fairness testing is challenging; developers are tasked with generating discriminatory inputs that reveal and explain biases. We propose a grammar-based fairness testing approach (called ASTRAEA) which leverages context-free grammars to generate discriminatory inputs that reveal fairness violations in software systems. Using probabilistic grammars, ASTRAEA also provides fault diagnosis by isolating the cause of observed software bias. ASTRAEA's diagnoses facilitate the improvement of ML fairness. ASTRAEA was evaluated on 18 software systems that provide three major natural language processing (NLP) services. In our evaluation, ASTRAEA generated fairness violations with a rate of ~18%. ASTRAEA generated over 573K discriminatory test cases and found over 102K fairness violations. Furthermore, ASTRAEA improves software fairness by ~76%, via model-retraining.
abstract_zh: 软件通常会产生有偏差的输出。特别是，众所周知，基于机器学习 (ML) 的软件在处理歧视性输入时会产生错误的预测。这种不公平的程序行为可能是由社会偏见造成的。在过去几年中，亚马逊、微软和谷歌提供的软件服务产生了不公平的产出，这主要是由于社会偏见（例如性别或种族）造成的。在这种情况下，开发人员就肩负着进行公平性测试的任务。公平性测试具有挑战性；开发人员的任务是生成揭示和解释偏见的歧视性输入。我们提出了一种基于语法的公平性测试方法（称为 ASTRAEA），该方法利用上下文无关语法来生成歧视性输入，揭示软件系统中的公平性违规行为。 ASTRAEA 还使用概率语法，通过隔离观察到的软件偏差的原因来提供故障诊断。 ASTRAEA 的诊断有助于提高 ML 的公平性。 ASTRAEA 在 18 个提供三种主要自然语言处理 (NLP) 服务的软件系统上进行了评估。在我们的评估中，ASTRAEA 的公平违规率约为 18%。 ASTRAEA 生成了超过 573,000 个歧视性测试用例，并发现了超过 102,000 个公平违规行为。此外，ASTRAEA 通过模型再训练将软件公平性提高了约 76%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于上下文无关文法的公平性测试方法ASTRAEA，用于检测软件系统中的偏见并提高机器学习模型的公平性。
AI.motivation: 机器学习软件常因社会偏见（如性别、种族）产生不公平输出，传统人工测试难以有效发现此类问题，需自动化工具辅助检测与改进。
AI.method: 通过上下文无关文法生成歧视性输入以暴露公平性违规，并利用概率文法定位偏见根源，结合模型重训练提升公平性。
AI.result: 在18个自然语言处理系统中，ASTRAEA生成573K测试用例，发现102K公平性违规，检测率达18%，通过模型重训练使软件公平性提升约76%。
AI.conclusion: ASTRAEA有效揭示了软件中的公平性缺陷，并通过自动化诊断与优化显著提升了机器学习系统的公平性表现。

authors_text: Yuli Zheng,Zhenyu Wu,Ye Yuan,Tianlong Chen,Zhangyang Wang
title: PCAL: A Privacy-preserving Intelligent Credit Risk Modeling Framework Based on Adversarial Learning
title_zh: PCAL：基于对抗性学习的隐私保护智能信用风险建模框架
abstract: Credit risk modeling has permeated our everyday life. Most banks and financial companies use this technique to model their clients' trustworthiness. While machine learning is increasingly used in this field, the resulting large-scale collection of user private information has reinvigorated the privacy debate, considering dozens of data breach incidents every year caused by unauthorized hackers, and (potentially even more) information misuse/abuse by authorized parties. To address those critical concerns, this paper proposes a framework of Privacy-preserving Credit risk modeling based on Adversarial Learning (PCAL). PCAL aims to mask the private information inside the original dataset, while maintaining the important utility information for the target prediction task performance, by (iteratively) weighing between a privacy-risk loss and a utility-oriented loss. PCAL is compared against off-the-shelf options in terms of both utility and privacy protection. Results indicate that PCAL can learn an effective, privacy-free representation from user data, providing a solid foundation towards privacy-preserving machine learning for credit risk analysis.
summary: Credit risk modeling has permeated our everyday life. Most banks and financial companies use this technique to model their clients' trustworthiness. While machine learning is increasingly used in this field, the resulting large-scale collection of user private information has reinvigorated the privacy debate, considering dozens of data breach incidents every year caused by unauthorized hackers, and (potentially even more) information misuse/abuse by authorized parties. To address those critical concerns, this paper proposes a framework of Privacy-preserving Credit risk modeling based on Adversarial Learning (PCAL). PCAL aims to mask the private information inside the original dataset, while maintaining the important utility information for the target prediction task performance, by (iteratively) weighing between a privacy-risk loss and a utility-oriented loss. PCAL is compared against off-the-shelf options in terms of both utility and privacy protection. Results indicate that PCAL can learn an effective, privacy-free representation from user data, providing a solid foundation towards privacy-preserving machine learning for credit risk analysis.
abstract_zh: 信用风险模型已经渗透到我们的日常生活中。大多数银行和金融公司都使用这种技术来模拟客户的可信度。虽然机器学习在这一领域的应用越来越多，但由此产生的大规模用户私人信息收集重新引发了隐私争论，考虑到每年都会发生数十起由未经授权的黑客造成的数据泄露事件，以及（可能更多）授权方误用/滥用信息。为了解决这些关键问题，本文提出了一种基于对抗性学习（PCAL）的隐私保护信用风险建模框架。 PCAL 旨在通过（迭代）权衡隐私风险损失和面向效用的损失来掩盖原始数据集中的私人信息，同时维护目标预测任务性能的重要效用信息。 PCAL 在实用性和隐私保护方面与现成的选项进行了比较。结果表明，PCAL 可以从用户数据中学习有效的、无隐私的表示，为信用风险分析的隐私保护机器学习提供了坚实的基础。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于对抗学习的隐私保护信用风险建模框架PCAL，通过平衡隐私风险损失与效用损失，在保护用户隐私的同时保持模型预测性能。
AI.motivation: 信用风险建模中大规模收集的用户隐私数据面临数据泄露和滥用风险，现有方法难以有效平衡隐私保护与模型效用。
AI.method: 设计对抗学习框架PCAL，通过迭代优化隐私风险损失与效用损失的权衡，生成隐私友好的数据表示。
AI.result: 实验表明PCAL能有效学习隐私保护的特征表示，在隐私保护和预测性能上优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: PCAL为隐私保护的机器学习提供了可行方案，为金融领域信用风险分析奠定隐私安全基础。

authors_text: Siddhant Ranade,Xin Yu,Shantnu Kakkar,Pedro Miraldo,Srikumar Ramalingam
title: Mapping of Sparse 3D Data using Alternating Projection
title_zh: 使用交替投影映射稀疏 3D 数据
comment: ACCV2020 oral. This article supersedes arXiv:1906.05888
comments: ACCV2020 oral. This article supersedes arXiv:1906.05888
abstract: We propose a novel technique to register sparse 3D scans in the absence of texture. While existing methods such as KinectFusion or Iterative Closest Points (ICP) heavily rely on dense point clouds, this task is particularly challenging under sparse conditions without RGB data. Sparse texture-less data does not come with high-quality boundary signal, and this prohibits the use of correspondences from corners, junctions, or boundary lines. Moreover, in the case of sparse data, it is incorrect to assume that the same point will be captured in two consecutive scans. We take a different approach and first re-parameterize the point-cloud using a large number of line segments. In this re-parameterized data, there exists a large number of line intersection (and not correspondence) constraints that allow us to solve the registration task. We propose the use of a two-step alternating projection algorithm by formulating the registration as the simultaneous satisfaction of intersection and rigidity constraints. The proposed approach outperforms other top-scoring algorithms on both Kinect and LiDAR datasets. In Kinect, we can use 100X downsampled sparse data and still outperform competing methods operating on full-resolution data.
summary: We propose a novel technique to register sparse 3D scans in the absence of texture. While existing methods such as KinectFusion or Iterative Closest Points (ICP) heavily rely on dense point clouds, this task is particularly challenging under sparse conditions without RGB data. Sparse texture-less data does not come with high-quality boundary signal, and this prohibits the use of correspondences from corners, junctions, or boundary lines. Moreover, in the case of sparse data, it is incorrect to assume that the same point will be captured in two consecutive scans. We take a different approach and first re-parameterize the point-cloud using a large number of line segments. In this re-parameterized data, there exists a large number of line intersection (and not correspondence) constraints that allow us to solve the registration task. We propose the use of a two-step alternating projection algorithm by formulating the registration as the simultaneous satisfaction of intersection and rigidity constraints. The proposed approach outperforms other top-scoring algorithms on both Kinect and LiDAR datasets. In Kinect, we can use 100X downsampled sparse data and still outperform competing methods operating on full-resolution data.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种在没有纹理的情况下配准稀疏 3D 扫描的新技术。虽然 KinectFusion 或迭代最近点 (ICP) 等现有方法严重依赖密集点云，但在没有 RGB 数据的稀疏条件下，这项任务尤其具有挑战性。稀疏的无纹理数据不附带高质量的边界信号，这禁止使用来自拐角、交汇处或边界线的对应。此外，在稀疏数据的情况下，假设在两次连续扫描中捕获同一点是不正确的。我们采用不同的方法，首先使用大量线段重新参数化点云。在这个重新参数化的数据中，存在大量的线相交（而不是对应）约束，使我们能够解决配准任务。我们建议通过将配准公式化为同时满足相交和刚性约束来使用两步交替投影算法。所提出的方法在 Kinect 和 LiDAR 数据集上均优于其他得分最高的算法。在 Kinect 中，我们可以使用 100 倍下采样的稀疏数据，并且仍然优于处理全分辨率数据的竞争方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种在无纹理条件下注册稀疏3D扫描的新技术，通过线段重参数化和交替投影算法解决稀疏数据的配准问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法如KinectFusion和ICP依赖密集点云和纹理信息，但在稀疏无纹理数据下难以有效工作，且无法保证连续扫描间的点对应关系。
AI.method: 将点云重参数化为大量线段，利用线段交点约束和刚性约束，通过两步交替投影算法实现配准。
AI.result: 在Kinect和LiDAR数据集上优于其他顶级算法，即使使用100倍下采样的稀疏数据仍能超越全分辨率方法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过线段交点约束有效处理稀疏无纹理数据，为低质量3D扫描配准提供了新思路。

search_text: Mapping of Sparse 3D Data using Alternating Projection 使用交替投影映射稀疏 3D 数据 We propose a novel technique to register sparse 3D scans in the absence of texture. While existing methods such as KinectFusion or Iterative Closest Points (ICP) heavily rely on dense point clouds, this task is particularly challenging under sparse conditions without RGB data. Sparse texture-less data does not come with high-quality boundary signal, and this prohibits the use of correspondences from corners, junctions, or boundary lines. Moreover, in the case of sparse data, it is incorrect to assume that the same point will be captured in two consecutive scans. We take a different approach and first re-parameterize the point-cloud using a large number of line segments. In this re-parameterized data, there exists a large number of line intersection (and not correspondence) constraints that allow us to solve the registration task. We propose the use of a two-step alternating projection algorithm by formulating the registration as the simultaneous satisfaction of intersection and rigidity constraints. The proposed approach outperforms other top-scoring algorithms on both Kinect and LiDAR datasets. In Kinect, we can use 100X downsampled sparse data and still outperform competing methods operating on full-resolution data. 我们提出了一种在没有纹理的情况下配准稀疏 3D 扫描的新技术。虽然 KinectFusion 或迭代最近点 (ICP) 等现有方法严重依赖密集点云，但在没有 RGB 数据的稀疏条件下，这项任务尤其具有挑战性。稀疏的无纹理数据不附带高质量的边界信号，这禁止使用来自拐角、交汇处或边界线的对应。此外，在稀疏数据的情况下，假设在两次连续扫描中捕获同一点是不正确的。我们采用不同的方法，首先使用大量线段重新参数化点云。在这个重新参数化的数据中，存在大量的线相交（而不是对应）约束，使我们能够解决配准任务。我们建议通过将配准公式化为同时满足相交和刚性约束来使用两步交替投影算法。所提出的方法在 Kinect 和 LiDAR 数据集上均优于其他得分最高的算法。在 Kinect 中，我们可以使用 100 倍下采样的稀疏数据，并且仍然优于处理全分辨率数据的竞争方法。 本文提出一种在无纹理条件下注册稀疏3D扫描的新技术，通过线段重参数化和交替投影算法解决稀疏数据的配准问题。 Siddhant Ranade,Xin Yu,Shantnu Kakkar,Pedro Miraldo,Srikumar Ramalingam cs.CV,cs.RO

authors_text: Aashay Bhise,Shuvrangshu Jana,Lima Agnel Tony,Debasish Ghose
title: Target State Estimation and Prediction for High Speed Interception
title_zh: 高速拦截的目标状态估计和预测
comment: arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2009.00067
comments: arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2009.00067
abstract: Accurate estimation and prediction of trajectory is essential for interception of any high speed target. In this paper, an extended Kalman filter is used to estimate the current location of target from its visual information and then predict its future position by using the observation sequence. Target motion model is developed considering the approximate known pattern of the target trajectory. In this work, we utilise visual information of the target to carry out the predictions. The proposed algorithm is developed in ROS-Gazebo environment and is verified using hardware implementation.
summary: Accurate estimation and prediction of trajectory is essential for interception of any high speed target. In this paper, an extended Kalman filter is used to estimate the current location of target from its visual information and then predict its future position by using the observation sequence. Target motion model is developed considering the approximate known pattern of the target trajectory. In this work, we utilise visual information of the target to carry out the predictions. The proposed algorithm is developed in ROS-Gazebo environment and is verified using hardware implementation.
abstract_zh: 准确估计和预测弹道对于拦截任何高速目标至关重要。本文使用扩展卡尔曼滤波器根据目标的视觉信息估计目标的当前位置，然后利用观测序列预测其未来位置。目标运动模型的开发考虑了目标轨迹的近似已知模式。在这项工作中，我们利用目标的视觉信息来进行预测。所提出的算法在ROS-Gazebo环境下开发，并使用硬件实现进行验证。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于扩展卡尔曼滤波器的目标状态估计与预测方法，用于高速拦截场景中的轨迹预测。
AI.motivation: 高速目标拦截需要精确的实时轨迹估计与预测，传统方法在动态环境下的适应性不足。
AI.method: 结合扩展卡尔曼滤波器与视觉观测数据，构建考虑目标运动模式的预测模型，并在ROS-Gazebo平台进行仿真验证。
AI.result: 算法在仿真环境与硬件实现中均验证了目标状态估计与预测的有效性，提升了拦截系统的响应精度。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为高速拦截任务提供了可靠的轨迹预测框架，具有实际工程应用价值。

authors_text: Sophie Groenwold,Lily Ou,Aesha Parekh,Samhita Honnavalli,Sharon Levy,Diba Mirza,William Yang Wang
title: Investigating African-American Vernacular English in Transformer-Based Text Generation
title_zh: 基于 Transformer 的文本生成研究非裔美国人白话英语
abstract: The growth of social media has encouraged the written use of African American Vernacular English (AAVE), which has traditionally been used only in oral contexts. However, NLP models have historically been developed using dominant English varieties, such as Standard American English (SAE), due to text corpora availability. We investigate the performance of GPT-2 on AAVE text by creating a dataset of intent-equivalent parallel AAVE/SAE tweet pairs, thereby isolating syntactic structure and AAVE- or SAE-specific language for each pair. We evaluate each sample and its GPT-2 generated text with pretrained sentiment classifiers and find that while AAVE text results in more classifications of negative sentiment than SAE, the use of GPT-2 generally increases occurrences of positive sentiment for both. Additionally, we conduct human evaluation of AAVE and SAE text generated with GPT-2 to compare contextual rigor and overall quality.
summary: The growth of social media has encouraged the written use of African American Vernacular English (AAVE), which has traditionally been used only in oral contexts. However, NLP models have historically been developed using dominant English varieties, such as Standard American English (SAE), due to text corpora availability. We investigate the performance of GPT-2 on AAVE text by creating a dataset of intent-equivalent parallel AAVE/SAE tweet pairs, thereby isolating syntactic structure and AAVE- or SAE-specific language for each pair. We evaluate each sample and its GPT-2 generated text with pretrained sentiment classifiers and find that while AAVE text results in more classifications of negative sentiment than SAE, the use of GPT-2 generally increases occurrences of positive sentiment for both. Additionally, we conduct human evaluation of AAVE and SAE text generated with GPT-2 to compare contextual rigor and overall quality.
abstract_zh: 社交媒体的发展鼓励了非裔美国人白话英语 (AAVE) 的书面使用，而传统上该语言仅用于口头语境。然而，由于文本语料库的可用性，NLP 模型历来是使用主流英语变体开发的，例如标准美式英语 (SAE)。我们通过创建意图等效的并行 AAVE/SAE 推文对的数据集来研究 GPT-2 在 AAVE 文本上的性能，从而隔离每对的句法结构和 AAVE 或 SAE 特定语言。我们使用预训练的情绪分类器评估每个样本及其 GPT-2 生成的文本，发现虽然 AAVE 文本比 SAE 产生更多的负面情绪分类，但 GPT-2 的使用通常会增加两者正面情绪的出现率。此外，我们对使用 GPT-2 生成的 AAVE 和 SAE 文本进行人工评估，以比较上下文的严谨性和整体质量。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了GPT-2在生成非裔美国人俚语英语（AAVE）文本时的表现，通过构建平行语料库并分析生成结果的 sentiment 和质量。
AI.motivation: 社交媒体推动了AAVE的书面化使用，但现有NLP模型主要基于标准英语（SAE）训练，缺乏对AAVE的适配性评估。
AI.method: 构建意图等价的AAVE/SAE推文平行语料库，利用预训练情感分类器评估GPT-2生成文本的sentiment变化，并进行人工质量评估。
AI.result: AAVE原文情感分类更倾向负面，但GPT-2生成文本使两种语言的正面情感占比均上升；人工评估显示生成文本在语境严谨性和质量上存在差异。
AI.conclusion: GPT-2在处理AAVE时存在sentiment偏差，但整体提升积极表达，需进一步优化模型对AAVE的语言表示能力。

title: Adversarial Boot Camp: label free certified robustness in one epoch
title_zh: 对抗性训练营：在一个时期内获得无标签认证的稳健性
comment: 13 pages, 5 figures, 5 tables. Under review as a conference paper at ICLR 2021. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2006.06061
comments: 13 pages, 5 figures, 5 tables. Under review as a conference paper at ICLR 2021. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2006.06061
abstract: Machine learning models are vulnerable to adversarial attacks. One approach to addressing this vulnerability is certification, which focuses on models that are guaranteed to be robust for a given perturbation size. A drawback of recent certified models is that they are stochastic: they require multiple computationally expensive model evaluations with random noise added to a given input. In our work, we present a deterministic certification approach which results in a certifiably robust model. This approach is based on an equivalence between training with a particular regularized loss, and the expected values of Gaussian averages. We achieve certified models on ImageNet-1k by retraining a model with this loss for one epoch without the use of label information.
summary: Machine learning models are vulnerable to adversarial attacks. One approach to addressing this vulnerability is certification, which focuses on models that are guaranteed to be robust for a given perturbation size. A drawback of recent certified models is that they are stochastic: they require multiple computationally expensive model evaluations with random noise added to a given input. In our work, we present a deterministic certification approach which results in a certifiably robust model. This approach is based on an equivalence between training with a particular regularized loss, and the expected values of Gaussian averages. We achieve certified models on ImageNet-1k by retraining a model with this loss for one epoch without the use of label information.
abstract_zh: 机器学习模型很容易受到对抗性攻击。解决此漏洞的一种方法是认证，其重点是保证对于给定扰动大小具有鲁棒性的模型。最近经过认证的模型的一个缺点是它们是随机的：它们需要多个计算成本高昂的模型评估，并将随机噪声添加到给定的输入中。在我们的工作中，我们提出了一种确定性的认证方法，该方法可以产生可证明的稳健模型。这种方法基于特定正则化损失的训练与高斯平均值的期望值之间的等价性。我们通过在一个时期内重新训练具有这种损失的模型而不使用标签信息，在 ImageNet-1k 上实现了经过认证的模型。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需标签信息的确定性认证方法，通过单轮训练实现对抗鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有认证模型依赖多次随机噪声扰动的计算，效率低下且需标签数据，限制了实际应用。
AI.method: 基于正则化损失与高斯平均期望值的等价性，设计确定性训练框架，在单轮训练中无需标签即可获得认证鲁棒性。
AI.result: 在ImageNet-1k数据集上成功训练出认证鲁棒模型，验证了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过简化计算流程和去除标签依赖，显著提升了认证鲁棒性的训练效率与实用性。

title: Fast DecreaseKey Heaps with worst-case variants
title_zh: 具有最坏情况变体的快速减少密钥堆
comment: 9 pages+1 citation, 1 figure, 3 tables. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:1911.11637
comments: 9 pages+1 citation, 1 figure, 3 tables. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:1911.11637
abstract: In the paper "Fast Fibonacci heaps with worst case extensions", we have described heaps with both Meld-DecreaseKey and DecreaseKey interfaces, allowing operations with guaranteed worst-case asymptotically optimal times. The paper was intended to concentrate on the DecreaseKey interface, but it could be hard to separate the two described data structures without careful reading. The current paper's goal is not to invent a novel data structure, but to describe a rather easy DecreaseKey version in a hopefully readable form. The paper is intended not to require reference to other papers.
summary: In the paper "Fast Fibonacci heaps with worst case extensions", we have described heaps with both Meld-DecreaseKey and DecreaseKey interfaces, allowing operations with guaranteed worst-case asymptotically optimal times. The paper was intended to concentrate on the DecreaseKey interface, but it could be hard to separate the two described data structures without careful reading. The current paper's goal is not to invent a novel data structure, but to describe a rather easy DecreaseKey version in a hopefully readable form. The paper is intended not to require reference to other papers.
abstract_zh: 在论文“具有最坏情况扩展的快速斐波那契堆”中，我们描述了具有 Meld-DecreaseKey 和 DecreaseKey 接口的堆，允许在保证最坏情况渐近最佳时间的情况下进行操作。本文旨在重点关注 DecreaseKey 接口，但如果不仔细阅读，可能很难区分所描述的两种数据结构。当前论文的目标不是发明一种新颖的数据结构，而是以一种可读的形式描述一个相当简单的 DecreaseKey 版本。本文旨在不要求参考其他论文。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在以易读的方式描述一种简单的DecreaseKey堆结构，确保最坏情况下的时间复杂度最优，且无需依赖其他文献。
AI.motivation: 此前论文中两种堆结构（Meld-DecreaseKey和DecreaseKey）的区分不够清晰，且实际应用中需要独立、易读的实现方案。
AI.method: 基于已有研究，设计并分析一种简化版的DecreaseKey堆，通过明确接口和操作规则，保证最坏情况下的渐近最优性能。
AI.result: 提出了一种独立、可读性高的DecreaseKey堆实现，其操作时间复杂度在最坏情况下达到理论下限。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在保持效率的同时提升了实现清晰度，为实际应用提供了更直接的参考方案。

title: Optimization over Random and Gradient Probabilistic Pixel Sampling for Fast, Robust Multi-Resolution Image Registration
title_zh: 针对快速、鲁棒的多分辨率图像配准的随机和梯度概率像素采样的优化
comment: arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2010.00988
comments: arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2010.00988
abstract: This paper presents an approach to fast image registration through probabilistic pixel sampling. We propose a practical scheme to leverage the benefits of two state-of-the-art pixel sampling approaches: gradient magnitude based pixel sampling and uniformly random sampling. Our framework involves learning the optimal balance between the two sampling schemes off-line during training, based on a small training dataset, using particle swarm optimization. We then test the proposed sampling approach on 3D rigid registration against two state-of-the-art approaches based on the popular, publicly available, Vanderbilt RIRE dataset. Our results indicate that the proposed sampling approach yields much faster, accurate and robust registration results when compared against the state-of-the-art.
summary: This paper presents an approach to fast image registration through probabilistic pixel sampling. We propose a practical scheme to leverage the benefits of two state-of-the-art pixel sampling approaches: gradient magnitude based pixel sampling and uniformly random sampling. Our framework involves learning the optimal balance between the two sampling schemes off-line during training, based on a small training dataset, using particle swarm optimization. We then test the proposed sampling approach on 3D rigid registration against two state-of-the-art approaches based on the popular, publicly available, Vanderbilt RIRE dataset. Our results indicate that the proposed sampling approach yields much faster, accurate and robust registration results when compared against the state-of-the-art.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种通过概率像素采样快速图像配准的方法。我们提出了一种实用的方案来利用两种最先进的像素采样方法的优点：基于梯度幅度的像素采样和均匀随机采样。我们的框架涉及在训练期间基于小型训练数据集，使用粒子群优化来离线学习两种采样方案之间的最佳平衡。然后，我们根据流行的、公开的 Vanderbilt RIRE 数据集，对照两种最先进的方法，测试所提出的 3D 刚性配准采样方法。我们的结果表明，与最先进的技术相比，所提出的采样方法可以产生更快、更准确和更稳健的配准结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合随机采样与梯度概率像素采样的图像配准方法，实现快速且鲁棒的多分辨率配准。
AI.motivation: 现有图像配准方法在速度与准确性之间难以平衡，需探索更优像素采样策略以提升性能。
AI.method: 通过粒子群优化算法离线学习随机采样与梯度幅值采样的最佳权重，并在Vanderbilt RIRE数据集上验证3D刚性配准效果。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在配准速度、精度及鲁棒性方面均优于现有最先进的两种技术方案。
AI.conclusion: 融合随机与梯度采样的概率框架能有效提升图像配准效率，为多分辨率配准提供新思路。

title: Denoising Diffusion Implicit Models
title_zh: 去噪扩散隐式模型
comment: ICLR 2021; updated connections with ODEs at page 6, fixed some typos in the proof
comments: ICLR 2021; updated connections with ODEs at page 6, fixed some typos in the proof
abstract: Denoising diffusion probabilistic models (DDPMs) have achieved high quality image generation without adversarial training, yet they require simulating a Markov chain for many steps to produce a sample. To accelerate sampling, we present denoising diffusion implicit models (DDIMs), a more efficient class of iterative implicit probabilistic models with the same training procedure as DDPMs. In DDPMs, the generative process is defined as the reverse of a Markovian diffusion process. We construct a class of non-Markovian diffusion processes that lead to the same training objective, but whose reverse process can be much faster to sample from. We empirically demonstrate that DDIMs can produce high quality samples $10 \times$ to $50 \times$ faster in terms of wall-clock time compared to DDPMs, allow us to trade off computation for sample quality, and can perform semantically meaningful image interpolation directly in the latent space.
summary: Denoising diffusion probabilistic models (DDPMs) have achieved high quality image generation without adversarial training, yet they require simulating a Markov chain for many steps to produce a sample. To accelerate sampling, we present denoising diffusion implicit models (DDIMs), a more efficient class of iterative implicit probabilistic models with the same training procedure as DDPMs. In DDPMs, the generative process is defined as the reverse of a Markovian diffusion process. We construct a class of non-Markovian diffusion processes that lead to the same training objective, but whose reverse process can be much faster to sample from. We empirically demonstrate that DDIMs can produce high quality samples $10 \times$ to $50 \times$ faster in terms of wall-clock time compared to DDPMs, allow us to trade off computation for sample quality, and can perform semantically meaningful image interpolation directly in the latent space.
abstract_zh: 去噪扩散概率模型（DDPM）无需对抗训练即可实现高质量图像生成，但它们需要模拟马尔可夫链的许多步骤来生成样本。为了加速采样，我们提出了去噪扩散隐式模型 (DDIM)，这是一类更高效的迭代隐式概率模型，其训练过程与 DDPM 相同。在 DDPM 中，生成过程被定义为马尔可夫扩散过程的逆过程。我们构建了一类非马尔可夫扩散过程，其导致相同的训练目标，但其反向过程可以更快地采样。我们凭经验证明，与 DDPM 相比，DDIM 可以在挂钟时间上快 10 美元到 50 美元生成高质量样本，使我们能够权衡样本质量的计算，并且可以直接在潜在空间中执行语义上有意义的图像插值。

AI.tldr: 提出了一种更高效的去噪扩散隐式模型（DDIMs），用于加速图像生成过程。
AI.motivation: 尽管去噪扩散概率模型（DDPMs）能生成高质量图像，但其采样过程需要大量步骤，导致效率低下，需寻找更高效的替代方法。
AI.method: 构建非马尔可夫扩散过程，保持与DDPMs相同的训练目标，但通过更快速的反向过程实现高效采样。
AI.result: 实验表明，DDIMs在采样速度上比DDPMs快10至50倍，支持计算与质量的权衡，并能直接在潜在空间进行语义插值。
AI.conclusion: DDIMs有效提升了图像生成的效率，同时保持高质量，并展示了在潜在空间进行语义操作的灵活性。

authors_text: Praveen Kumar Bodigutla,Aditya Tiwari,Josep Valls Vargas,Lazaros Polymenakos,Spyros Matsoukas
title: Joint Turn and Dialogue level User Satisfaction Estimation on Multi-Domain Conversations
title_zh: 多域对话的联合回合和对话级别用户满意度估计
abstract: Dialogue level quality estimation is vital for optimizing data driven dialogue management. Current automated methods to estimate turn and dialogue level user satisfaction employ hand-crafted features and rely on complex annotation schemes, which reduce the generalizability of the trained models. We propose a novel user satisfaction estimation approach which minimizes an adaptive multi-task loss function in order to jointly predict turn-level Response Quality labels provided by experts and explicit dialogue-level ratings provided by end users. The proposed BiLSTM based deep neural net model automatically weighs each turn's contribution towards the estimated dialogue-level rating, implicitly encodes temporal dependencies, and removes the need to hand-craft features. On dialogues sampled from 28 Alexa domains, two dialogue systems and three user groups, the joint dialogue-level satisfaction estimation model achieved up to an absolute 27% (0.43->0.70) and 7% (0.63->0.70) improvement in linear correlation performance over baseline deep neural net and benchmark Gradient boosting regression models, respectively.
summary: Dialogue level quality estimation is vital for optimizing data driven dialogue management. Current automated methods to estimate turn and dialogue level user satisfaction employ hand-crafted features and rely on complex annotation schemes, which reduce the generalizability of the trained models. We propose a novel user satisfaction estimation approach which minimizes an adaptive multi-task loss function in order to jointly predict turn-level Response Quality labels provided by experts and explicit dialogue-level ratings provided by end users. The proposed BiLSTM based deep neural net model automatically weighs each turn's contribution towards the estimated dialogue-level rating, implicitly encodes temporal dependencies, and removes the need to hand-craft features. On dialogues sampled from 28 Alexa domains, two dialogue systems and three user groups, the joint dialogue-level satisfaction estimation model achieved up to an absolute 27% (0.43->0.70) and 7% (0.63->0.70) improvement in linear correlation performance over baseline deep neural net and benchmark Gradient boosting regression models, respectively.
abstract_zh: 对话级别质量估计对于优化数据驱动的对话管理至关重要。当前估计回合和对话级别用户满意度的自动化方法采用手工制作的特征并依赖于复杂的注释方案，这降低了训练模型的通用性。我们提出了一种新颖的用户满意度估计方法，该方法最小化自适应多任务损失函数，以便联合预测专家提供的回合级响应质量标签和最终用户提供的明确对话级评级。所提出的基于 BiLSTM 的深度神经网络模型自动权衡每个回合对估计对话级别评分的贡献，隐式编码时间依赖性，并消除了手工制作特征的需要。在从 28 个 Alexa 域、两个对话系统和三个用户组采样的对话中，联合对话级别满意度估计模型比基线深度神经网络和基准梯度增强回归模型的线性相关性能分别提高了 27% (0.43->0.70) 和 7% (0.63->0.70)。

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种基于深度学习的多领域对话用户满意度联合估计方法，同时预测回合级和对话级满意度。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖手工特征和复杂标注方案，导致模型泛化能力不足，需自动化特征提取和联合预测方法。
AI.method: 采用BiLSTM深度神经网络，结合自适应多任务损失函数，自动加权各回合对对话级满意度的贡献并编码时序依赖。
AI.result: 在28个Alexa领域数据集上，模型相较基线提升27%（0.43→0.70）和7%（0.63→0.70）的线性相关性指标。
AI.conclusion: 联合建模与自动特征学习显著提升满意度估计性能，验证了多任务学习框架在对话系统优化中的有效性。

ai_content.tldr: 该论文提出了一种基于深度学习的多领域对话用户满意度联合估计方法，同时预测回合级和对话级满意度。

title: RANP: Resource Aware Neuron Pruning at Initialization for 3D CNNs
title_zh: RANP：3D CNN 初始化时的资源感知神经元修剪
abstract: Although 3D Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs) are essential for most learning based applications involving dense 3D data, their applicability is limited due to excessive memory and computational requirements. Compressing such networks by pruning therefore becomes highly desirable. However, pruning 3D CNNs is largely unexplored possibly because of the complex nature of typical pruning algorithms that embeds pruning into an iterative optimization paradigm. In this work, we introduce a Resource Aware Neuron Pruning (RANP) algorithm that prunes 3D CNNs at initialization to high sparsity levels. Specifically, the core idea is to obtain an importance score for each neuron based on their sensitivity to the loss function. This neuron importance is then reweighted according to the neuron resource consumption related to FLOPs or memory. We demonstrate the effectiveness of our pruning method on 3D semantic segmentation with widely used 3D-UNets on ShapeNet and BraTS'18 as well as on video classification with MobileNetV2 and I3D on UCF101 dataset. In these experiments, our RANP leads to roughly 50-95 reduction in FLOPs and 35-80 reduction in memory with negligible loss in accuracy compared to the unpruned networks. This significantly reduces the computational resources required to train 3D CNNs. The pruned network obtained by our algorithm can also be easily scaled up and transferred to another dataset for training.
summary: Although 3D Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs) are essential for most learning based applications involving dense 3D data, their applicability is limited due to excessive memory and computational requirements. Compressing such networks by pruning therefore becomes highly desirable. However, pruning 3D CNNs is largely unexplored possibly because of the complex nature of typical pruning algorithms that embeds pruning into an iterative optimization paradigm. In this work, we introduce a Resource Aware Neuron Pruning (RANP) algorithm that prunes 3D CNNs at initialization to high sparsity levels. Specifically, the core idea is to obtain an importance score for each neuron based on their sensitivity to the loss function. This neuron importance is then reweighted according to the neuron resource consumption related to FLOPs or memory. We demonstrate the effectiveness of our pruning method on 3D semantic segmentation with widely used 3D-UNets on ShapeNet and BraTS'18 as well as on video classification with MobileNetV2 and I3D on UCF101 dataset. In these experiments, our RANP leads to roughly 50-95 reduction in FLOPs and 35-80 reduction in memory with negligible loss in accuracy compared to the unpruned networks. This significantly reduces the computational resources required to train 3D CNNs. The pruned network obtained by our algorithm can also be easily scaled up and transferred to another dataset for training.
abstract_zh: 尽管 3D 卷积神经网络 (CNN) 对于大多数涉及密集 3D 数据的基于学习的应用至关重要，但由于过多的内存和计算要求，它们的适用性受到限制。因此，通过修剪来压缩此类网络变得非常可取。然而，剪枝 3D CNN 在很大程度上尚未被探索，可能是因为将剪枝嵌入迭代优化范例的典型剪枝算法的复杂性。在这项工作中，我们引入了一种资源感知神经元修剪 (RANP) 算法，该算法在初始化时将 3D CNN 修剪到高稀疏级别。具体来说，核心思想是根据每个神经元对损失函数的敏感度来获得其重要性得分。然后，根据与 FLOP 或内存相关的神经元资源消耗，重新加权该神经元重要性。我们通过 ShapeNet 和 BraTS'18 上广泛使用的 3D-UNet 展示了我们的剪枝方法在 3D 语义分割上的有效性，以及在 UCF101 数据集上使用 MobileNetV2 和 I3D 进行视频分类的有效性。在这些实验中，与未修剪的网络相比，我们的 RANP 导致 FLOP 减少大约 50-95，内存减少 35-80，而准确性损失可以忽略不计。这显着减少了训练 3D CNN 所需的计算资源。通过我们的算法获得的修剪网络也可以轻松扩展并转移到另一个数据集进行训练。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种在初始化阶段对3D卷积神经网络进行资源感知的神经元剪枝算法RANP，以降低计算和内存需求。
AI.motivation: 3D卷积神经网络在处理密集3D数据时计算和内存消耗过大，而现有剪枝方法复杂且未充分探索，亟需高效压缩方案。
AI.method: 基于神经元对损失函数的敏感性计算重要性评分，并根据FLOPs或内存消耗重新加权，实现初始化阶段的高稀疏性剪枝。
AI.result: 在ShapeNet、BraTS'18和UCF101等数据集上，RANP使FLOPs减少50-95%，内存减少35-80%，且精度损失可忽略。
AI.conclusion: RANP显著降低3D CNN训练资源需求，且剪枝网络易于扩展和迁移至其他数据集。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出了一种在初始化阶段对3D卷积神经网络进行资源感知的神经元剪枝算法RANP，以降低计算和内存需求。

ai_content.conclusion: RANP显著降低3D CNN训练资源需求，且剪枝网络易于扩展和迁移至其他数据集。

tldr: 本文提出了一种在初始化阶段对3D卷积神经网络进行资源感知的神经元剪枝算法RANP，以降低计算和内存需求。
motivation: 3D卷积神经网络在处理密集3D数据时计算和内存消耗过大，而现有剪枝方法复杂且未充分探索，亟需高效压缩方案。
method: 基于神经元对损失函数的敏感性计算重要性评分，并根据FLOPs或内存消耗重新加权，实现初始化阶段的高稀疏性剪枝。
result: 在ShapeNet、BraTS'18和UCF101等数据集上，RANP使FLOPs减少50-95%，内存减少35-80%，且精度损失可忽略。
conclusion: RANP显著降低3D CNN训练资源需求，且剪枝网络易于扩展和迁移至其他数据集。
search_text: RANP: Resource Aware Neuron Pruning at Initialization for 3D CNNs RANP：3D CNN 初始化时的资源感知神经元修剪 Although 3D Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs) are essential for most learning based applications involving dense 3D data, their applicability is limited due to excessive memory and computational requirements. Compressing such networks by pruning therefore becomes highly desirable. However, pruning 3D CNNs is largely unexplored possibly because of the complex nature of typical pruning algorithms that embeds pruning into an iterative optimization paradigm. In this work, we introduce a Resource Aware Neuron Pruning (RANP) algorithm that prunes 3D CNNs at initialization to high sparsity levels. Specifically, the core idea is to obtain an importance score for each neuron based on their sensitivity to the loss function. This neuron importance is then reweighted according to the neuron resource consumption related to FLOPs or memory. We demonstrate the effectiveness of our pruning method on 3D semantic segmentation with widely used 3D-UNets on ShapeNet and BraTS'18 as well as on video classification with MobileNetV2 and I3D on UCF101 dataset. In these experiments, our RANP leads to roughly 50-95 reduction in FLOPs and 35-80 reduction in memory with negligible loss in accuracy compared to the unpruned networks. This significantly reduces the computational resources required to train 3D CNNs. The pruned network obtained by our algorithm can also be easily scaled up and transferred to another dataset for training. 尽管 3D 卷积神经网络 (CNN) 对于大多数涉及密集 3D 数据的基于学习的应用至关重要，但由于过多的内存和计算要求，它们的适用性受到限制。因此，通过修剪来压缩此类网络变得非常可取。然而，剪枝 3D CNN 在很大程度上尚未被探索，可能是因为将剪枝嵌入迭代优化范例的典型剪枝算法的复杂性。在这项工作中，我们引入了一种资源感知神经元修剪 (RANP) 算法，该算法在初始化时将 3D CNN 修剪到高稀疏级别。具体来说，核心思想是根据每个神经元对损失函数的敏感度来获得其重要性得分。然后，根据与 FLOP 或内存相关的神经元资源消耗，重新加权该神经元重要性。我们通过 ShapeNet 和 BraTS'18 上广泛使用的 3D-UNet 展示了我们的剪枝方法在 3D 语义分割上的有效性，以及在 UCF101 数据集上使用 MobileNetV2 和 I3D 进行视频分类的有效性。在这些实验中，与未修剪的网络相比，我们的 RANP 导致 FLOP 减少大约 50-95，内存减少 35-80，而准确性损失可以忽略不计。这显着减少了训练 3D CNN 所需的计算资源。通过我们的算法获得的修剪网络也可以轻松扩展并转移到另一个数据集进行训练。 本文提出了一种在初始化阶段对3D卷积神经网络进行资源感知的神经元剪枝算法RANP，以降低计算和内存需求。 Zhiwei Xu,Thalaiyasingam Ajanthan,Vibhav Vineet,Richard Hartley cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Youjian Zhang,Chaoyue Wang,Stephen J. Maybank,Dacheng Tao
title: Exposure Trajectory Recovery from Motion Blur
title_zh: 从运动模糊中恢复曝光轨迹
comment: Accpeted by IEEE Transactions on Pattern Analysis and Machine Intelligence
comments: Accpeted by IEEE Transactions on Pattern Analysis and Machine Intelligence
abstract: Motion blur in dynamic scenes is an important yet challenging research topic. Recently, deep learning methods have achieved impressive performance for dynamic scene deblurring. However, the motion information contained in a blurry image has yet to be fully explored and accurately formulated because: (i) the ground truth of dynamic motion is difficult to obtain; (ii) the temporal ordering is destroyed during the exposure; and (iii) the motion estimation from a blurry image is highly ill-posed. By revisiting the principle of camera exposure, motion blur can be described by the relative motions of sharp content with respect to each exposed position. In this paper, we define exposure trajectories, which represent the motion information contained in a blurry image and explain the causes of motion blur. A novel motion offset estimation framework is proposed to model pixel-wise displacements of the latent sharp image at multiple timepoints. Under mild constraints, our method can recover dense, (non-)linear exposure trajectories, which significantly reduce temporal disorder and ill-posed problems. Finally, experiments demonstrate that the recovered exposure trajectories not only capture accurate and interpretable motion information from a blurry image, but also benefit motion-aware image deblurring and warping-based video extraction tasks. Codes are available on https://github.com/yjzhang96/Motion-ETR.
summary: Motion blur in dynamic scenes is an important yet challenging research topic. Recently, deep learning methods have achieved impressive performance for dynamic scene deblurring. However, the motion information contained in a blurry image has yet to be fully explored and accurately formulated because: (i) the ground truth of dynamic motion is difficult to obtain; (ii) the temporal ordering is destroyed during the exposure; and (iii) the motion estimation from a blurry image is highly ill-posed. By revisiting the principle of camera exposure, motion blur can be described by the relative motions of sharp content with respect to each exposed position. In this paper, we define exposure trajectories, which represent the motion information contained in a blurry image and explain the causes of motion blur. A novel motion offset estimation framework is proposed to model pixel-wise displacements of the latent sharp image at multiple timepoints. Under mild constraints, our method can recover dense, (non-)linear exposure trajectories, which significantly reduce temporal disorder and ill-posed problems. Finally, experiments demonstrate that the recovered exposure trajectories not only capture accurate and interpretable motion information from a blurry image, but also benefit motion-aware image deblurring and warping-based video extraction tasks. Codes are available on https://github.com/yjzhang96/Motion-ETR.
abstract_zh: 动态场景中的运动模糊是一个重要但具有挑战性的研究课题。最近，深度学习方法在动态场景去模糊方面取得了令人印象深刻的性能。然而，模糊图像中包含的运动信息尚未得到充分探索和准确表述，因为：（i）动态运动的基本事实很难获得； (ii) 时间顺序在暴露过程中被破坏； (iii) 模糊图像的运动估计是高度不适定的。通过重新审视相机曝光的原理，运动模糊可以通过清晰内容相对于每个曝光位置的相对运动来描述。在本文中，我们定义了曝光轨迹，它表示模糊图像中包含的运动信息并解释运动模糊的原因。提出了一种新颖的运动偏移估计框架来对多个时间点的潜在清晰图像的像素级位移进行建模。在轻度约束下，我们的方法可以恢复密集的（非线性）线性曝光轨迹，从而显着减少时间紊乱和不适定问题。最后，实验表明，恢复的曝光轨迹不仅可以从模糊图像中捕获准确且可解释的运动信息，而且有利于运动感知图像去模糊和基于扭曲的视频提取任务。代码可在 https://github.com/yjzhang96/Motion-ETR 上获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种从运动模糊图像中恢复曝光轨迹的方法，以解决动态场景去模糊中的运动信息提取难题。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习方法未能充分挖掘模糊图像中的运动信息，因真实运动数据难以获取、曝光过程破坏时间顺序且运动估计问题病态。
AI.method: 基于相机曝光原理定义曝光轨迹，提出像素级运动偏移估计框架，通过建模清晰图像在多时间点的位移，恢复密集的线性/非线性轨迹。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法能准确提取运动信息，并提升运动感知去模糊和基于变形的视频提取任务效果。
AI.conclusion: 通过恢复曝光轨迹有效解决了动态场景去模糊中的时间紊乱和病态问题，为运动信息利用提供了新思路。

title: A One-bit, Comparison-Based Gradient Estimator
title_zh: 一种基于比较的一位梯度估计器
abstract: We study zeroth-order optimization for convex functions where we further assume that function evaluations are unavailable. Instead, one only has access to a $\textit{comparison oracle}$, which given two points $x$ and $y$ returns a single bit of information indicating which point has larger function value, $f(x)$ or $f(y)$. By treating the gradient as an unknown signal to be recovered, we show how one can use tools from one-bit compressed sensing to construct a robust and reliable estimator of the normalized gradient. We then propose an algorithm, coined SCOBO, that uses this estimator within a gradient descent scheme. We show that when $f(x)$ has some low dimensional structure that can be exploited, SCOBO outperforms the state-of-the-art in terms of query complexity. Our theoretical claims are verified by extensive numerical experiments.
summary: We study zeroth-order optimization for convex functions where we further assume that function evaluations are unavailable. Instead, one only has access to a $\textit{comparison oracle}$, which given two points $x$ and $y$ returns a single bit of information indicating which point has larger function value, $f(x)$ or $f(y)$. By treating the gradient as an unknown signal to be recovered, we show how one can use tools from one-bit compressed sensing to construct a robust and reliable estimator of the normalized gradient. We then propose an algorithm, coined SCOBO, that uses this estimator within a gradient descent scheme. We show that when $f(x)$ has some low dimensional structure that can be exploited, SCOBO outperforms the state-of-the-art in terms of query complexity. Our theoretical claims are verified by extensive numerical experiments.
abstract_zh: 我们研究凸函数的零阶优化，其中我们进一步假设函数评估不可用。相反，人们只能访问 $\textit{comparison oracle}$，给定两个点 $x$ 和 $y$ 返回一位信息，指示哪个点具有更大的函数值，$f(x)$ 或 $f(y)$。通过将梯度视为要恢复的未知信号，我们展示了如何使用一位压缩感知工具来构建稳健且可靠的归一化梯度估计器。然后，我们提出了一种算法，称为 SCOBO，在梯度下降方案中使用该估计器。我们表明，当 $f(x)$ 具有一些可以利用的低维结构时，SCOBO 在查询复杂性方面优于最先进的技术。我们的理论主张通过大量的数值实验得到了验证。

AI.tldr: 本文研究在无函数评估情况下，利用比较预言机进行凸函数的零阶优化，提出基于一比特压缩感知的梯度估计器及SCOBO算法。
AI.motivation: 传统零阶优化依赖函数评估，但实际中可能不可行，需利用比较信息进行优化，尤其在评估困难时。
AI.method: 利用一比特压缩感知技术构建梯度估计器，结合梯度下降设计SCOBO算法，利用比较预言机信息。
AI.result: SCOBO在低维结构函数上表现出更优的查询复杂度，实验验证了理论结果。
AI.conclusion: 比较预言机下SCOBO算法有效，尤其适合具有低维结构的凸函数优化，展示了基于压缩感知的梯度估计优势。
